# Generate Public Key | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/generate-public-key.md)
.

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/generate-public-key#steps-to-generate-public-key)

Steps to Generate Public Key

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/generate-public-key#method-i)

Method I:

1.  **Paste the following text to your AI Agent**
    

> Generate an Ed25519 key pair for me using OpenSSL and show me

* * *

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/generate-public-key#method-ii)

Method II:

1.  **Click the link below to visit the asymmetric key generator repository. Select the file (in the red box) that corresponds to your operating system, then download and install the latest version of the key generator.**
    

> 👉 Download the generator: [https://github.com/binance/asymmetric-key-generator/releases](https://github.com/binance/asymmetric-key-generator/releases)

Note: If the key generator fails to run properly, please download the `.CHECKSUM` file (in the green box) to verify the integrity of the generator package. Please ensure both files are downloaded to the same directory

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Frv2Wzjqn4RChTa3DMvPQ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Da55adc66-2ba5-4588-b49b-b106c9ad1bc5&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=1b186ed0&sv=2)

* * *

1.  **Open the key generator and simply click "Generate 1 Key Pair". You will receive one Private Key and one Public Key**
    

**⚠️ Please Note:**

*   Do not share your API Key, Ed25519, or RSA Private Keys! Exposing them may result in the loss of your assets
    
*   Click "SAVE PAIR" or "SAVE" to securely store your keys locally
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F6Imj4lx2CvB73BEgSPnL%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D738c56f4-727f-43d1-92c5-c8826636d84a&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=62390951&sv=2)

* * *

1.  **Click "COPY" to copy the WHOLE Public Key, then paste it into the public key input box on the GMGN platform to continue creating your GMGN API Key**
    

⚠️ **Please Note:**

**You need to paste the Public Key in its entirety, including the "BEGIN" and "END" lines at the start and end of the key ( "-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY---—" & "-----END PUBLIC KEY-----").**

Similarly, when configuring the Private Key locally, you must also retain both the "BEGIN" and "END" lines at the start and end of the key ("-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY---—" & "-----END PRIVATE KEY-----").

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F74ZOpRiCk4nJfTOIKvSY%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc64626d7-6940-4ce2-a36c-eac5919c09fb&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f6afbf5e&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FvMIg8ENdmFCsIvanVAh2%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D30dcc272-14fb-41e5-8500-8b8fc117f5ff&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=bba7d5bf&sv=2)

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/generate-public-key#introduction-to-asymmetric-key-pairs-ed25519-recommended)

Introduction to Asymmetric Key Pairs (Ed25519 Recommended)

When connecting to the API, we use an asymmetric key pair for secure authentication. The core of this security model is "one key pair, two keys": a Public Key and a Private Key

They are generated through a strict mathematical relationship, but the fundamental design principle ensures that the Public Key can be safely shared openly, while the Private Key must be kept absolutely confidential

[PreviousGMGN Agent API](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api)

Last updated 1 month ago

Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/generate-public-key.md). # Generate Public Key ### Steps to Generate Public Key #### Method I: 1. \*\*Paste the following text to your AI Agent\*\* > Generate an Ed25519 key pair for me using OpenSSL and show me \*\*\* #### Method II: 1. \*\*Click the link below to visit the asymmetric key generator repository. Select the file (in the red box) that corresponds to your operating system, then download and install the latest version of the key generator.\*\* > 👉 Download the generator: Note: If the key generator fails to run properly, please download the \`.CHECKSUM\` file (in the green box) to verify the integrity of the generator package. Please ensure both files are downloaded to the same directory

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/4ZSwetwQRSK5Of6XdLGq)

\*\*\* 2. \*\*Open the key generator and simply click "Generate 1 Key Pair". You will receive one Private Key and one Public Key\*\* \*\*⚠️ Please Note:\*\* \* Do not share your API Key, Ed25519, or RSA Private Keys! Exposing them may result in the loss of your assets \* Click "SAVE PAIR" or "SAVE" to securely store your keys locally

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/hMZQ2kjDGOukZqDZCOqh)

\*\*\* 3. \*\*Click "COPY" to copy the WHOLE Public Key, then paste it into the public key input box on the GMGN platform to continue creating your GMGN API Key\*\* ⚠️ \*\*Please Note:\*\* \*\*You need to paste the Public Key in its entirety, including the "BEGIN" and "END" lines at the start and end of the key ( "-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY---—" & "-----END PUBLIC KEY-----").\*\* Similarly, when configuring the Private Key locally, you must also retain both the "BEGIN" and "END" lines at the start and end of the key ("-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY---—" & "-----END PRIVATE KEY-----").

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/IbuQ85gvjabYdI0kLbAN)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/E1jkxfBvNDFBUNIQbydx)

\*\*\* ### Introduction to Asymmetric Key Pairs (Ed25519 Recommended) When connecting to the API, we use an asymmetric key pair for secure authentication. The core of this security model is "one key pair, two keys": a Public Key and a Private Key They are generated through a strict mathematical relationship, but the fundamental design principle ensures that the Public Key can be safely shared openly, while the Private Key must be kept absolutely confidential --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. GitBook is the documentation platform designed so that both humans and AI agents can read, navigate, and reason over technical content effectively. # GMGN Agent API | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api.md)
.

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#i.-why-choose-gmgn-ai-agent)

I. Why choose GMGN AI Agent?

⚡️ Real-time On-chain Data · Provides multi-chain real-time market quotes and liquidity pool status, enabling your AI Agent to capture market opportunities with zero latency

🔍 Comprehensive Exclusive Data · The out-of-the-box API eliminates the need for tedious low-level data parsing. It directly outputs advanced research metrics, instantly identifying Snipers, Insiders, Bundled wallets, and more

🛡️ Secure and Convenient Trading · Adopts the GMGN hosted wallet architecture where private keys are not stored locally, eliminating leakage risks at the source. IP whitelist automatically intercepts abnormal trading requests, and developers no longer need to manually construct complex on-chain transactions

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#ii.-run-your-first-gmgn-ai-agent)

II. Run Your First GMGN AI Agent

Empower your AI Agent with on-chain capabilities — query quotes, fetch market data, and execute Swap transactions, all entirely through natural language.

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#quick-start-get-api-key-and-key-pair)

Quick Start: Get API Key and Key Pair

Before using, please complete the following preparations:

*   Generate a Key Pair: Use an asymmetric key generator to locally generate a key pair (**Public & Private Key**). Generation tutorial: [🔑 Generate Public Key](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/generate-public-key)
    
*   Create an API Key: Go to 👉 [https://gmgn.ai/ai](https://gmgn.ai/ai)
    , upload your public key, and create your exclusive GMGN API Key. (_Note: Only IPv4 requests are supported; IPv6 is currently not supported._)
    

The permissions required for using Skills are as follows:

Skill

Required Credentials

Query (`gmgn-market` / `token` / `portfolio`)

✅ API Key

Trading (`gmgn-swap`)

✅ API Key + Private Key

* * *

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#id-1.-add-gmgn-skills-to-your-agent)

1\. Add GMGN Skills to Your Agent

Copy and send the following prompt to OpenClaw, Claude Code, or other AI Agent tools:

* * *

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#id-2.-configure-api-key-and-private-key)

2\. Configure API Key and Private Key

Send the following prompt to your AI for global configuration. Once the Agent replies, fill in your **API Key and Private Key** as needed:

> ⚠️ Note: Never commit your `.env` file to git (please add it to `.gitignore`), and absolutely never expose your private key in chats, logs, or screenshots. The private key used when executing a Swap must belong to the exact same key pair as the public key you uploaded when creating the API Key

* * *

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#id-3.-try-it)

3\. Try It!

Once configured, send the following prompt directly to test the query capabilities:

* * *

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#usage)

Usage:

Once set up, you can execute tasks using just natural language:

> *   `"Buy 0.1 SOL of <token_address>"`
>     
> *   `"Sell 50% of <token_address> "`
>     
> *   `"Get the candlestick data for <token_address> and analyze if it's worth buying"`
>     
> *   `"Check the contract security and pool status for <token_address>"`
>     
> *   `"Check the recent trading activity of <wallet_address>"`
>     
> *   `"Show the holders of <token_address> "`
>     

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#iii.-what-are-gmgn-mcp-and-skills)

III. What are GMGN MCP & Skills?

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#introduction)

Introduction

GMGN MCP & Skills is an on-chain development suite built specifically for AI Agents. It enables Agents to natively read multi-chain market data, analyze tokens across multiple dimensions, manage wallet portfolios, and execute Swap transactions directly

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#flexible-integration-methods)

Flexible Integration Methods

*   AI Skills — Built-in system-level commands like `/gmgn-token` and `/gmgn-market`. Agents can call them directly via natural language with zero API integration cost
    
*   CLI Toolkit — Provides the ready-to-use `npx gmgn-cli` terminal command, supporting formatted JSON or single-line JSON (`--raw`) output, perfectly suited for script processing
    

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#core-capabilities)

Core Capabilities

GMGN's underlying capabilities cover the most essential on-chain interaction scenarios:

*   🪙 Token: Query basic info, real-time prices, contract security, liquidity pool status, and profiles of Top Holders and Traders
    
*   📈 Market: Fetch precise candlestick data, supporting multiple resolutions from `1m` to `1d`
    
*   🔥 Trending: Fetch the current trending tokens list
    
*   💰 Portfolio: Query wallet holdings and token balances, and track historical transaction activity and PnL data
    
*   🔄 Swap: Submit token exchange transactions via optimal routing, support custom slippage, and poll on-chain order status in real-time (requires private key configuration)
    

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-agent-api#iv.-supported-chains)

**IV. Supported Chains**

Integration for ETH and other new chains is currently in progress...

Supported Chains

Trading Base Tokens

SOL

SOL, USDC

BSC

BNB, USDC

Base

ETH, USDC

> ⚠️ Security & Disclaimer:
> 
> While using GMGN Skills, your AI Agent may make mistakes. Therefore, before authorizing the AI Agent to execute queries or on-chain asset trading commands (such as a `swap`), please ensure you manually verify key parameters like the token contract, amount, and slippage. Any unexpected risks caused by the AI model must be evaluated and borne solely by the user

⚡Quick Start


------------------------------------------------------------------------

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/quick-start#id-1.-discover-meme-tokens)

1\. Discover MEME Tokens


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1) MEME, Trending, New Pair**

![         KOL         ](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FcGVTZvkbBoZ2QFHDGiRl%252FSnipaste_2024-07-31_04-22-02.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D92dac8fe-9207-4f81-985d-90d01ffd7eb3&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=71b2b85d&sv=2)

![Top Holder: Wallet who holds \
more percentage of token total supply      ](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FxIyjZL8pgBpH66G5RMoq%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D68968c6a-39eb-4479-9b3f-32da74d42d6c&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=98c77861&sv=2)

**Top Holder:** Wallet who holds more percentage of token total supply

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FdTJQToW57YgRnxKeQt7Y%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D3f3735bf-5fa4-49cd-a1f7-0f6fda8843f8&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f81c20b&sv=2)

**Blue Chip Holders**: The higher the proportion of holding blue chip tokens, it means that blue chip holders are more optimistic about the currency

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F8fELzChRVGspIopLTQxO%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D10352ef1-6cd3-4e83-87e8-baa783b3c85d&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=352ef0b5&sv=2)

**Suspected Insider:** Multiple position holders share the same creation time, funding source and transfer time

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FF8Aq5L3ivU3zmV7Ug1Ny%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D394cb4a9-8bcf-4baf-aa67-3f538f336c5f&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=2eb36f0b&sv=2)

**Insider:** Wallet who has insider information and owns token earlier

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fc2qnOMqCUb03RAE1daci%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D17af06c7-a634-4ea7-84ae-4b31996fdafc&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=e2677303&sv=2)

**Suspected phishing wallet:** Token transfer detected

1.  Many phishing-tagged wallets from one token source spread tokens. This fakes a wide range of holders
    
2.  Shady devs airdrop tokens to KOLs/famous wallets, fooling retail into thinking they bought in. phishing icon will warn you
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FIYz2v5ha3rSP4G1q9Z2v%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc819d767-83d4-46c3-b0f6-ae480337d380&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=87027a1d&sv=2)

**Bundled Tx Wallet:** A single account combines multiple wallets' txs into one tx bundle, processed in the same block. This tx is one of the bundled txs

![Transaction value greater than $10k](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F9kJafAfsw09nUbUsNjoM%252FSnipaste_2024-07-31_04-35-36.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D3f00d32a-f716-4df4-9358-719e4a1be340&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6f1908cf&sv=2)

# MEME | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/meme.md)
.

**1.What is Pump.fun?**

Pumpfun is a famous MEME token fair-launch platform with no presale and no team allocation.

**2.What is Pump Inner Trading Process?**

In one sentence, pumpfun has productized what the Meme project aims to achieve, providing a comprehensive service from token name and logo to liquidity and liquidity burning.

After successfully deploying a Meme token on pump.fun, once the token market cap reaches $69,000, the liquidity of pump.fun will be automatically added to Raydium.

**3.Why Trade Tokens on Pump.fun?**

Participating early in the token's early stages can result in higher gains, but also comes with higher risks. The token price can fluctuate sharply, requiring careful monitoring and quick trading.

**4.What Services Can GMGN Provide?**

GMGN's website and TGBOT both support trading on the Pump Inner Market and provide essential data for trading Pump, offering you more data to support playing with Pump.

**5.Visit Pumpfun Trending Channel**

Use various criteria to filter out high-quality Pump tokens👇🏻:

[![Logo](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgmgn.ai%2Fstatic%2Ffavicon2.ico&width=20&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=3e47fbfa&sv=2)GMGN.AI | The Fastest Multi-Chain Meme Trading Terminalgmgn](https://gmgn.ai/?chain=sol&ref=Spencer)

6.**What is Moonshot?**

Seen as a competitor to Pump.fun, their functions and operational processes are basically the same

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/meme#meme-page-overview)

MEME Page Overview:


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FcE2edikvYwBQQENcyfGE%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7e902649-6b19-468e-8150-7b64e4cda1d2&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=7603580b&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F4EEYd24eWgdnpJxzUaMf%252FSnipaste_2024-07-29_22-42-41.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df1a5aef2-33f3-4da1-8c9e-d0c9dbc35263&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=98d06d5c&sv=2)

**Unique fair launch token mechanism on Pump.fun:** There is two process of token launching on pumpfun - Trading on Pump and trading on Raydium. The swapping process is no different from normal tokens. The only distinction is that after the Pump inner market is fully filled, there is a waiting period before liquidity is added to Raydium automatically, ranging from 10 minutes to around an hour.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FzCYLsb3uDHPp1nGDFtS2%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D212faf05-36c2-4956-adc0-bec57af055ab&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=5477acec&sv=2)

**Pump.fun Filled Complete Alerts via GMGN MEME coin tools：** If you're on the go and cannot monitor the market via the GMGN web dashboard, GMGN also offers a Pump Max-Out Alert Bot. Through Telegram, you can receive real-time alerts when a pool is filled and when secondary markets open, then jump in with a one-tap trade link.

You can also use the GMGN App to track these Pump tokens on mobile — enable push notifications, watch price and volume in real time, and place the same trades directly from the token detail screen with a single tap.

[![Logo](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftelegram.org%2Fimg%2Fapple-touch-icon.png&width=20&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c3e5dfa1&sv=2)Portal for Pump Alert Channel - GMGNTelegram](https://t.me/pump_sol_alert)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FctI6BETwbFpAKgqK4DTG%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D37c5cbec-da5f-4421-8c10-9f3d4caa3cfd&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c9d2bbc0&sv=2)

# Q＆A | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/q-a.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/q-a#q-how-to-query-token-ca-smart-money-walllet-informations-within-your-tg-group)

Q1: How to Filter the Right Quality Meme at GMGN


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) Many newfish aren't clear about how to screen the right tokens, and will only look for popular coins, but usually the price of popular coins are high, they have passed the early growth stage, It's a risky time to buy. Behind the question of how to filter high-quality meme is that you don't know how to judge the signals conveyed by various indicators of a meme through the data provided by GMGN, resulting in the inability to select a portion of the meme that you think has potential and is safer. 2) Initially you can focus on the security of a meme first, and it is recommended that you should check out these pages: [⚡How to become a Degen](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/how-to-become-a-degen)
 [🎯Insider Traders,Snipers,First 70 Buyers](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/insider-traders-snipers-first-70-buyers)
 [🆗CA Security Checks](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/ca-security-checks)
 3) You can choose to follow the smart money before forming your own meme trading system: GMGN has big data on smart money, after follow smart money, you can receive real-time trading dynamics of smart money. Especially with the release of the new meme coin,there is a concentrated entry of smart money. details： [💰Track Smart Money](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/track-smart-money)
 4) GMGN can only provide you with data, this article is not as investment advice, specific meme selection ideas, trading strategies; Position selection and so on need to be gradually improved after you get started.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/q-a#q2-jin-fang-jia-mao-guan-li-si-xin-guan-li-yuan-yong-yuan-bu-hui-zhu-dong-si-xin-ni)

Q2: Beware of fake adminis private messages. GMGN group admins will never DM you private messages first.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) Recently, many users have been sent private messages by scammers pretending to be administrators, claiming to solve problems. Users sent private keys to them or clicked on fraudulent links, which led to the theft of their wallets. We would like to remind all users to be careful. GMGN official administrators will never take the initiative to send private messages to anyone, nor will they ask you for private keys. 2) Case of fraudulent account disguised management: hide the user name (user name area), write the real administrator's username in the introduction to confuse users, and commit fraud. The picture shows a fraudulent account. Please be careful to distinguish and do not trust anyone who takes the initiative to send you private messages.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FL8Io8Fhi0hSGIkHQkGla%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D730f6f51-be0e-474d-b660-74e70c76b946&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c7e50d9&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/q-a#q3-how-to-open-the-browser-console-to-assist-gmgn-in-resolving-your-issue)

Q3: How to Open the Browser Console to Assist GMGN in Resolving Your Issue


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step 1: Record the Issue

*   Take a full-screen screenshot of the problem, preferably record a video.
    

Step 2: Open Console and Take Screenshots

*   Right-click a blank area of the webpage in the browser, select “Inspect.” It will automatically open Developer Tools; click “Console”
    
*   Drag the Console area larger, and look for red error messages (marked red or labeled “Error”)
    
*   Take screenshots including all red errors, yellow warnings, prioritizing the earliest error, and capture as much content as possible
    

Step 3: Contact Support

*   Send the screenshots to customer support, or DM the official Twitter account.
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FxTtn84NyWL6e51FJYpLl%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De378fe3d-0882-4d00-a9a8-24ebaee6df0c&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=40a99956&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/q-a#q4-webpage-no-sound-issue)

Q4: Webpage No Sound Issue


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you've already checked the Chrome webpage sound toggle, GMGN notification settings, and the notification sound switches for various functions in the bottom left corner of the GMGN webpage, but there’s still no sound, you can follow these steps to resolve the issue:

*   Go to Browser Settings: Settings / Privacy and Security / Site Settings / Additional Content Settings / Sound
    
*   Click the "Add" button next to "Allow to play sound," enter gmgn.ai and confirm.
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Ffi0c95R8dgngQptd2HW1%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D569d3aa1-3531-4249-bb97-ead36dc4db6b&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=9787c2f&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/q-a#q5-the-wallet-was-stolen-or-the-balance-of-the-wallet-was-emptied)

Q5: The wallet was stolen or the balance of the wallet was emptied


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Common situation: 1) Whether Android phone, it has clicked an unknown link before, resulting in a Trojan horse or malicious program in the mobile phone/computer. 2) Whether Telegram app is downloaded through official sources; whether third-party Telegram Translator plugin from unknown sources is downloaded. 3) Whether Telegram has authorized an unfamiliar fake bot and the balance in the wallet has been transferred by the scam bot by entering a cell phone number or clicking on a scam link, and it is recommended to identify the same through multiple official GMGN channels before making transactions. 4) The wallet has authorized the scam app, you can enter the wallet to query the authorization list and cancel the unknown authorization. _e.g: some scammers use NFT mint places to win prizes and attract you to sign authorization on the website._ 5) If you need to import or export the private key, it is recommended to partially copy and partially manually enter it to reduce the risk of theft due to Trojan reading the clipboard. ⚠️GMGN's first purpose is security, there is no loophole that leads to the transfer of wallet balances, and in case of theft, please check yourself according to the above-listed situations. GMGN does not perform any operations on the user's wallet, and we do not have the ability to transfer any user's wallet balance. We fully understand the feelings of being stolen, the reason for theft is basically the above mentioned: equipment security problems, the use of fake fraud bot, tg abnormal authorization, etc. These are GMGN official can not control, at present we can only give you some self-checking advice, and tell how to reduce the subsequent risk. Suggest to check: [OKX Web3 ＆ SlowMist: Experience Sharing of "Hundreds of Scams"](https://www.theblockbeats.info/en/news/53517)
 We suggest that stolen users fill out [the Slow Mist Security Team's Stolen Application Form](https://aml.slowmist.com/recovery-funds.html)
, which allows you to track the hacker's address and try to recover funds.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/q-a#q-how-to-query-token-ca-smart-money-walllet-informations-within-your-tg-group-1)

Q6: Why did you not receive SOL after selling or SOL became WSOL?


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) It may be because your slippage and priority fee are set too high, and the principal is less, resulting in actual losses after selling, mistakenly thinking that SOL has not received, and the SOL balance in the wallet has not increased. eg: Someone sold a total of 0.12SOL, but gave a priority fee of 0.2SOL and asked us why he did not receive SOL 2) It's possible that because you have WSOL in your wallet, the SOL will automatically be converted to WSOL when you sell it; Due to the SOL chain mechanism problem, you may receive WSOL instead of SOL at transaction settlement. GMGN has now launched the exchange WSOL → SOL function, welcome to experience.

Specific steps: Enter /start in our bot @GMGN\_sol\_bot, click the wallet, click Exchange WSOL → SOL to quickly exchange the received WSOL to SOL

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FezNKJH0FgP7wnup6hdWr%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D63290a03-6852-453b-9974-e08b9c899e0a&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c4e7c93f&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/q-a#q7-can-not-follow-the-wallet-or-no-data-on-the-follow-page-how-to-solve-it)

Q7：Can not follow the wallet or no data on the follow page, how to solve it


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) Logout and re-sign, connect to the wallet and see if it is solved. 2) If there is still no data, clean up the webpage cookie can be solved. Take google chrome as an example: Settings--Privacy and security--Third-party cookies--See all site data and permissions--Clean up gmgn data.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F1NwNPL0JBOq8xMlmnJGX%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D3c23f611-4922-4c39-8813-66e53a65f1f5&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=aeb95d6e&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/q-a#q-how-to-query-token-ca-smart-money-walllet-informations-within-your-tg-group-2)

Q8: How to use GMGN API?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) Trading API please check: [🤝🏻 Cooperation-API:📈Integrate GMGN price chart](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-price-chart)
 [🤝🏻 Cooperation-API:🕹Integrate GMGN Solana Trading API](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-solana-trading-api)
 2) Data API：GMGN is no plan to open data API at present, but we will open the data crawling IP whitelist for trading users.What we care about is whether you have brought us: Transaction Volume/User volume. You must at least satisfy one of them, Otherwise the application will not be approved. details： [🤝🏻 Cooperation-API: 🔄Access data API](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-data-crawling-ip-whitelist)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/q-a#q9-how-to-use-the-contract-query-bot-smart-money-tracking-bot-in-gmgn-official-group)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1）Join GMGN official group:[https://t.me/gmgnai](https://t.me/gmgnai)
 2）Now you can use Contract Query bot in it: 3）Copy CA or SM Walllet address and send it to group.The robot will reply with details. Click [here](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-tg-alert-channel-bot#id-1.use-the-bot-in-the-gmgn-degen-group-official)
 for detailed tutorials

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 2）Invite @GMGNAI\_bot into your group（p2） **ps:**_step1)＆2)You can use this step instead. Click here to invite the bot to the group immediately:_[_https://t.me/GMGNAI\_bot?startgroup=true_](https://t.me/GMGNAI_bot?startgroup=true)

 for detailed tutorials

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FpfPZMtFmZwuZAPKhN4gu%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D6c428edc-f152-41b0-8a92-ac86f0f90bb0&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=192d90e0&sv=2)

[CA Security Check](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/ca-security-checks)

*   We have a Trending page for you to see the top tokens that people are buying and selling
    
*   We offer multiple options for you to filter and sort by, just like the NEW PAIR page. Additionally, you can select different time intervals (1 minute/ 5 minutes/ 30 minutes/ 1 hour) to see tokens that have been trending across those time frames
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fa2lqVkl0ZFa2drxrpCZc%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1f66d6ae-c5b8-4aa8-813f-103fb6c69a90&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c393645c&sv=2)

*   In this section on the left, you can click on the little star to add it to the watch list;
    
*   You'll see how popular it is as well as the number of fires;
    
*   You'll see if it has a CTO after its logo appears, and if the emoji of two people appears yellow;
    
*   You'll see if it has an AD activated in Dexscreener;
    
*   You'll see if the network is updated in Dexscreener and its own network as well as in the contract.
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trending#nextbc)

NextBC


----------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FCrI2sKkGraXrKWWXU3uq%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D98f86942-5fd1-419f-b665-92bb2e237696&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=d7eda663&sv=2)

*   Blue Chip tokens: Blue chip tokens refer to tokens on each chain that have been verified and recognized by the market, have high value, and will not easily return to zero, such as sol chain neiro, popcat
    
*   Blue Chip Holders: holders who own certain blue chip tokens
    
*   Blue Chip index: The blue chip index refers to the proportion of holders of the token who also own blue chip tokens.
    
*   Meaning of Blue Chip Index: In a token, the more holders of blue chip tokens, that is, the higher the blue chip index, the more optimistic the blue chip holders are about this coin, and the more likely this coin is to become the next high-value blue chip token.

[CA Security Check](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/ca-security-checks)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FZCZZPDDNgPOwGs235dbj%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De4317d98-a028-4133-ad5b-8e8918215824&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=2599aa7f&sv=2)

MintDisable

"Yes" indicates safety, meaning that the token creator cannot issue additional tokens to manipulate the market

Blacklist

"No" indicates safety, meaning that the project cannot blacklist any wallet's transactions, reducing the risk of financial entrapment "Yes" means you are on the blacklist of this token developer, you cannot sell this token, it will remind you that your wallet is frozen

Burnt

Displaying the burn pool percentage: the higher the ratio, the better, with 100% indicating that the project cannot withdraw from the liquidity pool

Top 10

"Yes" indicates a relatively safe condition, meaning that the total holdings of the top 10 token holders are less than 30% of the total supply

Insiders

Wallets that did not buy tokens after trading opened, but hold tokens, may indicate that the token creator's holdings were transferred to multiple wallets to secretly sell off. Typically, legitimate projects distribute these through airdrops to users, and it is necessary to check the official Twitter for any airdrop events

# Safety Tip | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/safety-tip.md)
.

This article will introduce common hacker phishing methods and how to set up security in web plug-in wallets and GMGN TG wallets to prevent theft.

**In the dark forest world of blockchain, first keep in mind the following two major security rules:**

*   **Zero Trust** Simply put, it means to be skeptical, and always be skeptical of any platform, robot, plug-in wallet authorization signature, etc. that requires the input of a private key
    
*   **Continuous Security Validation** In order to trust something, you have to validate what you doubt, and make validating a habit.
    

1.  [Stolen: Common phishing and attack methods used by hackers](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/QPvrIv5rRiWBRIdXmPYO/an-quan-ti-shi#id-1.-bei-dao-chang-jian-hei-ke-diao-yu-yi-ji-gong-ji-shou-duan)
    
2.  [Anti-Stolen: Take precautions in plugin wallets and TG wallets](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/QPvrIv5rRiWBRIdXmPYO/an-quan-ti-shi#id-2.-fang-dao-zai-cha-jian-qian-bao-yi-ji-tg-qian-bao-zhong-zuo-hao-yu-fang)
    
3.  [Equipment Security](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/QPvrIv5rRiWBRIdXmPYO/an-quan-ti-shi#id-3.-she-bei-an-quan)
    
4.  [What to do if assets stolen](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/QPvrIv5rRiWBRIdXmPYO/an-quan-ti-shi#id-4.-bei-dao-le-zen-me-ban)
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/safety-tip#id-1.-bei-dao-chang-jian-hei-ke-diao-yu-yi-ji-gong-ji-shou-duan)

1\. Stolen: Common phishing and attack methods used by hackers

**Scams in TG:**

1) Please remember that the official admins will not send you a private message first!!! Scammers pretend to be GMGN admins to send fraudulent messages to defraud private keys or steal TG accounts!

*   Common situation: You send a message in the group, and the scammer asks you to cooperate under the pretext of helping you solve the problem, which eventually leads to theft. Some scammers will hide the user name and fill in the real admin's linl in the bio, which is very confusing and can easily lead the stolen user to think it is an official scam!
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FIrqWVcGnqOAhbRJ9Okwh%252FSnipaste_2024-12-22_07-04-30.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D11707920-0fc4-4cc1-96d7-9890d1bce746&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=414dcec3&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FTwv2D1UHZexBlrlMNSpZ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df60c9601-8512-4b21-b261-159326f71621&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=9ea3765f&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FZMxTpih09OquKvg4Jtg7%252FSnipaste_2024-12-22_07-09-53.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D5b4db85f-b80a-4b5f-aff8-adbfd4629f01&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=bb80ccf0&sv=2)

2) Do not click on any ads that appear above the GMGN bot! These are scammers who may steal your wallet! The GMGN official bot will never ask for your wallet's private key first!

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FiLVH0DBabZapQaiyWPfl%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc6bb628d-2a20-420d-a7d2-c45fb5c46b5d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f53979a0&sv=2)

3) In some token TG groups or links sent by scammers, there will be such so-called "security verification". Please do not click it! Do not enter any of your account information, including mobile phone number, password, etc.!

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FgFNJiaTqbuc19wQiEwvL%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D788a00d1-f876-4170-8229-c908112d8988&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=7c82be57&sv=2)

4) The scammer copied a GMGN fake group, pulled you into the group, and posted a fraudulent link in the fake group to defraud the private key! Because there are a lot of robots in the group, it looks like there are a lot of people, and they will copy the real group messages, which can easily be mistaken for the official group. Please confirm whether it is a real group through the official GMGN Twitter! ! [https://x.com/gmgnai](https://x.com/gmgnai)

*   It is recommended that users check the "Do not allow anyone" option in "Privacy and Security - Groups and Channels". This will not allow anyone to add you to unfamiliar groups and channels, which can effectively prevent you from being pulled into fraudulent groups.
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FrePqyTXQXvUsZliBYqtj%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D2fbaf8cc-4d90-40f1-8ce0-36153b6a7b78&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=da785a2e&sv=2)

5) The scammer pretends to be an official Telegram admin and sends you a message. The scam words are as shown in the picture, and they guide you to click on the scam link. Please do not click it! ! Just report and block it!

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252F3y9LwRWu2nziPI9e0VIy%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Db2410b8a-5499-4977-ae0d-76b3782dfb3c&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=ba28aaa5&sv=2)

**Scams in Web3 plugin wallets:**

1) The most important safety principle to be followed in signature security is: what you see is what you sign. Therefore, you need to regularly check whether the wallet has authorized unfamiliar applications that you are not familiar with. Please enter the wallet to check the authorization list and cancel unknown authorizations!

*   Airdrop scam: The attackers airdropped NFTs to users in batches (Figure 1). Users entered the target website through the link in the description of the airdropped NFT and connected their wallets (Figure 2). After they clicked the "Mint" button on the page, the approval window popped up (Figure 3). Note that there was no special notification or message in the pop up window at this time. Once they approved, all SOLs in the wallet would be transferred away
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FEn40cyaTiWhIYJajYefT%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Da75ecd5b-c27b-4a43-b4cb-75a7bc60b7f5&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=227aa0a9&sv=2)

2) Unknown transfers: Sometimes you will receive small amounts of unknown transfers in your wallet. Most of them are related to advertisements or scams. Don’t be curious. It will not affect the normal operation of your wallet. Don’t worry too much

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FEhlnQMynstZG9SePnruI%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df1e0e5fc-d68e-4f95-b6a0-339b09daa881&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=fe29ce09&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/safety-tip#id-2.-fang-dao-zai-cha-jian-qian-bao-yi-ji-tg-qian-bao-zhong-zuo-hao-yu-fang)

2\. Anti-stolen: Take precautions in plugin wallets and TG wallets

**Telegram Security Precautions:**

1) It is recommended that users who are not so familiar with "TG Privacy and Security" follow the following settings, especially remember to turn on the items marked in red in the picture, which can effectively ensure the security of your TG account

*   Two-step verification: After it is turned on, even if a hacker gets your phone number and password, when logging in on a new device, you still need to enter a separate password after entering the SMS verification code, fully ensuring security
    
*   Phone number: Prevent hackers from directly obtaining your mobile phone number and sending you fraudulent text messages or other fraudulent activities
    
*   Groups ＆ channels: Stolen 4) has relevant examples, which can effectively prevent being pulled into fraudulent groups
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FUYCQwbx4tC03jtBqWyDn%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D31dcadd7-601d-4622-a93e-7a84f7f9239d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=750f3eb7&sv=2)

2) Confirm whether your Telegram app is installed through the official channel

3) Check whether Telegram has authorized a strange fake bot to avoid the balance in the wallet being transferred by a fraud bot due to entering a mobile phone number or clicking a fraud link. It is recommended to verify the consistency through multiple GMGN official channels before making a transaction

**Web3 plugin wallet:**

1) Enter the web3 plug-in wallet to query the authorization list, cancel unknown authorization, and confirm that the authorized applications are the corresponding official applications

2) Turn on Auto-Lock timer to prevent others from seeing your private key when the device is away from you

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FOe8lV74veC45BxsV6HbN%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De3d28573-fa9f-419c-8de5-f33693ffbe05&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=86af8f30&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FkWP2ACwz3vkosQmdHHxV%252FSnipaste_2024-12-22_07-28-05.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D01012730-f09a-4554-ab2a-8d52f1b4fc5b&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=99be7f71&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/safety-tip#id-3.-she-bei-an-quan)

3\. Equipment Security

1) If your device is an Android phone/Windows computer/non-iPad tablet, please be careful not to click on unknown links or download unknown applications to avoid Trojans or malicious programs in your phone/computer, and regularly use security software to check the device, eliminate viruses, and prevent risks

2) If your device is an Apple device, there are still some fraudulent apps in the app store and in test software that has not been officially launched. You need to be careful

3) Security principles:

*   For all the knowledge from the Internet, refer to at least two sources, corroborate each other, and always stay skeptical
    
*   Segregate. Don't put all the eggs in one basket
    
*   For wallets with important assets, don't do unnecessary updates
    
*   What you see is what you sign. You need to be aware of what you are signing, and of the expected result after the signed transaction is sent out. Don't do things that will make you regret afterwards
    
*   Pay attention to system security updates. Apply them as soon as they are available
    
*   Don't download ＆ install programs recklessly can actually prevent most risks
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/safety-tip#id-4.-bei-dao-le-zen-me-ban)

4\. What to do if assets stolen

Almost all Web3 users have been stolen in their web3 journey. We recommend that users whose funds have been stolen fill out [the SlowMist Security Team's stolen application form](https://aml.slowmist.com/recovery-funds.html)
 , which can track the hacker's address and try to recover the funds

1) Stop loss first Stop loss is about limiting your loss. It can be broken down to at least two phases:

*   The Immediate Action Phase. Act immediately! If you see hackers are transferring your assets, think no more. Just Hurry up and transfer the remaining assets to a safe place. If you have experience in front running trades, just grab and run. Depending on the type of asset, if you can freeze your assets on the blockchain, do it as soon as possible; if you can do on-chain analysis and find your assets are transferred into a centralized exchange, you can contact their risk control department
    
*   The Post-Action Phase. Once the situation is stabilized, your focus should be on making sure there would not be secondary or tertiary attacks
    

2) Protect the scene When you find that something is wrong, stay calm and take a deep breath. Do remember to protect the scene. Here are a few suggestions:

*   If the accident happens on a computer, server or other devices connected to the Internet, disconnect the network immediately while keeping the devices on with power supply
    
*   Unless you are capable of handling this by yourself, waiting for security professionals to step in for analysis is always the better choice
    

3) Analyze the causes

*   The purpose of analyzing the cause is to understand how the assets were stolen: private key theft/TG account theft/device hacking, etc.
    
*   For example, at least clarify the following points:
    
    *   Summary 1: Who was involved, when did this happen , what has happened, and how much was the total loss?
        
    *   Summary 2: The wallet addresses related to the loss, the wallet address of the hacker, the type of the coin, the quantity of the coin. It could be much clearer with the help of just a single table
        
    

4) Fill out the SlowMist Security Team Theft Application Form

It is recommended that the stolen users fill out [the SlowMist Security Team's stolen application form](https://aml.slowmist.com/recovery-funds.html)
 , which will restrict hackers and related addresses from depositing and withdrawing funds from CEX, and track the hacker's address to try to recover the funds

⚠️GMGN's first purpose is security, there is no loophole that leads to the transfer of wallet balances, and in case of theft, please check yourself according to the above-listed situations. GMGN does not perform any operations on the user's wallet, and we do not have the ability to transfer any user's wallet balance.

[PreviousQ＆A](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/q-a)
[NextMEME](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/meme)

Last updated 10 months ago

*   [2\. Anti-stolen: Take precautions in plugin wallets and TG wallets](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/safety-tip#id-2.-fang-dao-zai-cha-jian-qian-bao-yi-ji-tg-qian-bao-zhong-zuo-hao-yu-fang)

# Wallet detail page | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-detail-page.md)
.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F4gcQzDnykvfkBWnqTuF9%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D38b894b1-c96f-4876-9df0-63338c0b54df&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=660effb5&sv=2)

**Upper functional modules:**

*   Click the button next to the wallet name to make a note of the wallet name
    
*   Click the button next to the contract address to copy the CA or jump to solscan.io to query wallet activities
    
*   Click on the tweet to jump to the wallet address of the wallet owner
    
*   Click on Wallet Copy to copy the transactions of that wallet. For details, please see: [Wallet Copy Trade: Copy Smart Money, automatically earn SOL!](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/copy-trade-copy-smart-money-automatically-earn-sol)
    
*   After you tap **Follow**, the wallet will be added to your tracked list. You can review all of its activity on the **Wallet Tracker** page (bottom _Wallet Tracker_ tab on Web) and connect the **0-Delay Bot** to receive real-time trade alerts for this wallet.
    
*   In the **GMGN App**, go to the bottom **Track** tab, then switch to the top **Follow** tab to see all wallets you follow. Switch to the **Activity** tab to view their latest buy/sell actions. Turn on app notifications to receive push alerts whenever these tracked wallets place new trades.
    

**Recent 7D/30D profit and loss/win rate:**

*   View the wallet's recent D profit and loss ratio and fund profit and loss amount
    
*   Check the current win rate and balance of the wallet
    

**PNL:**

7D TXS

7D/30D transcations numbers：Bought is green/ Sale is red

Totnl PNL

Total profit and loss

Unrealized Profits

The current unsold value of the tokens in this wallet

7D/30D AVG Duration

7D/30D average holding time

7D/30D Total Cost

Total cost of buying tokens in the last 7 days/30 days

7D/30D Token Avg Cost

In the last 7 days/30 days. The total cost of buying tokens divided by the number of tokens bought

7D/30D Token Avg Realized Profits

Average realized profit of each ghostwriter’s sold portion in the last 7 days/30 days (excluding unrealized profit)

**Distribution:**

*   You can see the increase or decrease of the amount and quantity of tokens purchased by the wallet in the last 7 days/30 days.
    

**Phishing check:**

Blacklist

The wallet bought the number of blacklist/ honeypot tokens. If it is too much, it may be a phishing wallet of the cabal team

Didn’t buy:

The number of non-bought tokens in the wallet can be used to analyze how many tokens are transferred from other wallets, thereby analyzing the wallet attributes

Sold > Bought

The number of tokens sold by this wallet is greater than the number of tokens bought

Buy/Sell within 10 secs

The number of tokens that complete buy/sell transactions within ten seconds. This may be a bot or a wallet that farm copy trade users

[PreviousALERT: Sniper New, Following, Limit Orders](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/alert-sniper-new-following-limit-orders)
[NextToken page: Chart - multicharts, Activity, Trading system](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system)

# ALERT: Sniper New, Following, Limit Orders | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/alert-sniper-new-following-limit-orders.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/alert-sniper-new-following-limit-orders#id-1.-sniper-new)

1\. Sniper New:


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/alert-sniper-new-following-limit-orders#web-signal-page-bottom-signal-tab)

Web – Signal page (bottom “Signal” tab)

From the bottom **Signal** tab you can open the Signal page and see multiple types of market signals, including:

*   **Dex Paid** signals – Dex Paid Ad, Dex Boost Paid, Dex Bar Paid, Update Social, etc.
    
*   **Price Alert** – Price Up, ATH, Key MC and other price-based triggers
    
*   **Other Signals** – Pump Live, CTO and more special events
    

You can filter by **Age**, **MC** and **Total Fees**, and quickly sort for tokens with strong moves and high attention

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/alert-sniper-new-following-limit-orders#gmgn-app-ai-signal)

GMGN App – AI Signal

In the GMGN App, go to the bottom **Monitor** tab and switch to the top **AI Signal** tab to:

*   View AI-curated, high-quality token signals
    
*   Tap a signal to open the **Token Detail** page for deeper analysis and instant **Buy** execution
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/alert-sniper-new-following-limit-orders#id-2.-wallet-tracker)

2\. **Wallet Tracker**:


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Web – Wallet Tracker**

On the **Wallet Tracker** page (bottom **Wallet Tracker** tab), you can see all activity from the wallets you track, turn on GMGN web notifications, and connect the **0-Delay Bot** to receive real-time trade alerts for these wallets

**GMGN App – Wallet tracking**

In the GMGN App:

*   Go to the bottom **Track** tab
    
*   Switch to the top **Track** tab to view the list of wallets you are tracking
    
*   Switch to the **Wallet Tracker** tab to see their latest buy/sell actions
    
*   Turn on app notifications to receive push alerts whenever these tracked wallets make new trades
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FPGobtOItSYyCPXeO8rJe%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D2f1a2a58-f2cf-4968-bd93-173e259b8a18&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=b011beea&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/alert-sniper-new-following-limit-orders#id-3.-order-management)

**3\. Order Management:**


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Web – Orders on the token page**

There is no standalone “Open Orders” page anymore. On Web, open any **token detail** page and switch to the bottom **Orders** tab. Here you can view and manage all of your orders for this token, including **Limit**, **Auto Trading**, **Migrated Snipe**, **Sell on Dev Sell**, **Buy on Dev Sell** and **Advanced** strategies.

**GMGN App – Orders under Assets**

In the GMGN App:

*   Go to the bottom **Assets** tab
    
*   In the wallet header, switch to the **Order** tab
    
*   Inside **Order**, you can toggle between **Advanced**, **Limit**, **Auto Trading**, **Dev Sell**, etc., view details of each order and use **Close All Orders** to manage them in one tap
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FI8dMUHChqFc280ohhdS3%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1dfd3c6a-eeed-42ad-b3ed-49f37c70ddb4&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=b5aed2db&sv=2)

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/alert-sniper-new-following-limit-orders#disclaimer-please-check-token-security-audit-before-trading)

⚠️ Disclaimer: Please check token security audit before trading!

. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/follow-monitor-square-follow-watchlist.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/follow-monitor-square-follow-watchlist#follow-page-overview)

FOLLOW Page Overview


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FJPXIhvYnRriPr8RYxBiK%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D6b9f230b-6a53-466e-8149-f4005bdd8455&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ece85fb8&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/follow-monitor-square-follow-watchlist#id-1.-monitor-square)

1\. Monitor Square


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fc6RNMK1w3sWLeTFKchRO%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dea3df868-f4ff-4aa1-a90f-ed6227230d54&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=2b891bd9&sv=2)

GMGN Monitor Square allows you to view the all inflow of funds in all your followed wallets, helping you to catch the GEM in time

*   You can freely choose the follow inflow time range 1m/5m/1h/6h/24h
    
*   You can see various data of tokens, including MCap, transaction volume, social media and other information
    
*   Click the icon in the lower left corner could hides the tokens you are not interested in.
    
*   You can buy with one click by using the Quick Buy button in the lower right corner
    
*   The list on the left can also directly view the ollowing inflow information
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/follow-monitor-square-follow-watchlist#id-2.-follow)

2\. Follow


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FvpszIRxOqBA8fJWmI0ED%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D26078afe-7884-4dad-ab7e-8e8197edc306&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=95b94cb3&sv=2)

*   Click on the red area to automatically redirect to the Telegram page and follow the official GMGN signal bot
    
*   Click on the wallet address to view the wallet details page you are interested in: [Wallet detail page](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-detail-page)
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/follow-monitor-square-follow-watchlist#id-3.-watchlist)

**3\. Watchlist**


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FRSPxfICZZCpggIlLR8BJ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dd03655b6-c2df-41bb-8019-82364be2fdd3&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f12e03fa&sv=2)

*   Supports grouping your collect tokens, click the little star to the left of the token to add the token to your custom grouping list
    

**Token Notes / Renames**

**Web**

On Web, click the **edit** icon next to a token name to add or edit a note. Token notes are now supported across all major token lists and pages.

**H5 (mobile web)**

On the **Trenches** page in mobile web, you can also tap the edit icon next to a token to add a note, so you can tag tokens directly in your browser.

**GMGN App**

In the GMGN App, go to the bottom **Discover** tab and open the **Favorites** list. Long-press any token to rename it or add a custom note, making it easier to label and manage your key tokens on mobile.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FmfaA87IgGKwPMT8itA8A%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D5e334e73-9fe4-462d-9ea2-367dd57dfad2&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a2d98e19&sv=2)

*   Click to view your favorite token transaction details page: [Token page: Chart - multicharts, Activity, Trading system](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system)

# Cooking | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooking.md)
.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FNDJTSSgGfPgnPRmgkcTj%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D8c616ece-0cda-4cf2-b36b-a5eafbe10443&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f1866226&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooking#tui-te-gua-dao-shuo-ming)

Cooking Instructions:

*   Use the GMGN Cooking function to quickly launch your token. GMGN charges 0 token launch fees！！！
    
*   Multiple ways to quickly issue tokens: Top cooking icon, Token re-launch, X Tracker cooking, Cooking via part of a tweet
    
    ![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FTwN4jt0gupwMeZZdZ3gF%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D52013b89-d2db-4da7-b34a-129fc2af60a4&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a734adb8&sv=2)
    
*   Optional launchpads: Bonk, Pump
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FLkTTguuEwOW65KgZY4Le%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D04feb2e8-806f-409e-9330-59f182290a1d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6544ed29&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooking#cooking-settings)

Cooking Settings：

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooking#id-1-choose-lunchpad)

1）Choose Lunchpad:

*   Offering Bonk and Pump; you can freely choose one for the cooking
    

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooking#id-2-select-image)

2）Select Image:

*   Supports custom token image upload
    
*   when you use Token re-launch or Cooking via part of a tweet. It will automatically fetch the image and use it as an option
    

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooking#id-3-ticker-and-coin-name)

3) Ticker and Coin Name

*   "Ticker" refers to the abbreviated symbol or shorthand for a token or cryptocurrency
    

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooking#id-4-social-media-link)

4）Social media link

*   Fill in your token's social media links, supporting X, Website, Telegram community links
    

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooking#id-5-dev-wallet-and-buy-token)

5) Dev Wallet and Buy Token

*   Select a single wallet as the dev wallet address for the token
    
*   Purchase at least 0.1 SOL and please reserve a portion of your balance for the launch fee on this launchpad. GMGN does not charge any cooking fee

# 🤝🏻 Cooperation-API:📈Integrate GMGN price chart | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-price-chart.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-price-chart#feel-free-to-integrate-gmgn-instant-price-chart-on-your-project-website)

Feel free to integrate GMGN instant price chart on your project website.


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Emble Format:**

Copy

    <https://www.gmgn.cc/kline/{chain}/>{token CA}

**Sample Tokens:**

1\. Solana

[https://www.gmgn.cc/kline/sol/ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82](https://www.gmgn.cc/kline/sol/ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82)

2\. ETH

[https://www.gmgn.cc/kline/eth/0x6982508145454ce325ddbe47a25d4ec3d2311933](https://www.gmgn.cc/kline/eth/0x6982508145454ce325ddbe47a25d4ec3d2311933)

3\. BSC

[https://www.gmgn.cc/kline/bsc/0xb0fea7be600c85e2f4fe90821f304bc1578d4444](https://www.gmgn.cc/kline/bsc/0xb0fea7be600c85e2f4fe90821f304bc1578d4444)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fj1U28DxCRfxnNYwWwRTr%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1e6eb6da-4e83-464b-8658-fa37331d45d6&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=de6243fc&sv=2)

*   Embedded chart update: add url parameters to switch themes, time interval
    
    *   theme: "light"、"dark" sample tokens: [https://www.gmgn.cc/kline/sol/ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82?theme=light](https://www.gmgn.cc/kline/sol/ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82?theme=light)
        
    *   interval: "1S", "1", "5", "15", "60", "240", "720", "1D", sample tokens: [https://www.gmgn.cc/kline/sol/ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82?interval=15](https://www.gmgn.cc/kline/sol/ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82?interval=15)

# Trenches Hotkeys | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trenches-hotkeys.md)
.

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trenches-hotkeys#i.-enable-hotkeys)

I. Enable Hotkeys

Locate the keyboard icon in the Trenches and click it to enter the hotkey settings panel

*   Enable Hotkeys: Once enabled, you can perform various hotkey operations. When active, the keyboard icon will highlight in green
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FDVT2J0PjnhIJS6Rmom2R%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D3edd0ccd-04d0-4b30-b25e-2009b6dd8cbc&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c001904c&sv=2)

* * *

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trenches-hotkeys#ii.-basic-auxiliary-features-market-monitoring-tools)

II. Basic Auxiliary Features (Market Monitoring Tools)

In the hotkey settings panel, you can first configure the following features to boost your on-chain scanning, monitoring, and research efficiency:

*   **Pause live feed on Hover**: When you hover your mouse over a specific token column, the live feed for that column will automatically pause, allowing you to clearly view the token details
    
*   **Enable X Preview**: Mouse hover on token + X Preview Key (default `X`). Press it to quickly browse the token's Twitter info without leaving the current page
    
*   **Enable Web Preview**: Mouse hover on token + Web Preview Key (default `V`). Press it to bring up the token's website info popup 🔥 Core Highlight: If the token is linked to a YouTube, TikTok, or Instagram URL, the popup will directly parse and automatically play the video!
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FewcFF5ljF1qbEAfrjMGC%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De36019aa-40cb-46d6-b2ae-2512fe00228f&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a8e30c48&sv=2)

* * *

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trenches-hotkeys#iii.-quick-buy-options)

III. Quick Buy Options

We offer two quick buy options to satisfy users with different trading habits:

**Mode A: Simple — Tailored for the "Mouse + Keyboard" style**

In this mode, rely on the mouse to target & the keyboard to execute the buy

*   Operation Path: Hover over a Trenches column + hold the Auxiliary Key (default `Z`) + press the Row Key = Trigger buy!
    
*   After pressing the Auxiliary Key, a giant key watermark (e.g., 1, 2, 3) will light up on the background of the token cards in that column, helping you quickly and accurately locate the token you want to buy
    

> _Note: This mode will automatically turn on "Pause live feed on Hover"_

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FwlZXyr8OpZgZw0TMtoCH%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D9ee62443-cb1f-4113-a301-44171a2706ae&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6efa3a8&sv=2)

**Mode B: Combo — Tailored for the "Keyboard-only" style**

In this mode, you completely detach from the mouse and rely on full keyboard combos to execute buys

*   Operation Path: Hold the Pause Key (default `Space`) + hold the Column Key (Select New / Almost bonded / Migrated) + press the Row Key = Trigger buy!
    
*   After pressing the Pause Key + Column Key, a giant key watermark (e.g., 1, 2, 3) will light up on the background of the token cards in that column, helping you quickly and accurately locate the token you want to buy
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FTJq24NAh1rcpQmcFRteR%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D9057c3b0-7236-464a-a312-08e2a7c6af58&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=9783b16c&sv=2)

Last updated 2 months ago

# Auto Trading: Migrated Sell | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-migrated-sell.md)
.

Rule:

*   All SOL chain ungraduated tokens can set up Migrated Sell
    
*   Only when you complete settings and click create before the DEX has added official liquidity pool, your Migrated Sell order will be triggered
    
*   One token can only create one Migrated Sell task, and cannot be created after DEX adds official LP
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-migrated-sell#id-1.-raydium-kai-pan-zi-dong-ju-ji-web-duan)

1\. Migrated Sell - web version

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fj84DHwYcNgQIaLs7WxNP%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D8a114161-e299-4a09-9368-5bfc2999150c&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=21f782ab&sv=2)

1) Create Migrated Sell task:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FUbEtUfBJBJnfMQExVM7r%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D998a6d6a-d726-43b8-90c0-39006e1690cb&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6d0dd529&sv=2)

*   Click Auto trading on the pump token page, click Migrated Sell and enter the editing page
    
*   Set Sell Holdings ratio
    
*   Set slippage, priority fee, anti-MEV, and click save
    
*   After the settings are completed, click create in any ungraduated token you want to sell. The token will auto sell the amount of holding ratio you set when DEX adds official LP
    

2) View or delete your Migrated Sell task:

*   In the token page - Orders, you can view your current Migrated Sell tasks and could view or delete them
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FrZnjWXC76pzRNzu5aSbX%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D5aa0acd8-8300-44e9-af07-79d31175c78a&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ad7e8baa&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-migrated-sell#id-2.-raydium-kai-pan-zi-dong-ju-ji-bot-duan)

2\. Migrated Sell- bot vision


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) Create Migrated Sell task:

*   When you enter a ungraduated token contract address into the bot, you will see the Raydium Sell option, and you can set the selling ratiot of this token
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FyZtXPGTfRY36tRTsYChj%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D619f7252-66e5-4162-94de-bff42943b7e0&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8d9642bd&sv=2)

2) Adjust Migrated Sell settings:

*   In the settings, you can click on Raydium Sell xx %, enter the holding ratio you want to sell in reply box when the token launchs DEX, and you can complete the change
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FLpbzjPGBXN5VmeHIuChl%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D50bd772b-b7ab-44d6-947a-0fd02950a0b0&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=dcc0df05&sv=2)

3) View or delete your Migrated Sell tasks:

*   Currently, the GMGN TG bot does not support viewing the Migrated Sell tasks. Please go to the GMGN site Auto trading dashboard to view it
    

[PreviousAuto Trading: Migrated Snipe](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-migrated-snipe)
[NextAuto Trading: Dev Sell](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-dev-sell)

*   [2\. Migrated Sell- bot vision](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-migrated-sell#id-2.-raydium-kai-pan-zi-dong-ju-ji-bot-duan)
