[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallets-import-export#id-1.-import-wallet-list)

1\. Import Wallet List


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Visit [https://gmgn.ai/follow](https://gmgn.ai/follow)
    , and click on the top right corner for bulk import/export
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FE1Sq4vXQQbHWV6hhTs09%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dfe185f9e-b4d4-467b-95a8-72a4cd127bbb&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=fcb140bc&sv=2)

*   Enter the wallet addresses for bulk import, with a maximum of 2,000 addresses tracked
    
*   Note: When importing, use the " \[ " symbol only at the beginning and end, separate wallet addresses with a comma " , "\
    \
\
![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fqb7xaCrp6bRZlI8vEnDP%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Daa288ca3-3eaf-4704-8bba-3b91fd48cf35&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a6b5130d&sv=2)\
\
[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallets-import-export#id-2.-export-wallet-list)\
\
2\. Export Wallet List\
\
\
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\
\
*   Visit [https://gmgn.ai/follow](https://gmgn.ai/follow)\
    , click on the top right corner for bulk import/export\
    \
*   Click to copy the list of followed wallets. Wallet list format description:\
    \
    *   " \[ " and " \] " are used for the start and end\
        \
    *   " { " and " } " enclose each wallet's information\
        \
    *   " address " is followed by the wallet address\
        \
    *   " name " is followed by the wallet note name\
        \
    *   " emoji " is followed by the custom wallet symbol\
        \
    \
\
![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F7RlkF9nQLI2h0alXncaZ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1e1467ad-285c-4350-8fad-23c037a23a88&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=86ae03ec&sv=2)\
\

# Trailing Stop Loss | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-stop-loss.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-stop-loss#id-1.-zhui-zong-zhi-sun-de-yun-xing-yuan-li)

1\. **How Trailing Stop Loss Works:**


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Trailing stop is a more advanced function of stop loss setting. **The stop loss price will increase as the token price rises, aiming to reduce losses** . Suppose the token has experienced a surge, but the surge is not enough to trigger the take profit price you set. If the trailing stop is not turned on, the order will only be closed when the price drops to the stop loss price, and you will face a turn from profit to loss; but if the trailing stop is turned on, you may be in a profitable state when the stop loss order is closed.

**Example:** The user sets the take-profit ratio to +200% (i.e., a 3-fold increase), and the stop-loss ratio to -40%. After the order is opened, the maximum increase of the token is +190%, and then it starts to fall and never recovers:

*   Without a trailing stop, the order will not be automatically sold until the token drops to -40% again, which means that the user will miss out on gains and end up suffering losses instead.
    
*   If the trailing stop is turned on, the order will continuously adjust the stop loss price every time the token rises. When the token rises to the maximum value of +190%, the order will adjust the stop loss price from -40% to +74%. By adjusting the stop loss price, the token is given enough room for maneuver while ensuring profits when the token actually falls.
    

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-stop-loss#kai-qi-zhui-zong-zhi-sun-hou-zhi-sun-jia-jiang-yu-zui-gao-jia-bao-chi-gu-ding-de-zhi-sun-bi-li)

After opening the trailing stop loss, the stop loss price will maintain a fixed stop loss ratio with the highest price:

> Stop loss price = Highest price \* (1 - drawdown percentage%) = 290% \* (1 - 40%) - 1 = 290% \* 0.6 -1 = 74%

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-stop-loss#id-2.-shi-yong-zhui-zong-zhi-sun-shi-qing-zhu-yi)

2\. Please note when using trailing stop loss:


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   The trailing stop will continuously adjust the stop price. **As long as the token price keeps rising, your stop price will rise accordingly** . Therefore, the trailing stop will only keep rising and cannot be lowered.
    
*   There is no activation price for trailing stop loss. When an order is created, the trailing stop loss will start immediately.
    
*   Trailing stop loss will not adjust your take profit price, so when you turn on trailing stop profit and trailing stop loss at the same time, and the drawdown percentage of the trailing stop profit you set is greater than the stop loss percentage, the stop loss price will be higher than the take profit price.
    
*   If both trailing take profit and stop loss are enabled at the same time, and the price reaches the take profit price, the order will be closed when the actual price decline reaches the smaller value between the take profit drawdown and the stop loss ratio.
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-stop-loss#zhui-zong-zhi-ying-yu-zhui-zong-zhi-sun-de-qu-bie-shen-me-shi-zhui-zong-zhi-ying-lian-jie-lian-guo-q)

3\. The difference between trailing take profit and trailing stop loss:


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Click to view -** [**What is trailing take profit**](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-take-profit)

*   **Different applicable scenarios:**
    
    *   Trailing Take Profit: The goal is to maximize your profit as much as possible
        
    *   Trailing Stop: The goal is to minimize your losses
        
    
*   **Is there a trigger price?**
    
    *   Trailing Take Profit: Yes, the trigger price is the take profit price you set
        
    *   Trailing Stop: None
        
    

**Click to view -** [**How to enable trailing stop loss**](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-quick-buy-take-profit-stop-loss#how-to-enable-trailing-stop-loss)

[PreviousTrailing Take Profit](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-take-profit)
[NextAuto Buy: Auto Buy ＆ Limit buy](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-buy-auto-buy-limit-buy)

Last updated 1 year ago

*   [1\. How Trailing Stop Loss Works:](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-stop-loss#id-1.-zhui-zong-zhi-sun-de-yun-xing-yuan-li)
    
*   [2\. Please note when using trailing stop loss:](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-stop-loss#id-2.-shi-yong-zhui-zong-zhi-sun-shi-qing-zhu-yi)
    
*   [3\. The difference between trailing take profit and trailing stop loss:](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-stop-loss#zhui-zong-zhi-ying-yu-zhui-zong-zhi-sun-de-qu-bie-shen-me-shi-zhui-zong-zhi-ying-lian-jie-lian-guo-q)

# X Tracker | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/x-tracker.md)
.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FIL6qd606BTD9jRmqC2rL%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dda0767c7-38e7-456f-9508-4596ef01544e&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8ab3384c&sv=2)

*   2000+ curated Twitter accounts, including Master, Trader, KOL
    
*   Monitor selected X accounts in \[Mine\]
    
    *   No limit for accounts in \[Top Subscriptions\]
        
    *   Non-\[Top Subscriptions\] accounts limited to 5
        
    
*   ⚠️ Notice: If \[CA/Token\] is selected, only tweets containing CA will show in X Tracker
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/x-tracker#id-1.-customize)

1\. Customize


---------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FS9vkGXOjCD2JGCDYGbel%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D2d154db2-8308-4d8d-8bd1-f03a77487dfe&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6b49cd0a&sv=2)

*   Click Customize to add Twitter accounts to \[Mine\] for monitoring
    
*   If the selected account isn't in \[Top Subscriptions\], go to \[My List\] and add it manually
    
*   Non-\[Top Subscriptions\] accounts limited to 5
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/x-tracker#id-2.-choose-type)

2\. Choose Type


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FwkIRYOekrXEg6MsYHtkJ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dcb748d47-7a7e-488a-a1f6-1f45e5853540&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=29a67243&sv=2)

# Track Smart Money | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/track-smart-money.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/track-smart-money#copy-trade-smart-money-to-earn)

_Copy Trade Smart Money to Earn_


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Follow smart money and key opinion leaders (KOLs), and track their trading activities in real time to discover new MEME tokens and trade quickly (please carefully check contract safety before copying trades).

**Steps:**

1.  Follow Smart Money:
    
    *   On the Ethereum chain: [https://gmgn.ai/discover?chain=eth](https://gmgn.ai/discover?chain=eth)
        
    *   On the Solana chain: [https://gmgn.ai/discover/?chain=sol](https://gmgn.ai/discover/?chain=sol)
        
    *   On the Blast chain: [https://gmgn.ai/discover?chain=blast](https://gmgn.ai/discover?chain=blast)
        
    
2.  Receive notifications in the bottom left corner to track what smart money is buying in real time.
    
3.  New activities will trigger a red bubble notification with a sound alert (sound toggle must be enabled).
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FtikTbGRf7Gfv4pw4fcXc%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D474eb620-c3ad-4c36-9e4a-dceb8df36813&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=3587b0cc&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FwJjb157TNYu8pME9RVtk%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dd64ade19-0576-4abe-baa5-47ef8e2a7420&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=dba9f5f5&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FmrqpGdrXh8awGL9NsIU9%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df0fd0069-6ac7-484a-af7e-4ba604f8b43d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8094dec6&sv=2)

GMGN has big data on smart money, after follow smart money, you can receive real-time trading dynamics of smart money. Especially with the release of the new meme coin,there is a concentrated entry of smart money.

The necessary action to check the contract is not less, because a lot of smart money also has a disorderly situation.

###

# Auto Trading: Migrated Snipe | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-migrated-snipe.md)
.

Rule:

*   All SOL chain ungraduated tokens can set up Migrated Snipe
    
*   Only when you complete settings and click Buy xx SOL before the DEX has added official liquidity pool, your Migrated Snipe order will be triggered
    
*   One token can only create one Migrated Snipe task, and cannot be created after DEX adds official LP
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-migrated-snipe#id-1.-raydium-kai-pan-zi-dong-ju-ji-web-duan)

1\. Migrated Snipe - web version

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FPyD9CSUD0zwcDcyxJozI%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D92ae9d49-36c4-47a0-a307-aa0460d10cb9&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=583b67bf&sv=2)

1) Create Migrated Snipe task:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FVYlZouH54z61UiXDHFLE%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc5ef499c-a801-4edf-a2e7-c9bc61601688&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c3131d80&sv=2)

*   Click Auto trading on the token page, click Migrated Snipe and enter the editing page
    
*   Set Buy Amount, TP: take profit (Trailing Take Profit), SL: stop loss (Trailing Stop Loss)
    
*   Set slippage, priority fee, anti-MEV, and click save
    
*   After the settings are completed, click Buy in any token you want to snipe. The token will auto buy the amount of SOL you set when DEX adds official LP
    

2) View or delete your Migrated Snipe task:

*   In the token page - Orders, you can view your current Migrated Snipe tasks and could view or delete them
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FPZXZRpfjlzM834EsQUuW%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De63747dc-abfc-465a-ba81-e977f71a5d70&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=17faf729&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-migrated-snipe#id-2.-raydium-kai-pan-zi-dong-ju-ji-bot-duan)

2\. Migrated Snipe - bot vision


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) Create Migrated Snipe task:

*   When you enter a ungraduated token contract address into the bot, you will see the Snipe Raydium option, and you can set the amount of SOL used to snipe the token separately
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FSyOsfrA9zYx9ocdl7cGG%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Ddb8913c1-7f86-4df0-9174-50e3037d7792&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=fcfacd32&sv=2)

2) Adjust Migrated Snipe settings:

*   In the settings, you can click on Snipe Raydium xx SOL, enter the SOL amount you want to use for sniping in the reply box, and you can complete the change
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FqjDrZtCAcF7j5HoP0NDY%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D40295472-30db-4f98-8e35-521c11222dcf&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4c20137b&sv=2)

3) View or delete your Migrated Snipe tasks:

*   Currently, the GMGN TG bot does not support viewing the Migrated Snipe tasks. Please go to the GMGN site Auto trading dashboard to view it

# Delete APP account | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/delete-app-account.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/delete-app-account#how-to-delete-your-account)

How to Delete Your Account


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you need to delete your account, please follow the steps outlined below:

1.  Open GMGN.AI app.
    
2.  Go to Settings page and select "About Us".
    
3.  Click "Delete Account".
    
4.  Confirm by clicking "Confirmation".
    

Please Note:

1.  Once the account is deleted, it cannot be recovered, and all associated data will be permanently cleared.
    
2.  All account functions will be disabled.
    
3.  All GMGN.AI notification services will stop.
    
4.  Please ensure all assets in the account have been withdrawn.
    
5.  Upon successful deletion, you will be automatically logged out.
    
6.  GMGN.AI reserves the final interpretation of the above statements.
    

If you haven't installed the app yet, please download it through this link: [https://gmgn.ai/app](https://gmgn.ai/app)
 .

If you are unable to access the app, please send an email to info@gmgn.cc to request account deletion.

[PreviousMeme Coin Trading](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/meme-coin-trading)
[NextContact us](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/contact-us)

Last updated 1 year ago

# CA Security Checks | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/ca-security-checks.md)
.

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/ca-security-checks#disclaimer-token-security-checks-are-for-reference-only-and-cannot-guarantee-100-accuracy.-please-ca)

**⚠️ Disclaimer: Token security checks are for reference only and cannot guarantee 100% accuracy. Please carefully compare multiple security tools before trading.**

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/ca-security-checks#solana-token-security-checks)

Solana token security checks


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FryJAWwqhZR4cjV7XIF76%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df3aa2676-c956-482c-ba2b-9551a5b63236&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ebbc6d13&sv=2)

*   **MintDisable:** "Yes" indicates safety, meaning that the token creator cannot issue additional tokens to manipulate the market.
    
*   **Top10 hold:** "Yes" indicates a relatively safe condition, meaning that the total holdings of the top 10 token holders are less than 30% of the total supply.
    
*   **Blacklist:** "No" indicates safety, meaning that the project cannot blacklist any wallet's transactions, reducing the risk of financial entrapment. “Yes”means:you are in this token dev‘s blacklist.you can't sell this token,it wil alert you that your wallet is frozen.
    
*   **Burnt:** Displaying the burn pool percentage: the higher the ratio, the better, with 100% indicating that the project cannot withdraw from the liquidity pool.
    
*   **Rug probability****:** Display the probability of this token being a rug pull by analyzing the holders. The more holders who frequently buy rug pull tokens, the higher the likelihood that this token could be a rug pull.
    
*   **Rug History****:** Display which rug pull tokens may have been previously launched by the creator of this token.
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/ca-security-checks#eth-token-security-checks)

ETH token security checks


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FrA7yaeUc2vjvuKl3C2AN%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D9e59ad82-df11-43a9-b871-b88450e65181&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=e4f9a58e&sv=2)

*   **Honeypot:** When "Yes," it indicates a honeypot, where the token creator uses technical measures to restrict the sale of tokens, leading to potential investment losses. Honeypot detection relies on third-party data sources such as Goplus, and the GMGN website may display this information with some delay, thus not guaranteeing timeliness or accuracy. Before trading, it is crucial to consult multiple token security audit tools to verify the token's safety.
    
*   **Verified:** The token's contract has been made open source on [Etherscan.io](http://etherscan.io/)
     , allowing for the source code to be reviewed.
    
*   **Renounced:** Contract permissions have been relinquished. However, be aware that some token contracts might fake "renouncement" and still update the code, transforming the token into a Honeypot, or blacklisting trader wallets to prohibit the buying, selling, or transferring of tokens.
    
*   **Locked/Burned:** Display the risk of liquidity pool withdrawal. The liquidity pool's LP tokens have either been locked (retrievable upon expiration) or burned (transferred to a burn address, making them irretrievable).
    
*   **Buy/Sell Tax:** Displays the transaction tax that needs to be additionally paid to the token creator during buying and selling. If the sell tax is excessively high (e.g., 99%), it indicates a Honeypot, making it impossible to sell, run away!
    

[PreviousHow to become a Degen](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/how-to-become-a-degen)
[NextReferral Link](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/referral-link)

Last updated 1 year ago

*   [⚠️ Disclaimer: Token security checks are for reference only and cannot guarantee 100% accuracy. Please carefully compare multiple security tools before trading.](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/ca-security-checks#disclaimer-token-security-checks-are-for-reference-only-and-cannot-guarantee-100-accuracy.-please-ca)
    
*   [Solana token security checks](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/ca-security-checks#solana-token-security-checks)

# GMGN Fees ＆ Settings | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#tips-you-can-get-details-of-various-transaction-fees-by-querying-the-transaction-hash-at-https-solsc)

✅Tips: You can get details of various transaction fees by querying the transaction hash at [https://solscan.io/](https://solscan.io/)



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FwzU4K3zogvABiB0kvB0m%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D55e8c03e-011a-4fec-adde-3c55209711f9&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=72df809d&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-1.-gmgn-shou-xu-fei-wu-xu-she-zhi)

1\. GMGN Fee (no need to set)


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GMGN only charges a 1% handling fee for a single transcation, and there are no additional charges. For users who have questions about transaction fees, please first check your priority fee and slippage settings.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F8zelSgXd0HyCUhXWTVTm%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc28385b6-1e8e-44b7-84ae-86b13fdb6515&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=fcaf7377&sv=2)

The transaction amount in the figure is 1 SOL, and the GMGN fee is 0.01 SOL (WSOL is the token used for transactions on the Solana chain, 1 WSOL = 1 SOL)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-2.-gas-fei-wu-xu-she-zhi)

2\. Gas Fee (no need to set)


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Note: Gas Fee refers to the fee that users need to pay to network validators when executing transactions or interacting with smart contracts, which is commonly known as on-chain fees.

*   Solana chain uses SOL as the gas unit
    
*   The ETH chain uses Gwei as the Gas unit because the price of ETH is high and the fee calculation is inconvenient: 1 ETH = 1,000,000,000 Gwei (9 zeros)
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-3.-hua-dian-xu-yao-she-zhi)

3\. Slippage (need to be set)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) Description: Slippage refers to the maximum acceptable deviation of the number of tokens declared for a single transaction. For example, if the slippage is 30% when buying, if the actual tokens received are between 70% and 100%, the on-chain transaction will be successful. If the actual tokens received are less than 70%, the on-chain transaction will fail (exceeding the slippage range).

2) The purpose of setting a slippage limit ratio is to ensure that you will not suffer unexpected losses due to slippage. Once the actual execution price exceeds the set slippage ratio, the transaction will be automatically cancelled.

3) When trading MEME, experienced traders will significantly increase slippage to cope with the sharp rise and fall caused by token FOMO and FUD sentiment, because the demand is to buy and sell quickly, and they don’t care how many tokens they can actually receive.

✅Tips: Manual buying and selling is recommended to be automatic; the recommended slippage for automatic buy/sell and other pending order operations is 30%-35%; for new and popular tokens, it is recommended to be 50% or more. Sometimes auto slippage has lag, can not guarantee 100% success, please be careful to follow your needs to trade

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FcvXWHbmXx8uJ2IMfB14P%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D247ed3cd-4478-43dd-9b95-6956accc9853&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6569a59a&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-4.-fang-jia-mo-shi-fang-mev-san-ming-zhi-gong-ji-xu-yao-xuan-ze-shi-fou-kai-qi)

4\. Anti-MEV mode (Anti-MEV sandwich attack) (need to choose whether to turn it on)


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) Note: The core attack method of the MEV bot is Sandwiching, which is the so-called sandwich attack, which is equivalent to the preemptive strategy adopted by high-frequency trading companies: in a typical sandwich attack, the MEV bot reads the incoming transaction information and preemptively executes the order, thereby pushing up the token price when you buy it.

*   _The MEV bot detects your transaction and automatically generates a buy transaction before the block is packaged your trading. The transaction fee is higher than yours, so the robot's transaction is executed first._
    
*   _After the bot's transaction is executed, due to the automatic market making mechanism, the unit price of the token will be raised, and the price increase will directly affect the subsequent transactions. Therefore, when it is your turn to trade, the token price has risen, and the actual number of tokens you get is not as much as when you first placed the order. This difference is also called the slippage amount. (But it is different from the normal slippage, which is the slippage caused by the MEV bot )_
    
*   _After our transaction is executed, the token price will continue to rise. At this time, the bot generates another transaction to sell the lower price bought in the previous transaction, just making a profit from the difference. The two transactions generated by the bot just sandwich our transaction, so we call it sandwich attack_
    

2) Enabling Anti-MEV mode can effectively prevent transactions from being sandwiched, but the priority fee must be at least 0.002 SOL to enable it.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FAD8T4V5F7jAEWOcAnJj2%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D85b9257d-7914-4ae7-a8d2-badb39d1ae80&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f7faa8dd&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-5.-you-xian-fei-xu-yao-she-zhi)

5\. Priority fee, Tip fee, Custom RPC (need to be set)


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FdkwoayIWa37q4n4Ek6VJ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dccf534a3-3aa6-492b-b0d8-197727337db3&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c39cf03f&sv=2)

Priority/Tip fee: max 2 SOL

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-1-priority-and-tip-fee-description)

1) Priority and Tip fee description:

Priority and tip fees are additional fees paid to speed up transaction processing, used to bribe nodes to prioritize your tx, and are not collected by GMGN

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F3IHYaAkBX8HjGxTLfYkI%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D384b1e09-d2cb-4b1b-a2c0-272c7d326a97&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=e02abfa6&sv=2)

✅ Transaction on-chain fee = Priority fee + Tip fee + Gas

*   Priority fee: Paid to validators to prioritized confirmation. (minimum 0.0001 SOL)
    
*   Tip fee: Paid to private nodes for faster processing. (minimum 0.0001 SOL)
    

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-2-anti-mev-rpc-submission)

2) Anti-MEV RPC Submission

*   **Off protection**: transactions sent to all nodes, very fast
    
*   **Reduced protection**: transactions sent to limited nodes, fast, may be front-run
    
*   **Secure protection**: transactions sent to safe nodes, slightly slower, with compensation
    

⚠️ Note: For anti-MEV protection, the minimum Tip fee is 0.0001 SOL (a higher value is recommended, as low fees may result in slower on-chain processing during busy network conditions)

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-3.-custom-rpc-you-can-choose-to-connect-to-a-specific-rpc-server-self-hosted-or-third-party-provided)

**3\. Custom RPC**: You can choose to connect to a specific RPC server (self-hosted or third-party provided)

*   **RPC Node**: Transaction submission - Sends transactions to the blockchain for validation and recording
    
*   Custom RPC will be used as a backup RPC for simultaneous on-chain submission
    
*   If a custom RPC is used for submission, both priority and tip fees will be charged at the same rate
    

✅ **Tips**: For transactions with no speed requirement, a total on-chain fee of 0.002 - 0.005 SOL is generally sufficient. For auto buy/sell limit order placement, a fee of 0.006 SOL or higher is recommended. During busy network conditions, manually increasing the priority/tip fee is advised for faster tx confirmation

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-6.-dai-bi-fa-xing-ping-tai-shou-xu-fei-wu-xu-she-zhi)

6\. Token issuance platform fee (no need to set)


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Note: For example, for tokens issued on Pump.Fun, a 1% handling fee will be charged by the Pump.Fun platform during transactions. For the specific handling fee ratio, please refer to the instructions of each token issuance platform.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FZ8AGisRTLqJ0FIx8sGEd%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df580afa9-7e88-4a2b-b065-e03665b61f37&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=165378de&sv=2)

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#if-you-have-any-questions-you-can-ask-your-trading-questions-in-the-official-gmgn-group)

If you have any questions, you can ask your trading questions in the official GMGN group 👇🏻:

[![Logo](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftelegram.org%2Fimg%2Fapple-touch-icon.png&width=20&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c3e5dfa1&sv=2)💎GMGN Degen Group - OfficialTelegram](https://t.me/gmgnai)

[PreviousTransaction/Limit Order failure](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/transaction-limit-order-failure)
[NextWallet Alert on Telegram](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram)

Last updated 10 months ago

*   [1\. GMGN Fee (no need to set)](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-1.-gmgn-shou-xu-fei-wu-xu-she-zhi)
    
*   [2\. Gas Fee (no need to set)](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-2.-gas-fei-wu-xu-she-zhi)
    
*   [3\. Slippage (need to be set)](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-3.-hua-dian-xu-yao-she-zhi)
    
*   [4\. Anti-MEV mode (Anti-MEV sandwich attack) (need to choose whether to turn it on)](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-fees-settings#id-4.-fang-jia-mo-shi-fang-mev-san-ming-zhi-gong-ji-xu-yao-xuan-ze-shi-fou-kai-qi)

# Invite @GMGNAI_BOT | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/invite-gmgnai_bot.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/invite-gmgnai_bot#id-1.-invite-contract-query-bot-to-your-group)

1\. Invite Contract Query Bot To Your Group


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**@GMGNAI\_BOT** [https://t.me/GMGNAI\_bot](https://t.me/GMGNAI_bot)

**Quick Invite** 👉🏻 [Click here to invite @GMGNAI\_bot to your Telegram Group](https://t.me/GMGNAI_bot?startgroup=true)

**Bot description:**

1) Check Token Analysis: Anyone can send **a token contract address** to the group and the bot will automatically reply with token prices, pool liquidity, insiders and other token analysis data.

2) Check Wallet PnL Analysis: Anyone can send **a wallet address** (Solana Only) to the group and the bot will automatically reply with wallet analysis such as 7d PnL, Realized Profit, Unrealized Profit, Winrate, Holding Token Analysis, Last 5 trades.

Supported Chains: ETH, Solana, Base, BSC

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FFxlQjCrUPeyLSvmzlVKb%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dca0a6185-6933-4ee0-b903-3f7a5d841548&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=9bbf16c9&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/invite-gmgnai_bot#id-2.-grant-admin-permissions-to-the-bot)

2\. Grant Admin Permissions To The Bot


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FVeAQCtlsHEKK1ngBOyOj%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D94cf5ffb-1375-43aa-81e4-7965ea4b7a88&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=83c1432f&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/invite-gmgnai_bot#id-3.-send-set-command-to-change-language)

3\. Send /set Command To Change Language


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Send /set command to the group to change the language.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FbPqTXIEE4htgg9jfvEme%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D0b4fd55c-a08f-4024-97c7-babffe6a63db&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c64e96ab&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/invite-gmgnai_bot#id-4.-configure-message-links-with-referral-codes)

4\. Configure Message Links With Referral Codes


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Get Telegram Group ID:** After adding the bot to the group and giving it admin permissions, send /groupid command to the group and copy the group ID (a string of numbers starting with a negative sign, either beginning with -1 or -4, like -1xxxxxxxxxxxx or -4xxxxxxxxx).
    
*   **Configure Referral Codes:** Please fill out the Google application form and include the group ID in the remarks: [https://forms.gle/EhofPCZ1g9fXaA6S7](https://forms.gle/EhofPCZ1g9fXaA6S7)
    

💡 **Generate your referral code here (3 codes total):**

> Solana website [https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=sol](https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=sol)
> 
> ETH website [https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=eth](https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=eth)
> 
> GMGN Sniper Bot [@GMGN\_sol\_bot](https://t.me/GMGN_sol_bot)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/invite-gmgnai_bot#id-5.-configuration-successful)

**5\. 🎉 Configuration Successful**


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The more trading volume you refer, the higher your rebate rate will be ([Apply to increase rebate](https://forms.gle/EhofPCZ1g9fXaA6S7)
)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fz6SYEcoxHbvYbyhDmkrb%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D03217f55-bd70-402e-8c29-c5f53a42afd8&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=e95ba663&sv=2)

# How to become a Degen | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/how-to-become-a-degen.md)
.

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/how-to-become-a-degen#if-you-are-new-to-gmgn-and-want-to-try-to-make-money-by-trading-new-tokens-here-are-some-tips-you-sh)

If you are new to GMGN and want to try to make money by trading new tokens, here are some tips you should focus on.

1.Keep an eye on the "Sniper New" section at the bottom left corner of [http://gmgn.ai](http://gmgn.ai/)
. When you see a new coin, click on it and follow these steps:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FxGyqehaU2iSBz1O7vTeq%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dce94c08b-26a4-492f-a81b-6bfcd2e48e31&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a5630495&sv=2)

2.Check LP Burned or not: If LP not burned, there's a 60% chance it could be a rug pull.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FoHpDoLc5DTp4qJTuKZy1%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dea900ad9-efcc-42f7-8417-fd341beaa0dc&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=e167f4ad&sv=2)

3.Inspect Rat Trading: Rat trading holdings should not exceed 20%, and ideally, there should be some present.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fwp6WOzUcDHEpC5SCdlGE%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D348c68de-72dc-4c7d-b8b6-4e2ccb12bf0b&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=9c3ca6c8&sv=2)

4.Check Snipers: If a top holder snipes at the opening with less liquidity, there's a 90% chance of a dump, causing instant losses as you buy at the peak of the price, causing momentary losses.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FG5FdpLDM794AO3rbv9yv%252FUntitled.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc65d20e2-a34c-4a76-96c9-305000e000fa&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=12fb5db4&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FmNii65lQ2QRqIhcNwH0f%252FUntitled%2520%281%29.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df265fa15-cd1f-4421-8311-2defdfa76867&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=d3592de4&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FX6tvnKYpysPt4sO3pqzn%252FUntitled%2520%282%29.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D66ceb492-1c87-4ecf-885a-6f0c09bea1e9&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=9ecde088&sv=2)

5.Prefer Larger Pools: Pools with over 100 SOL are preferable. Those with only tens of SOL are susceptible to dumps. However, do not always rely on this pattern, as some scammers may exploit it to deceive you.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fi1j1CdiYkHgtG5uN55qg%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D27c91af3-625c-4907-b8c2-84da00ee465a&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ed4b7620&sv=2)

6.Monitor Opening Trades: Look for genuine trading activity. If there are over 60 trades in the first minute or 600 trades in the first 5 minutes, it indicates real activity, not wash trading.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F0XjJSLaNeSYhxxmddavl%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D71a94abf-1d34-4842-97cd-4d371b266c1d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=95b1b309&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FUQoEalzHelOKWwjftnf4%252FUntitled%2520%283%29.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D03441a33-0d7e-492a-a8d8-2933ceb32398&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4d91f0da&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FNkAcZ8AQO8z51osMN55U%252FUntitled%2520%284%29.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dcc556e80-4596-4c45-9dbf-f558113b5ff0&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=824211c5&sv=2)

# Trailing Take Profit | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-take-profit.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-take-profit#id-1.-how-trailing-take-profit-works)

1\. **How Trailing Take Profit Works:**


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

When the price hits your profit price, Trailing Take Profit will be activated. If the price continues to rise, the order will be held until the price falls back by the percentage you set, the order will be closed. The drawback is that if the price reverses immediately after the trailing feature is activated, you may lose part of the profits.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-take-profit#id-2.-trailing-stop-example)

**2\. Trailing Stop Example**：


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

User A creates a Trailing Take Profit order to buy SOL , and set 20% take-profit rate and 5% drawdown. The average buy price is $140. Below is the operational logic of TTP.

**No**

**SOL Price(USD)**

**Take Profit price(USD)**

**TTP status**

**No**

**SOL Price(USD)**

**Take Profit price(USD)**

**TTP status**

1

150

\-

Waiting

2

160

\-

Waiting

3

168

159.6（168 \* （1-5%））

Trailing Sell is active

4

162

159.6

Trailing Sell is active

5

170

161.5（170 \* （1-5%））

Trailing Sell is active

6

180

171（180 \* （1-5%））

Trailing Sell is active

7

190

180.5（190 \* （1-5%））

Trailing Sell is active

7

185

180.5

Trailing Sell is active

8

180.5

180.5

SOL sold at market price, **the profit rate is 28.9%**

**Here are some examples of drawdown parameters:**

*   TP +50%, drawdown percentage 10%
    
*   TP +100%, drawdown percentage 15%
    
*   TP +200%, drawdown percentage 20%
    

Please note that the drawdown ratio should not be set too high. For instance, if a token rises by 100% and then falls by 50%, it will have returned to your buy price, not a 100% drop.

**Click to view:** [**How to Enable Trailing Take Profit**](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-quick-buy-take-profit-stop-loss#how-to-enable-trailing-take-profit)

[PreviousAuto Trading: Quick Buy ＆ Take-Profit / Stop-Loss](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-quick-buy-take-profit-stop-loss)
[NextTrailing Stop Loss](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-stop-loss)

# 🤝🏻 Cooperation-API: 🔄Data crawling IP whitelist | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-data-crawling-ip-whitelist.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-data-crawling-ip-whitelist#announcement)

📢 Announcement


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To deliver a more efficient and seamless developer experience, GMGN has officially launched its OpenAPI to all users.

Effective immediately, the "Data Crawling IP Whitelist Application Form" is officially discontinued. Users no longer need to submit application forms or wait for manual approval to access our data services.

* * *

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-data-crawling-ip-whitelist#getting-started)

🚀 Getting Started

We now provide standardized documentation on GitHub. You can access the latest API specifications and integration guides via the link below:

*   [https://github.com/GMGNAI/gmgn-skills](https://github.com/GMGNAI/gmgn-skills)
    
*   Access Level: OpenAPI is currently open to all GMGN users.
    

* * *

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-data-crawling-ip-whitelist#developer-guidelines)

⚠️ Developer Guidelines

While we have removed access restrictions, please adhere to the following to ensure platform stability:

*   Rate Limit: The default rate limit is 1 request per second.
    
*   Rapid Iteration: GMGN is in a stage of high-speed development. The OpenAPI may be updated or modified irregularly. We recommend "Starring" or bookmarking [https://github.com/GMGNAI/gmgn-skills](https://github.com/GMGNAI/gmgn-skills)
     to stay informed of the latest changes.
    
*   Disclaimer: The current OpenAPI is primarily designed for community developers to provide data and trading support. We do not currently offer enterprise-grade High Availability (HA) or High Throughput APIs.
    

* * *

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-data-crawling-ip-whitelist#faq)

❓ FAQ

Q: I previously submitted a whitelist application; what should I do now? A: You can disregard your previous application status. Please proceed directly with integration by following the latest OpenAPI documentation.

Q: What should I do if my IP is blocked? A: First, ensure your request frequency complies with our rate limits. If you believe you have been blocked in error, please contact us via our Telegram channel: [https://t.me/gmgnagentapi](https://t.me/gmgnagentapi)

[PreviousSwap transaction simulation (ETH/Base/BSC)](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api/swap-transaction-simulation-eth-base-bsc)
[Next🤝🏻 Cooperation-Script:💵How to Quickly Create an Automated Script for Trading with GMGN Bot](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-script-how-to-quickly-create-an-automated-script-for-trading-with-gmgn-bot)

Portal for GMGN Signal Alert Channels


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**To avoid scam ads shown in public channels, the GMGN Team has switched official channels to private channels.**

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-tg-alert-channel-bot#quick-start)

⚡ **Quick Start**


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Click to invite Group Contract Query Bot** 👉🏻 [@GMGNAI\_bot](https://t.me/GMGNAI_BOT?startgroup=true)
    
*   **Click to invite Group Smart Money Tracking Bot** 👉🏻 [@Alert\_GMGNBOT](https://t.me/Alert_GMGNBOT?startgroup=true)
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-tg-alert-channel-bot#official-gmgn-signal-alert-channels-and-bots-are-here-https-gmgn.ai-bot-chain-sol)

**🏆 Official GMGN Signal Alert Channels and Bots are here:** [**https://gmgn.ai/bot?chain=sol**](https://gmgn.ai/bot?chain=sol)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F7Eqoa0ZnrNLhb6m71299%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D55a95d67-f58d-41eb-961a-494563a5fc38&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4a26a78e&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-tg-alert-channel-bot#how-to-use-gmgn-signal-alert-bots)

**🌈 How to Use GMGN Signal Alert Bots**


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-tg-alert-channel-bot#id-1.-use-the-bot-in-the-gmgn-degen-group-official)

**1\.** Use the bot in the 💎GMGN Degen Group - Official


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1）The two bots at the bottom of the image are already configured in the GMGN official group.**

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FRR8mmSTFfxPzeyxsMNy2%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D89f56acf-a821-408d-a6d1-6a8436fee76b&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8a57bb8c&sv=2)

**2）Join GMGN official group**👇🏻

[![Logo](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftelegram.org%2Fimg%2Fapple-touch-icon.png&width=20&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c3e5dfa1&sv=2)💎GMGN Degen Group - OfficialTelegram](https://t.me/gmgnai)

**3）Now you can use** **Contract Query bot** **in it: Copy CA or SM Wallet address and send it to GMGN group.The robot will reply with details.** ( token prices, pool liquidity, insiders and other token analysis data .etc)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FmXQSx70pIAAElcpxQAsu%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dfdab732d-a883-44e3-8d5f-992eb194712c&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=b1def824&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FxbOj0Li3pEOZOSxLJdSG%252FSnipaste_2024-08-08_06-52-32.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dabc3a5df-5d20-4512-a8f2-88716e9b758d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=bcad0cd9&sv=2)

**4）Now you can use** **Smart Money Tracking bot** **in it:** It will automatically send smart money wallet dynamics alerts in GMGN group

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FwcG4VbERrcLjnsfaJGOC%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D64d6738f-e668-45d3-8101-1232c45a85e8&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6eecf79d&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-tg-alert-channel-bot#id-2.-join-gmgn-tg-alert-channel)

**2\.** Join GMGN TG Alert Channel


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1) The 10 groups at the top of the picture are all our signal groups**

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F9SU3WWEbpHINpx6KMyyl%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D3ef94be0-af93-4671-b4cd-0c1ebbbcc377&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8a3cd19&sv=2)

**2) Click the “****Join****”button to join the tg signal group:**

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FW4mZseX39numFOkRxVYR%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D8704f5b5-eac5-4be1-974b-87d513f44acb&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=1394879b&sv=2)

**🎉 Then it will be redirected to the channel.You have successfully completed all steps to join the signal group！！**

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-tg-alert-channel-bot#id-3.-invite-gmgn-tg-alert-bot-to-your-own-group)

**3\. Invite** GMGN TG Alert Bot to your own group


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1) You could invite these two Bots to Telegram group to earn trading commissions automatically**

# Auto Trading: Dev Sell | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-dev-sell.md)
.

Rule:

*   Unlimited tokens species. When the token creator sells part of holdings in a single transaction, it will be automatically sold.
    
*   Only when you have position, complete settings and click creater, it will automatically follow Dev to sell after Dev sells part of his holdings
    
*   A token only has one running Dev sell task and submits one transaction. But it can be submitted multiple times
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-dev-sell#id-1.-raydium-kai-pan-zi-dong-ju-ji-web-duan)

1\. Dev Sell - web version

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FNhG1CvKcGhmiKJ1lXs8B%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D27eebb3b-7518-4b6e-a1e8-b27c6ebb9b65&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ab9affa0&sv=2)

1) Create Dev Sell task:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FqKCof50c83YTXvV99vyK%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D0a00e962-a4b8-45b0-b1d3-e7f4b815f20f&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=74bad77e&sv=2)

*   Click Auto trading on the token page, click Dev Sell and enter the editing page
    
*   Set Sell Holdings ratio and Dev Sell ratio
    
*   Set slippage, priority fee, anti-MEV, and click save
    
*   After the settings are completed, click create in any token you want to follow dev to sell. The token will auto sell the amount of holding ratio you set when Dev actual selling ratio ≥ Dev sell ratio you set
    

2) View or delete your Dev Sell task:

*   In the token details page - Position, you can view your current Dev Sell tasks and could view or delete them
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FnUwP8PQSeiG7VsF77wA8%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7090e799-48b8-4b35-9003-2ccda4d66507&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f8415435&sv=2)

3) When buying any token, if Dev Sell is also selected, it will automatically create a Dev Sell task

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FfRB7dGxymCicbwsDwFbq%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D0f868b4e-0de5-483c-b859-3132a78002ec&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a6573350&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-dev-sell#id-2.-raydium-kai-pan-zi-dong-ju-ji-bot-duan)

2\. Dev Sell- bot vision


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) Create Dev Sell task:

*   When you enter a token contract address into the bot, you will see the Dev Sell option. Click it to create a follow-up Dev automatic sell task. When the token creator sells part of his holdings in a single transaction, the token ratio you set will be automatically sold
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FETkzyCc6hNmdJAGfpP5R%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D2e39613c-7f99-4e00-9b51-b7fc5a048f9b&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6f0afcc6&sv=2)

2) Adjust Dev Sell settings:

*   In the settings, after setting the Dev sell ratio, set the automatic Sell ratio. When the Dev sell ratio is greater than the ratio you set, your position will be automatically sold according to the automatic Sell ratio you set
    
*   In the settings, you can click the Dev Sell ratio and the Sell ratio, enter them in the reply box and send to complete the change
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F6tOdDKDCTbYD9HoDlX5W%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D95787fe0-a15b-4e14-8f8e-fb85b0249416&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=72bee51b&sv=2)

3) View or delete your Snipe Raydium tasks:

*   Currently, the GMGN TG bot does not support viewing the Dev Sell tasks. Please go to the GMGN site Auto trading dashboard to view it
    

[PreviousAuto Trading: Migrated Sell](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-migrated-sell)
[NextAuto Trading: Quick Buy ＆ Take-Profit / Stop-Loss](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-quick-buy-take-profit-stop-loss)

*   [2\. Dev Sell- bot vision](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-dev-sell#id-2.-raydium-kai-pan-zi-dong-ju-ji-bot-duan)

# Auto Trading: Quick Buy ＆ Take-Profit / Stop-Loss | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-quick-buy-take-profit-stop-loss.md)
.

Supported Chain: Solana

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-quick-buy-take-profit-stop-loss#id-1.-automated-trading-gmgn-web-version)

**1\. Automated Trading - GMGN Web Version**


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) **Experience Auto Trading by Logging in via Telegram**: In the trading section, select "Auto" and click "Connect Telegram" or the "Connect" button in the upper right corner. You will be automatically redirected to the GMGN login bot. Click "Log In", then click "Open" link to complete the TG login.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FN5w0nmSLzbF5LZ5bbU6q%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D9fbaa8ee-c938-4a5f-a02f-7231128e0ddd&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ae6e38f3&sv=2)

Open the GMGN login bot and click "Login" and "Open"

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fizg63opnK3OaXNWENTce%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D67a85281-f1b2-45a7-90de-be784781813d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f3af6aa5&sv=2)

2）**Set Auto Trading Parameters:** After successful login, Click "Set" to configure the parameters of your Auto Trading strategy.

*   Set the amount and take-profit or stop-loss values (at least one value must be filled in).
    
*   The settings for slippage, priority fee, MEV, remain consistent with the buy/sell settings. Changes made on the Auto Trading settings page will update the buy/sell values as well. Similarly, if the parameters for buy/sell are adjusted, automated trading will also place orders according to the modified values.
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FhqOM8xRYfLhDMG3OpifH%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D55f04d03-57ad-4b4c-aad0-3548d3eda7b2&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=eded3b8f&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F2iMVVzoDtC3d6SxbLFRe%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D934747bb-b201-4fc3-8202-d1a7e07e55e9&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4d1f3e9d&sv=2)

3) **Create and Run Auto Trading Orders:**

*   After saving the automated strategy parameters, click "Buy XXX SOL" on the trading page to create an automated trading order.
    
*   The created automated trading orders can be viewed in the "Strategy Order" list.
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FQMEagjqmYcRjZKhfo9Q2%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D0f8d9f46-54a4-460a-bcd3-28c0d75b4a40&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=fe0560fa&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fu7p0Tf2xCTIoL1NuOLqB%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D6518752e-cf70-428e-a885-45fe5172969f&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=3b49df47&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-quick-buy-take-profit-stop-loss#ru-he-kai-qi-zhui-zong-zhi-ying)

**2\. How to Enable Trailing Take Profit**


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Open the trading panel, select \[Auto\], you need to set:

1.  Buy amount and take profit ratio;
    
2.  Enable Trailing Take Profit (once enabled, it will show the minimum profit: assuming the worst-case where the price immediately drops after hit the take-profit ratio);
    
3.  Set the drawback percentage (the order will close immediately when the percentage drop from the highest price exceeds the drawback percentage).
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FaFwZOaXb2cd88H5xh8zb%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D578247d4-a0cd-4e43-9ec8-dcd7a28916c6&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=effc3f49&sv=2)

After enabling Trailing Take Profit, Auto trading panel will change to **TTP**. When you click to buy XX SOL, the system will immediately buy the token and execute the order according to the parameters you set.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FjlgnYMOCE7Fo0ptnF7AM%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D91283ff7-429d-43b0-9657-baeec1483143&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=dfa7f6a7&sv=2)

**Viewing Trailing Stop Orders**

You can view the order information in \[Auto Orders\] list.

*   When the Trailing Take Profit has not been triggered, the status is a **gray dot**. Hover will display: Trailing Take Profit is pending, and show the trigger price. Trigger price = buy price \* (1 + TP ratio%)
    
*   After TTP is triggered, the status changes to a **green dot**. Hover will display: Trailing Stop activated, and the highest price reached, and the current stop-profit price.
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FdPsHAq8IL3aK3aMiIW5J%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D2129d1e4-de5c-4968-8cc7-9fce2cd50e88&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ab6d4354&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FXVwTJAVgMZginlLLcJUf%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc1af1818-1494-4f54-8d08-dd6eb70edd1b&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=dce0381f&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-quick-buy-take-profit-stop-loss#how-to-enable-trailing-stop-loss)

**3\. How to Enable Trailing Stop Loss**

In the Auto trading settings page, set stop-loss ratio and then enable trailing stop-loss.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FJOg0xni3Buqa1BPqUe5F%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De4744695-112d-43f4-9a06-d876440a88dd&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4b8ed96a&sv=2)

[PreviousAuto Trading: Dev Sell](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-dev-sell)
[NextTrailing Take Profit](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/trailing-take-profit)

Last updated 1 year ago

*   [1\. Automated Trading - GMGN Web Version](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-quick-buy-take-profit-stop-loss#id-1.-automated-trading-gmgn-web-version)
    
*   [2\. How to Enable Trailing Take Profit](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-trading-quick-buy-take-profit-stop-loss#ru-he-kai-qi-zhui-zong-zhi-ying)

# 🤝🏻 Cooperation-Referral:📸Share transaction profits | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-referral-share-transaction-profits.md)
.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FZvNFpZNjjt4eIkZKCs1g%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D91d76f51-c91d-4504-8b98-df7dbc87a12a&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6bd76dd7&sv=2)

**Method 1:**

Go to the page of the token you hold, and click to share the transaction.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FoNZ7O19lN9iRNmHeG3ad%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dedb56418-face-432d-8b6a-828b89e63dad&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=62e611e1&sv=2)

**Method 2:**

1.  Go to your wallet page (search for your wallet at the top of[https://GMGN.ai](https://gmgn.ai/)
     or log in at the top right, then select "My Wallet" from the dropdown menu to enter).
    
2.  On TABs like Recent PnL, Holdings, Activity, click the share button on the right to share.
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FYKFaPFTOv9Ab3GBXOdQS%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D33cef6c2-cb2f-4661-813d-41a0e85958e4&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=897cbeee&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FlUu08oGfX5ar2a0Tk2Su%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D32484caf-7015-4958-95b9-aed49b5565b0&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a4643834&sv=2)
