# Zero-Latency Wallet Tracking Bot | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/zero-latency-wallet-tracking-bot.md)
.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F2MACmio89r1XUt3GoqmH%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D2a7ca390-d06d-49cf-86fb-93f678022314&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=73f9e55a&sv=2)

Push wallet monitoring messages in milliseconds

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/zero-latency-wallet-tracking-bot#zero-latency-wallet-tracking-bot)

**Zero-Latency Wallet Tracking Bot**

*   Exclusive private node, push channel acceleration, millisecond-level monitoring speed, one-click fast transaction
    
*   Zero-Latency Wallet Tracking Notification - SOL: [https://gmgn.ai/follow?chain=sol&tab=follow&groupid=groupid](https://gmgn.ai/follow?chain=sol&tab=follow&groupid=groupid)
    
*   Zero-Latency Wallet Tracking Notification - BSC: [https://gmgn.ai/follow?chain=bsc&tab=follow&groupid=groupid](https://gmgn.ai/follow?chain=bsc&tab=follow&groupid=groupid)
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Ft1I6dyEBjdFRPaNaLMWu%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1c8d5dbd-6500-449d-8435-754df8f41000&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=826460b4&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/zero-latency-wallet-tracking-bot#setup-steps)

**Setup steps:**

1.  Click to create a Telegram group
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FIlkIyz4iNWZ5p4aQNnNL%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D9370557d-ef12-4e62-9411-98b59aa524fe&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a67db337&sv=2)

1.  invite Bot [@GMGN\_vip\_Bot](https://t.me/GMGN_vip_bot)
     to the newly created Telegram group
    

Or click info in the upper right corner of the group, click Add to add members, and search for "@GMGN\_vip\_Bot" (Note that the Bot's unique ID is "@GMGN\_vip\_Bot", do not add other scammers' bots)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FSqz4BjJcW4Sv5HZ8DW01%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D6d7b67d0-4f3c-466b-a633-30e932d4af38&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=745e2126&sv=2)

1.  Copy the group ID, or click the "Create Alerts" button to automatically fill in the group ID after jumping
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F07FF8oRznP1rMUbRWUfR%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Db60b7de2-2cca-40c9-a4e1-99ac85a8a315&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8c134fa4&sv=2)

1.  Create a group bot: Click [@BotFather](https://t.me/BotFather)
     , enter /newbot in the dialog box, fill in the bot name first, then fill in the bot username (must end with "bot" and cannot be repeated with other people's bots). After successful creation, copy the bot API token in the red box in the figure below
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FVEjO7JCBHT24CqY3KyLf%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dd2acb03e-f479-4cd9-81ff-bc9da2e7d2f5&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=5e6b7acc&sv=2)

1.  Paste the bot API token into the form. A maximum of 10 bot tokens can be entered
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FdErZu04WVgLRvtolOIfx%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Db7570307-3f9d-4b69-bdbd-e80b9a262d29&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4ea1944c&sv=2)

1.  Invite the newly created bot to the Telegram group
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FWhutXmBdTpoew7JrhKnE%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D6b665ba7-8785-426f-9047-5f6cd47ecbd1&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=2c9361c3&sv=2)

1.  Set group admin rights for your bot
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FXdy25ptJb8sA7RROYqT3%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D9bc30e3e-7a60-4d99-ba0b-d83462e75bf0&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=3b07add9&sv=2)

1.  Click the Test Push button to see if the message is sent successfully. If it fails, please check whether the group ID and bot token are correct, and whether Telegram has given the bot permission to send messages.
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F1zl7Se06F3DrsLuSB6WQ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Da11afd2f-3e9b-45c2-9adc-b70327ba5e52&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a71c3496&sv=2)

Click Test Push Button

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FHqJrYbciPxUxzMX7pFz8%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D06b55639-a598-4a7f-9eb0-893a95f4ed3e&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c40033b&sv=2)

Click Test Push Button

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fu73q84CHeOcjS5U21Ee4%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D2a398c0c-424b-48c3-895d-ec50f16740d9&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=cbbc936e&sv=2)

Message sent failed

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FkeAQ4AXAEsxlU16PiwkX%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De08b945b-de8c-4ddb-9789-46e4310a04b2&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=7396b172&sv=2)

Test message sent successfully

1.  Set message parameters: support setting transaction type (all/buy/sell), notification language, transaction amount (under development), and then click Save
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FRlxjX9KrHGfSv7TdKPWu%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D07958440-1e9a-45fe-9821-95f72e734715&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=cba923d1&sv=2)

1.  After successfully saving, the wallet transaction dynamics you follow will be pushed to the Telegram group in real time
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FMNFi08ffDkJeMFPhxOrN%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D67b3fd9b-eddb-4022-a275-6a83f39659c8&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4412a7f1&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/zero-latency-wallet-tracking-bot#frequently-asked-questions)

**Frequently Asked Questions**

**Q: Why can’t test messages be sent?**

**Solution:** In general, group IDs starting with -4 or -1 can be used to send test messages. If your Telegram account is registered with a virtual phone number, it may trigger Telegram’s security risk controls, causing the bot to fail to send messages within the group you created.

To troubleshoot:

1\. Try typing /groupid in the group. If @GMGN\_vip\_bot can send a response, it indicates that the group permissions are configured correctly.

2\. If the bot does not respond, try adding @GMGN\_vip\_bot as a group admin or invite a few more friends to the group. Then, try sending the /groupid command again to check if the bot can send messages.

Note: The group ID is not permanent. As the number of group members increases, the group ID may change from starting with -4 to starting with -1. In such cases, you will need to reconfigure the bot form for instant notifications.

[PreviousWallet Alert on Telegram](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram)
[NextGMGN TG Alert Channel＆Bot](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-tg-alert-channel-bot)

Last updated 3 months ago

*   [Zero-Latency Wallet Tracking Bot](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/zero-latency-wallet-tracking-bot#zero-latency-wallet-tracking-bot)
    
*   [Setup steps:](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/zero-latency-wallet-tracking-bot#setup-steps)
    
*   [Frequently Asked Questions](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/zero-latency-wallet-tracking-bot#frequently-asked-questions)
    

Copy

    /start@GMGN_vip_bot

# Auto Buy: Auto Buy ＆ Limit buy | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-buy-auto-buy-limit-buy.md)
.

Supported Chains: Solana

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-buy-auto-buy-limit-buy#id-1.-send-contract-to-buy-automatically-with-telegram-bot)

1\. Send contract to buy automatically with Telegram Bot


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Send the contract address (or pump.fun token webpage link) to the GMGN Sniper Bot (Telegram Bot), and the Bot will immediately buy the specified amount of tokens without multiple clicks.

1) Add GMGN Telegram Sniper Bot as a friend: [https://t.me/GMGN\_sol\_bot](https://t.me/GMGN_sol_bot)

2) Set the preset value of auto buy: send /start, click Settings - Auto buy to enter (or click /set from the lower-left menu of Bot to enter the Settings page)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fj8Mhd5Gnxw3Mrk0dDpKx%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D8cc449aa-dc9e-474a-8d0b-b2a1f29d9436&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4cae0c30&sv=2)

3) Click to turn on the auto buy, and then set the auto buy:

**Buy**: enter Auto Buy SOL amount for each transaction (now --) **Min Liq**: enter the minimum liquidity value to execute Auto Buy (now --). E.g. enter 1000, and the bot will Auto Buy only when the pool exceeds $1K. **Max MC**: enter the maximum token market cap to execute Auto Buy (now --). E.g. enter 250000, and the bot will Auto Buy only when the market cap is below $250K.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FFXUFacxsJCGanFzCdbJV%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7a46951b-e53c-49f2-a60f-c76e7bd3429c&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=90017d2d&sv=2)

4) 🎉 Successfully set!Send the token contract to bot, and the bot will auto buy at the preset purchase amount

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-buy-auto-buy-limit-buy#id-2.-limit-buy-order-with-gmgn-web)

2\. Limit Buy Order with GMGN web


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) Open the GMGN Trending page [https://gmgn.ai/trend?chain=sol](https://gmgn.ai/trend?chain=sol) , click on the hot token you want to buy

2) In the right area of the token details page, click to Buy Dip, then click to bind TG bot wallet, it will automatically jump to GMGN sniper robot, click "Yes" to complete the binding

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FYuH9lBpfLHlQJy0HwEUs%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D0660e286-4a3b-4bcc-b43e-04a6390a86d7&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c26aaef2&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FlpebUPBk3nB4tCfq8YyZ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Daba4c99c-d426-4465-a45d-56f450596f4d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8af44992&sv=2)

3) Return to GMGN website after binding successfully

*   Click on the bound TG wallet
    
*   Click to Buy Dip
    
*   Complete purchase quantity, slippage, anti-mev Settings
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fgr7gKnfyRlB1084N5mV8%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D530b7bec-4ded-48c8-957e-ceead1a175e8&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=b063db14&sv=2)

3) 🎉 Click to create order buy, and successfully complete the Buy Dip limit order!

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-buy-auto-buy-limit-buy#id-3.-limit-buy-order-with-telegram-bot)

3\. Limit Buy Order with Telegram Bot


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) Add GMGN Telegram Sniper Bot as a friend: [https://t.me/GMGN\_sol\_bot](https://t.me/GMGN_sol_bot)

2) Enter /start in the GMGN Sniper Bot, click Buy/Sell and enter token CA

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FgEakWKDuJuBqCl8cZiqT%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D71aa5d4e-e65c-464e-b457-d13512e5af30&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=2273739c&sv=2)

3) After entering the contract, the buy/sell interface will automatically pop up click the Limit. Then select the purchase SOL quantity button in the area, and also support custom purchase quantity (If you need to modify the preset purchase value, please click on the bot menu /set to set it)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FO2vSRxaOkMtPO3Avqi5D%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dd275d80a-6a7f-48d6-b328-4fc14bf77bcd&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=15e64e6&sv=2)

4) Set the trigger price (support input price, or positive or negative percentage), and check the validity period of the Limit Buy order (support 3 days /24 hours /1 hour)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FblDJQ985zlz0HOpciWNC%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D72e5bb0e-ac16-4142-a2ae-b99b90e11326&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=5a597a19&sv=2)

5) 🎉 Click to create order buy, and successfully complete the auto buy (Buy Dip) limit order!

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FipZ8S9eWiyYMU9MaxnKo%252FSnipaste_2024-08-18_03-52-31.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D5a847b01-27f1-4767-86c8-954685b0fbbd&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c21cb1f3&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F7lLgw2TSUTYHhXYhCKG0%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc76fbe86-fe2a-467a-928a-0b3ee08ded2b&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=2173fd2&sv=2)

# 🤝🏻 Cooperation-Referral:🌈Invite Bots to Telegram group to earn trading commissions automatically | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-referral-invite-bots-to-telegram-group-to-earn-trading-commissions-automatically.md)
.

**Invite GMGN Bots to your Telegram groups. Group members can check contract information and automatically receive smart wallet transaction notifications. You can configure a referral code so that when group members click on the message link and trade on the GMGN website or Bot, you can earn trading commissions.**

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-referral-invite-bots-to-telegram-group-to-earn-trading-commissions-automatically#specific-steps)

**Specific Steps:**


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-referral-invite-bots-to-telegram-group-to-earn-trading-commissions-automatically#id-1.-generate-a-referral-code-and-apply-for-a-higher-commission-rate)

**1\. Generate a Referral Code and Apply for a Higher Commission Rate**


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Please click the link below to generate the GMGN referral code 👇🏻

[💻Referral Link](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/referral-link)

**Apply for a Higher Commission Rate**

Please generate the referral codes first, then fill out the Google application form: [https://forms.gle/EhofPCZ1g9fXaA6S7](https://forms.gle/EhofPCZ1g9fXaA6S7)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-referral-invite-bots-to-telegram-group-to-earn-trading-commissions-automatically#id-2.-invite-the-bots-to-your-groups)

2\. **Invite the Bots to your Groups**


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1）Invite the** **Contract Query Bot** **to the Group:**

[https://t.me/GMGNAI\_bot](https://t.me/GMGNAI_bot)

Purpose: Post contracts in the group to automatically output token prices, pool liquidity, insiders and other token analysis data.Supported Chains: ETH, Solana, Base, BSC![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FxtH4VWB5nTAqpDiWxkM7%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7227f23b-365a-4316-ac6a-fdde46177654&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4cc24464&sv=2)

**2）Invite Group** **Smart Money Tracking** **Bot:**

[https://t.me/alert\_gmgnbot](https://t.me/alert_gmgnbot)

Purpose: Automatically send wallet transactions to the group (enter /set in the group to set the wallet to be tracked, and a message will be sent if a purchase exceeds 1 SOL).

Supported Chains: Solana (ETH and Base are under development)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FJHydeINWBCQQKZMf0yja%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D54ad3230-aa87-4aa4-9fcf-0e3b6d0cbcb3&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=36815352&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-referral-invite-bots-to-telegram-group-to-earn-trading-commissions-automatically#id-3.grant-admin-permissions-to-the-bots)

3.Grant Admin Permissions to the Bots


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F6edJWQnXJn64lOIXGN7v%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D4176891b-c292-4b2c-94b7-fd9db7826346&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=e46bbbac&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FtiZcb1EFeDDq3RoNLgbn%252FUntitled.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D2179a204-8274-4c52-80a0-5aa22fbc76cf&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4312cb6&sv=2)

**4\. Configure Message Links with Referral Codes**


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Group Smart Money Tracking Bot:**

*   Bot Link: [https://t.me/alert\_gmgnbot](https://t.me/alert_gmgnbot)
    
*   Configure Referral Code: Enter /set in the group, click “+ Referral Code,” and start configuration.
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FldQaKuuQV4ggYaw1yLk2%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D179e98f9-c3fe-4e8e-a197-af2ae434c220&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=7a551ae9&sv=2)

*   Configure Referral Code: Please fill out the Google application form and include the group ID in the remarks: [https://forms.gle/EhofPCZ1g9fXaA6S7](https://forms.gle/EhofPCZ1g9fXaA6S7)

# Wallet Radar | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-radar.md)
.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FBRpk7awYLZqon991up4V%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dbb574940-b7d2-41fa-97aa-01ba2daa90a5&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=cad6d785&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-radar#tui-te-gua-dao-shuo-ming)

1\. Wallet Radar Instructions

*   Supports custom scanning of multiple tokens for high-profit addresses: Select multiple tokens to analyze shared holding addresses and high-profit active addresses, quickly discover degen wallets
    
*   Instant Track & Copy Trade: After filtering addresses, directly add to Tracking list or instant Copy Trade
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-radar#id-2.-wallet-classification)

2\. Wallet Classification

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FmlxduBKHApU5H3jI8pTy%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D60f21a72-ecc6-4efa-8f2e-f546e8a611ed&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=7efd3219&sv=2)

*   Most Bought: Displays wallet addresses with the highest number of selected token purchases
    
*   Highest Profit: Displays wallet addresses with the highest realized profits from selected tokens
    
*   Earliest Bought: Displays wallet addresses that purchased selected tokens the earliest
    
*   Shared Holdings: Displays wallet addresses currently holding multiple selected tokens
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-radar#id-3.-usage-steps)

3\. Usage Steps

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fr0R9PPPLyN6onrUb318R%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dfa1cdfa6-d5b1-46db-a015-25a2f134b291&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=855b6f92&sv=2)

*   Left Panel: Auto-Calculate
    
    *   Click to automatically fetch wallet addresses trading the top 5 trending tokens, and compute the wallet list based on different “wallet category” algorithms.Right Panel: Custom
        
    
*   Right Panel: Select Token Calculation
    
    *   Click to open the search bar, enter token ticker/contract address
        
    *   Click a token to highlight its color block, confirming addition to the Radar list
        
    *   Supports simultaneous calculation of up to 10 tokens’ wallet data
        
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-radar#id-4.-other-features)

4\. Other features

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fons6Yi8fRtdhHczJpKUY%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D172df5b9-9f5e-42be-b4fb-6e5677631a29&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6a1f577d&sv=2)

*   Token Matched: Tokens currently selected that this wallet has traded
    
*   Toggle Button Next to Token Matched: Click to switch display between token avatar and color
    
*   Hover over Wallet: Synchronously displays matched tokens above when hovering over the wallet
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FRRBJRaPOukaSjCBnkZC9%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D72248547-f0f1-480e-b552-934dd2331132&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4e142b89&sv=2)

*   Interface Toggle Button: Click to switch between list view / compact card view
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fjkxd5iT27D1A0nuiuR8N%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dfb755773-b321-4cd5-8207-55669e12fecb&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=66c783d0&sv=2)

*   Recalculate: After wallet token matched data calculation is complete, stop real-time data fetches and updates. Click to recalculate current selected token data.
    
*   Export to Track: Instant import wallet addresses from current "Wallet Classification" to your tracking list
    
*   Copy Trade: Quick setup to copy trade, mirroring this address's trades.
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fjnv8s93pRaiau3EB3Oxw%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7ace1424-c0e3-491b-9e09-8999007d12fe&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=50d3590e&sv=2)

*   Click Wallet Radar settings button to show/hide and sort data items
    

Try GMGN Wallet Radar now 👇🏻

*   Web: https://gmgn.ai/trade

# Insider Traders,Snipers,First 70 Buyers | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/insider-traders-snipers-first-70-buyers.md)
.

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/insider-traders-snipers-first-70-buyers#disclaimer-the-holding-status-of-insider-traders-snipers-and-the-first-70-buyers-cannot-guarantee-re)

⚠️ Disclaimer: The holding status of insider traders, snipers, and the first 70 buyers cannot guarantee real-time accuracy and is provided for auxiliary reference only.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/insider-traders-snipers-first-70-buyers#insider-trading-holder-ratio)

Insider Trading Holder Ratio


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FBR0XxwbSwZyuZIqOQvXj%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De3caa8b9-4c84-4653-a9aa-34b5568fde99&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=1568fdcd&sv=2)

*   Insider Trading: Wallets that did not buy tokens after trading opened, but hold tokens, may indicate that the token creator's holdings were transferred to multiple wallets to secretly sell off. Typically, legitimate projects distribute these through airdrops to users, and it is necessary to check the official Twitter for any airdrop events.
    
*   Insider Trading Holder Ratio: The proportion of holdings by insider trading wallets to the total token supply, the higher the ratio, the more concerning it is.
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/insider-traders-snipers-first-70-buyers#snipers-first-70-buyers-top-10-holders)

Snipers, First 70 buyers, Top 10 Holders


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FahEZ7JsWpHPnAXF8aCTx%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D6f0afd35-d443-42ad-b1d6-07b17739288b&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=2fbbda03&sv=2)

**Top 70 Buyer Wallets:** Wallets that were the first 70 to buy tokens after the opening of trading.

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/insider-traders-snipers-first-70-buyers#wallet-labels)

**Wallet Labels:**

*   **Snipers:** Buyers who purchased within the first few blocks after trading opened.
    
*   **Scammer Wallets:** Wallets that frequently buy rug pull tokens, suspected to be secondary accounts of the token creators involved in rug pull schemes.
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/insider-traders-snipers-first-70-buyers#explanation)

Explanation:


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F45U20QMmTqU6hlZ6y9LH%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D193ee83f-4198-4456-bc58-39d86a3ac1ff&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a5411abc&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/insider-traders-snipers-first-70-buyers#holding-status-explanation)

**Holding Status Explanation:**

*   **Hold**: The number of tokens bought initially remains the same as the current holding.
    
*   **Buy More**: More tokens were bought after the initial buy.
    
*   **Sell Part**: Some tokens were sold after the initial buy, but there are still holdings left (on the Solana blockchain, it's temporarily impossible to distinguish between transferred and sold tokens).
    
*   **Sell All**: All tokens bought initially have been sold.
    
*   **Transferred**: No tokens were sold, but a portion was transferred, and there are still holdings remaining.
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/insider-traders-snipers-first-70-buyers#statistical-percentage-explanation)

**Statistical Percentage Explanation:**

*   **Total Bought**: The amount of tokens initially bought by the first 70 buyers divided by the total token supply.
    
*   **Current Total Holdings**: The actual amount of tokens currently held by the first 70 buyers divided by the total token supply.
    
*   **Top 10 Holders**: Wallets currently ranked in the top 10 by holding amount (excluding liquidity pool addresses, with a list that changes in real time); the amount of tokens these wallets currently hold divided by the total token supply.

# Wallet Alert on Telegram | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram.md)
.

*   Monitor Solana wallet notification Bot [https://t.me/GMGN\_alert\_bot](https://t.me/GMGN_alert_bot)
    
*   Monitor ETH wallet notification Bot [https://t.me/GMGN\_ETH\_alert\_bot](https://t.me/GMGN_ETH_alert_bot)
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram#id-1.-deng-lu-telegram-zhang-hao)

1\. Log in to your Telegram account


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

> Notice:
> 
> 1.  Please check the login account type in the upper right corner to see whether it is a plug-in wallet login or a Telegram account login. If you are not sure, please log out and re-select connect Telegram to log in using a TG account.
>     
> 2.  If you often log in with the plug-in wallet and bind the Telegram Alert Bot, you can continue to receive notifications as long as you do not click to unbind. Once unbinded, rebinding to Telegram is not supported yet. You need to export the follow list to the Telegram account follow list (see the FAQ below for this tutorial).
>     

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FRgzKrK1w9TsmVCgAVlZt%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D5a814569-18db-4c46-9845-4797eeed760b&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=1a17a234&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram#id-2.-guan-zhu-xi-huan-de-cong-ming-qian-qian-bao)

2\. Follow your favorite smart money wallet


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Visit [https://gmgn.ai/discover](https://gmgn.ai/discover)
 to find smart money that is interested

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fi5u88Y3ZEZtrPkqEUlxi%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De6a41608-cde7-4eab-89bc-9b1e230e7f0a&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=1bf06575&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram#id-3.-tg-bot-jian-kong-qian-bao-jiao-yi-xiao-xi-tong-zhi)

3\. TG Bot monitors wallet transaction message notifications


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Visit Telegram Alert Bot to receive transaction notifications from your followed wallets.

> Note: The website can follow up to 100 wallets; the /add command in Telegram Alert Bot can follow up to 10 wallets

*   Monitor Solana Wallet Notification Bot [https://t.me/GMGN\_alert\_bot](https://t.me/GMGN_alert_bot)
    
*   Monitor ETH wallet notification Bot [https://t.me/GMGN\_ETH\_alert\_bot](https://t.me/GMGN_ETH_alert_bot)
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FX1vLauvqDVOVna0pmfzP%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dbc514915-a171-4cfa-8954-f2b658c487bf&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=1784daf1&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram#id-4.-she-zhi-tong-zhi)

4\. Set up notifications


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Pause notification:
    

Visit the website [https://gmgn.ai/follow](https://gmgn.ai/follow)
 and click on the right side of the follow list to close the notification

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FpBVKegxpidB5cizW0glA%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dabde7cca-e19f-4070-a724-ed5130e57b5d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=86daf83b&sv=2)

1.  Set notification type
    

Visit Telegram Alert Bot, send command /set, you can choose all /only buy /only sell

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252F7aHD2FAynmxewA7uldyi%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D47e133a7-9c67-4ec8-8f1a-c51d5398cbcb&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=609d68c3&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram#id-5.-chang-jian-wen-ti)

5\. Frequently Asked Questions


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram#id-1.-cha-jian-qian-bao-deng-lu-shi-ru-he-bang-ding-telegram-alert-bot)

**1\. How to bind Telegram Alert Bot when logging in to the plugin wallet?**

A: The plugin wallet does not support binding to Telegram Alert Bot. Please export your plugin wallet follow list and then import it into the follow list of the log-in Telegram account. Specific steps:

1) Visit the GMGN website and select the plugin wallet to log in

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FT42tV1n8j96UuYAxO30u%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df10a1a8f-00fe-45ea-8e09-5a972bb8b004&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=bca2a6aa&sv=2)

2) Visit [https://gmgn.ai/follow](https://gmgn.ai/follow)
 and select Batch Export Wallet Address and Note Name

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FJWVTUpAlw1Cj8SHjGGbL%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D24582cd5-7424-4d4b-9958-e3f21b4622f5&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=e58c7ea3&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FjvIf9pYqP4cxuF6wooFJ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D87054ea9-33d7-4979-8ea5-adb06dfa2f1f&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=3ec0758f&sv=2)

3) Log out of the plugin wallet, re-login to Telegram, visit [https://gmgn.ai/follow](https://gmgn.ai/follow)
 , and select bulk import of wallet addresses and notes.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FT2db7YmEu4pc1y73TqS0%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D4d51f147-c86f-42cf-9461-002d81c9a7b4&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=94abee8&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram#id-2.-jian-kong-qian-bao-tong-zhi-diu-xiao-xi)

2\. Monitor wallet notifications for lost messages

answer:

1.  **Reason 1: Telegram message notifications push frequency limit**
    

> Telegram limits the number of messages that can be sent per second for each bot application. The more people use the bot, the more messages are pushed, and the more likely it is that Telegram will limit the rate. GMGN cannot currently solve the problem of message push being limited.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FBNtQhA7eVGgcwFhgzVaP%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D94a2ce13-e301-45e3-933b-e1b841ef7a26&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=3d127d02&sv=2)

1.  **Reason 2: The plugin wallet has been unbound：**
    

Because Telegram Alert Bot message = plugin wallet login follow list + Telegram login account follow list. If the plugin wallet is unbound from TG, the notification bot will only push the TG login follow list.

> Solution: You can bulk export the follow list of the plug-in wallet, and then import it into the attention list of TG login, and support retaining the note name

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FLOsdpPOBq2OVL7NGlChV%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D609f48d0-84d5-4d9d-b2e3-dd1db38fdb06&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=d0e260b8&sv=2)

1.  **Reason 3: The Telegram notification switch may be turned off. Please check** [**https://gmgn.ai/follow**](https://gmgn.ai/follow)
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fc8HjAx3iIDHPls1AYs56%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1a1f04ea-8532-46d7-aba4-5ae9785298b1&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=36072052&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram#id-3.-cha-jian-qian-bao-deng-lu-de-lao-yong-hu-ru-he-huan-bang-telegram-alert-bot-li-yi-bang-ding-de)

3\. How to change the plug-in wallet bound to Telegram Alert Bot for old users who have logged in with the plug-in wallet

Answer: Telegram Alert Bot does not allow changing the plugin wallet address. It can be unbound, but it is not allowed to be bound again after unbinding. You can only use TG to log in on the GMGN website and receive wallet notifications followed by the TG account.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fa77fdJoMxDlqgxKdyLwf%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D5b9cfbc9-f47a-4338-bcb3-5188aaed17f2&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6ce015db&sv=2)

# TG Wallet: Connect TG, Multi-Wallet system | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system.md)
.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FgcjA11V8lk7dFrWI4bG1%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D2cd9379b-9026-410a-b662-bac78a4796fb&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=15f362e0&sv=2)

*   Flexibly choose multiple ways to connect to GMGN
    
*   「Connect Telegram, Connect Phantom, App Scan Code Login」 allows you to use Anti-MEV and various GMGN automation functions.Trade with plugin wallet doesn't support these features
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system#id-1.-deng-lu-telegram-zhang-hao-gmgn-tg-qian-bao-deng-lu)

1\. Connect Telegram (GMGN TG wallet login)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FoemcQX45uDzDm27ypSbg%252FGroup%25201312322481.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D743f01d9-a1dc-4cd1-a159-4998b08c085e&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c16def7d&sv=2)

*   Click Connect in the upper right corner and click Connect Telegram
    
*   After jumping to Telegram site, click Open Telegram to jump to [@gmgnaibot](https://t.me/gmgnaibot)
     login bot
    
*   Then the bot will send a new login link. Click Login Website to complete the TG wallet login site
    
*   When you login with GMGN TG wallet for the first time, a new wallet address will be automatically generated in the corresponding chain; the yellow frame parts are the trading bots corresponding to each chain, click them to enter, please follow this tutorial to export the private key: [TG Wallet: Import ＆ Export private key, Deposit, Withdraw](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-import-export-private-key-deposit-withdraw)
    
*   ⚠️ Please note that a login link can only be used once; you can copy the login link to the browser you want to use
    
*   ⚠️ Please note that the multi-wallet system currently only supports direct buy/sell transactions
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system#id-2.-duo-qian-bao-guan-li)

2\. Connect Phantom

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FQAHCKOv4Ax1krhSYJMfy%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7eb79fc9-11c4-4b6a-8cf6-a8e691580776&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=cd97fe3b&sv=2)

*   Support Phantom Wallet for Login, Custodial Account Creation, and Transactions
    
    *   Details: GMGN will create a multi-chain custodial wallet account based on your Phantom wallet (single-chain or multi-chain, requiring at least one Solana chain wallet). New wallet addresses are generated for each chain
        
    *   If you need to log in with Phantom on a new device, please import the same wallet account from the old device into the new device Phantom in advance to ensure that you log in to the same escrow account
        
    
*   **For the safety of user wallet funds, GMGN all chains** ( SOL chain / EVM chain / Tron chain ) **are prohibited from exporting private keys**
    
    *   Phantom's escrow account supports Multi-wallet systems
        
    *   SOL chain Deposit, Withdrawal, Consolidaten, Distribution, withdrawal of meme coins, please read: [3\. Multi-wallet management](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system#id-2.-duo-qian-bao-guan-li-1)
        
    *   For other chain Deposit, Withdrawal, please read: [TG Wallet: Import ＆ Export private key, Deposit, Withdraw](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-import-export-private-key-deposit-withdraw)
        
    
*   Phantom custodial accounts support new user referral across all chains, with independent referral data
    
*   ⚠️ Note: To trade with Phantom Wallet, use the “Trade with Wallet” option at the bottom. Data (Follow / Watchlist) from the two login methods are not shared, functioning as separate accounts
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system#id-2.-duo-qian-bao-guan-li-1)

3\. Multi-wallet management

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system#id-1-multi-wallet-management-page)

1) Multi-wallet management page:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FRwUh0VRZBcOgKgX9vl9T%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D153a9726-4ad2-4380-a89b-067c5e9803c8&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f65f8f43&sv=2)

*   After logging in with TG Wallet, click Wallet Manager in the upper right corner to enter the multi-wallet management page
    

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system#id-2-create-wallet-import-wallet-archived-operation-log)

2) Create Wallet, Import Wallet, Archived, Operation Log:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FXfPuOmqJNmSptkBd1yrX%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Da4f1a430-9766-42f1-bb4e-8db7d4592e86&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=cb5a4ce6&sv=2)

*   \[Create wallet\]: Click to generate a new SOL wallet with one click; create up to 10 wallets
    
*   \[Import wallet\]: Click to enter the SOL chain single chain wallet address private key to complete the new wallet import; import up to 10 wallets
    
*   \[Archived\]: After clicking, the archive list pops up and the wallet can be restored
    
*   \[Operation record\]: Click to view your imported private key and other operation records
    

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system#id-3-manage-wallet)

3) Manage wallet:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FCt4xgdfgRJ0y8uKkp00Y%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7c00f75a-b334-4834-9b50-feb1061f4637&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f0f5cba4&sv=2)

*   \[Make Primary\]: Click to set this wallet as the main wallet, it will be your default trading wallet. You can also select the multi-wallets for trading on the trading page (Token page)
    
*   \[Wallet Rename\]: Rename your wallet to distinguish them
    
*   \[Archive\]: Suspend the use of this wallet
    
    *   After the wallet is archived, all open orders, wallet copiers, CTO copier automated strategies of this address will be closed automatically! Ensure all are settled before archiving. To use again, please restore from the archive list
        
    

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system#id-4-deposit-withdrawal-consolidaten-distribution)

4) Deposit, Withdrawal, Consolidaten, Distribution:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FRebdkE7a9rMQ4T68qcTv%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D171763e3-3315-46ea-9d1f-1f6c2165dc6f&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a5106ffb&sv=2)

**Deposit, Withdrawal:**

*   Click \[Deposit\] or \[Withdraw\] to complete the deposit and withdrawal of SOL in the wallet. For more details: [🔄TG Wallet: Import ＆ Export private key, Deposit, Withdraw](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-import-export-private-key-deposit-withdraw)
    

**Consolidate, Distribution (extraction of meme coins):**

*   \[Consolidate\] Multi-to-one transfer Transferring token assets from multiple wallet addresses to a single wallet address, including SOL and meme coins
    
*   \[Distribution\] One-to-multi transfer Transferring token assets from one wallet to multiple wallets at once, either proportionally or in fixed amounts, including SOL and meme coins
    
*   Proper use enables the withdrawal of meme coins and SOL to a designated address.
    
*   Consolidate and Distribution require 2FA verification and only display tokens with USD value greater than 10 USDT.
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system#id-3.-duo-qian-bao-jiao-yi)

4\. Multi-wallet trading

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FZSBZJez0Jq5wry4T30WL%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D4265aab5-c694-4fb9-8b3b-eca4d7000c70&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=bf4049f1&sv=2)

*   On the token page, click the multi-wallet part, check the wallets to be used for the trading, then click Select Wallets to ensure
    
*   After the select trading wallets, click Buy xx SOL, and the multi-wallets you selected will buy this token at same time
    
*   After the select trading wallets, click Sell xx SOL, and the multi-wallets you selected will sell the percentage of this token at same time. For example: if you sell 50%, each wallet will sell 50% of the holding separately
    

[PreviousGMGN TG Swap Bot - ETH](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-tg-swap-bot-eth)
[NextTG Wallet: Import ＆ Export private key, Deposit, Withdraw](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-import-export-private-key-deposit-withdraw)

# 🤝🏻 Cooperation-Script:💵How to Quickly Create an Automated Script for Trading with GMGN Bot | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-script-how-to-quickly-create-an-automated-script-for-trading-with-gmgn-bot.md)
.

_**Note: This tutorial requires some programming skills and**_ _**knowledge of network security to avoid Telegram account theft.**_

You can use the Telegram API to automatically send token contract addresses to the GMGN Sniper Bot, enabling **immediate buying and selling, as well as creating limit buy/sell orders.**

Suitable scenarios include:

1.  Monitoring smart money signals for automatic buying and limit sell orders
    
2.  Monitoring on-chain trading signals and CTO signals for automatic buying and limit sell orders
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-script-how-to-quickly-create-an-automated-script-for-trading-with-gmgn-bot#specific-steps)

**Specific Steps:**


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-script-how-to-quickly-create-an-automated-script-for-trading-with-gmgn-bot#id-1.-monitor-gmgn-trading-signals-and-smart-money)

**1.** 🔔 **Monitor GMGN Trading Signals and Smart Money**


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-script-how-to-quickly-create-an-automated-script-for-trading-with-gmgn-bot#id-1-subscribe-to-gmgn-signal)

**1)** 🔔 **Subscribe to GMGN Signal**

*   Join the signal group at [https://t.me/gmgnsignals](https://t.me/gmgnsignals)
    
*   Receive specialty signal messages (10+ signals available, more are in development):
    
    *   CTO Signal
        
    *   Update DEX Screener Social Infos
        
    *   PUMP Update DEX Screener Social Infos
        
    *   PUMP FDV Surge
        
    *   Solana FDV Surge
        
    *   Smart Money FOMO
        
    *   KOL FOMO
        
    *   DEV Burnt Alert
        
    *   All Time High Price
        
    *   Heavy Bought
        
    *   Sniper New
        
    
    ![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FgnTdHQyLBQC5e8jH8Jfm%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D06044d37-5691-4c04-a634-dcc3f5763e6d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=bf0611b0&sv=2)
    

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-script-how-to-quickly-create-an-automated-script-for-trading-with-gmgn-bot#id-2-follow-smart-money)

**2)** 💰**Follow Smart Money**

*   Visit the [GMGN.AI](http://gmgn.ai/)
     Smart Money leaderboard to find high win-rate smart money that matches your trading style at [https://gmgn.ai/discover/?chain=sol](https://gmgn.ai/discover/?chain=sol)
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FjLOA4WLmXlgP3iqU11JO%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De74bb662-f169-4361-a689-ce3c2bb4042b&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=7a4b44b7&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-script-how-to-quickly-create-an-automated-script-for-trading-with-gmgn-bot#id-2.-apply-for-telegram-app-api)

**2.** 🙋🏼‍♀️ **Apply for Telegram App API**


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Log in at [https://my.telegram.org/auth](https://my.telegram.org/auth)
    
*   Create a Telegram app, fill out the form, and obtain the app’s **api\_id** and **api\_hash** (Note: Do not disclose these to any third parties to prevent Telegram account theft). For detailed instructions, refer to the official Telegram documentation at [https://core.telegram.org/api/obtaining\_api\_id](https://core.telegram.org/api/obtaining_api_id)
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-script-how-to-quickly-create-an-automated-script-for-trading-with-gmgn-bot#id-3.-set-up-the-automation-script)

**3.** 🤖 **Set Up the Automation Script**


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   You need to write an automation script or search for open-source projects on [github.com](http://github.com/)
     with similar functionality (Note: Assess code security to avoid Telegram account theft).
    
*   Automation script code logic:
    
    *   Use the **api\_id** and **api\_hash** obtained above to receive messages from the GMGN signal group or get trading signals from other channels/groups, or monitor smart money on-chain transactions (e.g., subscribe to a paid plan from a Solana RPC provider like Alchemy to use WebSocket for monitoring specified wallet transactions).
        
    *   Based on the received signal messages, create your own token filtering conditions and trading strategies (extract token contract address).
        
    *   Send trading commands to [GMGN Sniper Bot](https://t.me/GMGN_sol03_bot)
        :
        
        *   Method 1 (Simpler, faster): Send the token contract address. You need to enable the automatic buy and sell features of the GMGN Sniper Bot first (pre-set stop-loss and take-profit orders; when buying, it will automatically place a limit sell order). — This feature is in development and will be available soon.
            
        *   Method 2 (More flexible parameters): Send trading commands, such as immediate buy/sell or creating limit buy/sell orders. The trading commands are as follows:
            
        
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FXGY7nj49j7KAVa7A5pYu%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D2303f31e-bc65-4de5-8ef9-5ef279856a40&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=750d1121&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-script-how-to-quickly-create-an-automated-script-for-trading-with-gmgn-bot#automation-script-setup-complete)

**🎉 Automation Script Setup Complete**


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

It is recommended to start with a small amount to test your trading strategy.

If you are interested in automated trading strategies, feel free to join the GMGN official group for discussions at [https://t.me/gmgnai](https://t.me/gmgnai)

Copy

    Buy Immediately
    /buy ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 0.5
    Indicates buy BOME token with 0.5 SOL immediately
    
    Sell Immediately
    /sell ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 50
    /sell ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 50%
    Indicates sell 50% of BOME token holdings immediately
    
    Create Limit Buy Order at Trigger Price
    /create limitbuy ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 0.5@0.1 -exp 3600
    Indicates create limit buy order for BOME token, buy 0.5 SOL, trigger price $0.1, expires in 1h (3600 seconds)
    
    Create Limit Sell Order at Trigger Price
    /create limitsell ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 50@0.1 -exp 3600
    Indicates create limit sell order for BOME token, sell 50% holdings, trigger price $0.1, expires in 1h (3600 seconds)
    
    Tip: If the '-exp' parameter is omitted, the limit orders default expiration time is 3 days.

# Referral Link | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/referral-link.md)
.

* * *

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/referral-link#id-1.-obtain-referral-code)

1\. Obtain **Referral Code**


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

> The GMGN website and Telegram share the same referral code. You can obtain the referral code through the following two methods.

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/referral-link#method-1-obtain-the-referral-code-through-the-gmgn.ai-website)

Method 1: Obtain the referral code through the GMGN.AI website.

Visit the [GMGN.AI](https://gmgn.ai/)
 website, click on "Connect Telegram" button and after refreshing the page, the value of the "ref" parameter in the browser’s address bar will be your referral code.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FOB2TfBCxziMvX46Unzz0%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df8eeb8ec-d0d8-496c-81d6-5585849fa7dd&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=e4008e99&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FcEnHsMUA6qUUACy6jlec%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Ddce477bd-ec7c-4975-9eca-31c5dcac9a59&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=27a7872d&sv=2)

Referral code is 7rpqjHdf

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/referral-link#method-2-obtain-the-referral-code-through-the-telegram-bot)

Method 2: Obtain the referral code through the Telegram Bot

Visit one of the following GMGN Bots (either one, the referral code will be the same) to get your referral code:

*   [https://t.me/gmgnaibot](https://t.me/gmgnaibot)
     (Highly recommended)
    
*   [https://t.me/GMGN\_sol\_bot](https://t.me/GMGN_sol_bot)
    
*   [https://t.me/GMGN\_bsc\_bot](https://t.me/GMGN_bsc_bot)
    
*   [https://t.me/GMGN\_swap\_bot](https://t.me/GMGN_swap_bot)
    
*   [https://t.me/GMGN\_tron\_bot](https://t.me/GMGN_tron_bot)
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252Fi2y01M1c64vr38wg8qF3%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D89ec2e6d-857e-4c5f-aa7a-2f2c8f721fe7&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=66a98c6&sv=2)

* * *

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/referral-link#id-2.-referral-link)

2\. Referral link


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GMGN offers various formats of invitation links. If you’re a KOL, you can use the first format to earn both web and bot trading commissions from a single link. If you manage your own Telegram signal channel, you can try using the second or third formats.

1.  **Invitation to log in to the GMGN.AI website and trade via the Telegram Bot (Highly recommended):**
    

**Applicable scenario:** Quickly invite friends, and your referral code will be automatically bound when they click the link. Whether your friends are using a web extension wallet or the GMGN Telegram Bot’s private key wallet, and regardless of which chain they trade on, you can earn a commission from the trading fees.

1.  **Invitation to use a Telegram trading bot for a specific chain:**
    

**Applicable scenario:** Promoting a specific chain or managing your own Telegram signal channel, this link can direct users to the Telegram trading bot for the specified chain.

1.  **GMGN official website, channel page, specific token, wallet web invitation link**
    

**Applicable scenario:** Promoting a specific chain or managing your own Telegram signal channel, this link directs users to the specified page. After logging into their Telegram account on the website, the user’s referral code will be automatically bound.

* * *

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/referral-link#id-3.-view-referral-commission-report)

3\. View Referral Commission Report


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Visit GMGN’s referral commission report page:

*   ETH [https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=eth](https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=eth)
    
*   Solana [https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=sol](https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=sol)
    
*   Base [https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=base](https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=base)
    
*   Tron [https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=tron](https://gmgn.ai/referral?chain=tron)
    

For the older version of the commission report, where the referral code was not generated by the Telegram Bot, please log in using a browser extension wallet and then visit the referral pages for each chain mentioned above.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3168316658-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FcwvUtvEIyqrWZx7sPliY%252Fuploads%252FWRkDg81bIthvmewirOzo%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D2ca48735-edb4-4f03-b9be-59018b76ff0d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=67a9c303&sv=2)

# GMGN Vulnerability Bounty Program | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program#program-overview)

Program Overview


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Safety and security are our top priorities at GMGN. To eliminate system vulnerabilities and further improve GMGN services, GMGN has launched a vulnerability bounty program for all security researchers.

We will evaluate all reported security issues based on their impact on users and assets, and rewards will be paid in USDT once your submission is accepted.

Please be advised that **only** reports with a **detailed description** of the vulnerability **and** a **complete, working proof of concept** are eligible for rewards.

If you would like to report a security vulnerability, claim your bounty rewards, or have any questions about this program, please feel free to contact us at [**security@gmgn.ai**](mailto:security@gmgn.ai)
, or submit your report at [https://hackenproof.com/programs/gmgn-web-and-mobile](https://hackenproof.com/programs/gmgn-web-and-mobile)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program#scope)

**Scope**


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Websites and application ( \*.gmgn.ai )
    
*   GMGN Android App
    
*   GMGN iOS App
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program#rewards)

**Rewards**


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Once your submission is accepted, please provide **one** of the following to receive your reward:

1.  **Your GMGN account**, or
    
2.  **Your USDT wallet address**
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program#level-of-severity-and-reward-range)

**Level of Severity and Reward Range**

Extreme: Up to 1,000,000 USDT

*   Vulnerabilities that threaten core or essential assets, potentially leading to major business disruptions or unauthorized access to GMGN wallets, funds, or private keys.
    

Critical: 3,000 - 10,000 USDT

*   Vulnerabilities that undermine user assets’ security
    
*   Vulnerabilities that bypass the applications or procedures under normal trading logic
    
*   Vulnerabilities that could remotely access essential information and authentication information of users
    
*   Vulnerabilities related to key generation, encryption, decryption, signing, and verification
    

High: 1,000 - 3,000 USDT

*   Vulnerabilities that lead to high-risk information leakage
    
*   Vulnerabilities with a similar impact as critical vulnerabilities but are dependent on specific prerequisites
    

Medium: 300 -1,000 USDT

*   Vulnerabilities that lead to the leakage of part of the users’ info through interaction or financial fraud
    
*   Vulnerabilities that cause GMGN to be unable to respond to users’ requests from the web or mobile Apps.
    

Low: 50 - 300 USDT

*   Vulnerabilities due to product design defects that do not affect the security of users’ assets.
    
*   Vulnerabilities that lead to Denial of Service of core GMGN services
    

To report an issue **without** security impact, please contact GMGN 24/7 Online Support (Telegram: [![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftelegram.org%2Fimg%2Ffavicon-16x16.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=3bf3226a&sv=2)💎GMGN Degen Group - Official](https://t.me/gmgnai)
 )

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program#reports-not-qualified-for-the-rewards)

Reports **NOT** Qualified for the Rewards

The following issues are **not** qualified for any reward:

*   Theoretical vulnerabilities **without** an actual proof of concept
    
*   Email verification defects, expiration of password reset links, and password complexity policies
    
*   Invalid or missing SPF (Sender Policy Framework) records (incomplete or missing SPF/DKIM/DMARC)
    
*   Clickjacking/UI redressing with minimal security impact
    
*   Email or mobile enumeration (e.g., the ability to identify emails through password resetting)
    
*   Information leakage with minimal security impact (e.g., stack traces, path disclosure, directory listings, logs)
    
*   Internally known issues, recurring issues, or issues already published
    
*   Tabnabbing
    
*   Self-XSS
    
*   Vulnerabilities only applicable to outdated versions of browsers or platforms
    
*   Vulnerabilities related to auto-fill web forms
    
*   Use of vulnerable libraries already known without an actual proof of concept
    
*   Lack of security flags in cookies
    
*   Issues related to unsafe SSL/TLS cipher suites or protocol versions
    
*   Content spoofing
    
*   Issues related to cache control
    
*   Vulnerabilities exposing internal IP addresses or domains
    
*   Lack of security headers that do not lead to direct exploitation
    
*   CSRF with negligible security impact (e.g., adding to favorites, subscribing to non-vital features)
    
*   Vulnerabilities that require root/jailbreak
    
*   Vulnerabilities that require physical access to the user’s device
    
*   Issues with no security impact (e.g., failure to load a web page)
    

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program#terms-and-conditions)

**Terms & Conditions**

*   GMGN reserves the right to make the final interpretation of the bounty program and retains the discretion to terminate or change the rewards or bounty rules.
    
*   In case of multiple reports regarding the same issue, GMGN will reward the earliest submission, regardless of how the issue was reported.
    
*   The review of reports generally takes approximately **1–2 weeks**. GMGN shall decide the result of any review at its own discretion.
    
*   Rewards will be issued within **2 weeks** after a vulnerability report is approved and verified. We will notify you by email once the reward is issued.
    
*   Security researchers conducting or facilitating malicious attacks on GMGN will **not** be qualified for any reward.

# 🤝🏻 Cooperation-API:🕹Integrate GMGN ETH/Base/BSC Trading API | GMGN Tutorial

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api.md)
.

✅ Approved: API Key sent to your email ❌ Rejected: No notification sent

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api#authentication)

Authentication

*   GMGN provides professional users with SOL/BSC/Base/ETH Trading API. Access is granted solely based on sufficient **Trading Volume** on GMGN. Review will be completed within 24 hours after submission
    
*   To access the GMGN Trade API, apply for permission by filling out the following Google Form: [https://forms.gle/CWABDLRe8twvygvy5](https://forms.gle/CWABDLRe8twvygvy5)
    
*   Upon approval, GMGN will issue an API Key to your email. Include the API Key in the request header with the name: `x-route-key`
    
*   Each API Key is rate-limited to one call every 5 seconds
    

**ETH/Base chain Swap transaction steps:**

1.  **Get the transaction route, recommended slippage, and recommended gas price at the same time**
    

*   Get transaction routing: [Get the available routing for ETH/Base transactions](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api/get-the-available-routing-for-eth-base-bsc-transactions)
    
*   Get recommended slippage: [Get the recommended slippage value of ETH/Base token](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api/get-the-recommended-slippage-value-of-eth-base-bsc-token)
    
*   Get recommended gas price: [Get the recommended gas price for ETH/Base chain](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api/get-the-recommended-gas-price-for-eth-base-bsc-chain)
    

1.  **After selecting the route, call the simulated transaction**
    

[💻Swap transaction simulation (ETH/Base)](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api/swap-transaction-simulation-eth-base-bsc)

1.  **After the simulated transaction is passed, get the returned data field and use normal rpc or anti-pinch rpc to submit the formal transaction**
    

Submit transaction signature, you can use ethers js library

Signature transaction tutorial [https://docs.ethers.org/v6/api/providers/#Signer-signTransaction](https://docs.ethers.org/v6/api/providers/#Signer-signTransaction)
