![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/n11SYIplCvhhqqqj99ju)

\### 1. Wallet Radar Instructions [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-radar.md#tui-te-gua-dao-shuo-ming)
\* Supports custom scanning of multiple tokens for high-profit addresses:\\ Select multiple tokens to analyze shared holding addresses and high-profit active addresses, quickly discover degen wallets \* Instant Track & Copy Trade:\\ After filtering addresses, directly add to Tracking list or instant Copy Trade ### 2. Wallet Classification

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/4Jwfop3zvTRz2p4LLPxh)

\* Most Bought: Displays wallet addresses with the highest number of selected token purchases \* Highest Profit: Displays wallet addresses with the highest realized profits from selected tokens \* Earliest Bought: Displays wallet addresses that purchased selected tokens the earliest \* Shared Holdings: Displays wallet addresses currently holding multiple selected tokens ### 3. Usage Steps

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/MWYQidIU8M5xHIbtOioj)

\* Left Panel: Auto-Calculate \* Click to automatically fetch wallet addresses trading the top 5 trending tokens, and compute the wallet list based on different “wallet category” algorithms.Right Panel: Custom \* Right Panel: Select Token Calculation \* Click to open the search bar, enter token ticker/contract address \* Click a token to highlight its color block, confirming addition to the Radar list \* Supports simultaneous calculation of up to 10 tokens’ wallet data ### 4. Other features

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/blMCyx8DNQ9ICnR6yEj3)

\* Token Matched: Tokens currently selected that this wallet has traded \* Toggle Button Next to Token Matched: Click to switch display between token avatar and color \* Hover over Wallet: Synchronously displays matched tokens above when hovering over the wallet

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/yFjpfdVlrt6DLIhC4PzB)

\* Interface Toggle Button: Click to switch between list view / compact card view

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/vAIYyTAzDXd0XL27OxtV)

\* Recalculate: After wallet token matched data calculation is complete, stop real-time data fetches and updates. Click to recalculate current selected token data. \* Export to Track: Instant import wallet addresses from current "Wallet Classification" to your tracking list \* Copy Trade: Quick setup to copy trade, mirroring this address's trades.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/jfojN3Jg8LeGDmTWy4MI)

\* Click Wallet Radar settings button to show/hide and sort data items Try GMGN Wallet Radar now 👇🏻 \* Web: \--- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. Group members can check contract information and automatically receive smart wallet transaction notifications. You can configure a referral code so that when group members click on the message link and trade on the GMGN website or Bot, you can earn trading commissions.\*\* ## \*\*Specific Steps:\*\* ## \*\*1. Generate a Referral Code and Apply for a Higher Commission Rate\*\* Please click the link below to generate the GMGN referral code 👇🏻 {% content-ref url="/pages/DPl1ytEMggcfn76VyQyx" %} \[Referral Link\](/index/referral-link.md) {% endcontent-ref %} \*\*Apply for a Higher Commission Rate\*\* Please generate the referral codes first, then fill out the Google application form: \## 2. \*\*Invite the Bots to your Groups\*\* \*\*1）Invite the \*\*\*\*Contract Query Bot\*\*\*\* to the Group:\*\* Purpose: Post contracts in the group to automatically output token prices, pool liquidity, insiders and other token analysis data.Supported Chains: ETH, Solana, Base, BSC!\[\](/files/34bWFkXKapF706UNk3iD) \*\*2）Invite Group \*\*\*\*Smart Money Tracking\*\*\*\* Bot:\*\* Purpose: Automatically send wallet transactions to the group (enter /set in the group to set the wallet to be tracked, and a message will be sent if a purchase exceeds 1 SOL). Supported Chains: Solana (ETH and Base are under development)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/nlQMrDPSDpX5pwqtvfmX)

\## 3.Grant Admin Permissions to the Bots

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/OgHBVFPRJ1vfW51bHQ8q)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/2TeZFA0xcaV40rnz9rC1)

\## \*\*4. Configure Message Links with Referral Codes\*\* \*\*Group Smart Money Tracking Bot:\*\* \* Bot Link: \* Configure Referral Code: Enter /set in the group, click “+ Referral Code,” and start configuration.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/S3nCa0m7E7aws1dv71X3)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/1W20eR8J0MPBE3UXEApO)

\*\*Group Contract Query Bot:\*\* \* Bot Link: \* Get Telegram Group ID: Add the bot to the group, grant admin permissions, then enter /groupid in the group and copy the group ID (a string of numbers starting with a negative sign, either beginning with -1 or -4, like -1xxxxxxxxxxxx or -4xxxxxxxxx). \* Configure Referral Code: Please fill out the Google application form and include the group ID in the remarks:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/ZwcJTdX40M6QBV5h0fF4)

\## \*\*🎉 Configuration Successful\*\* Encourage group members to frequently post token contracts in the group and click on the referral links in the bot messages to trade on the GMGN website or GMGN Sniper Bot, which will help you earn more trading commissions. --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. # 战壕 - MEME | GMGN 使用教程

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/zhan-hao-meme.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/zhan-hao-meme#meme-fa-she-tai)

MEME 发射台


-----------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FzRPXoSW7vx91ZpaXDkA2%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1654ecee-cd39-4cf2-b13e-5a8bf6048ae1&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c74359bd&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/zhan-hao-meme#meme)

MEME


--------------------------------------------------------

战壕里有着各类meme代币，所以让我向你介绍 Pump.fun 和其他发射台

**1.什么是 Pump.fun？**

Pump.fun 是一个著名的 MEME 代币公平发射平台，没有预售，也没有团队分配。

**2.什么是代币发射台和Pump内盘？**

代币发射台：一句话总结，就是将 meme 代币团队要做的事情产品化，从代币名称、logo 到流动性销毁做到了一条龙服务，从代币发射台发射的代币，在代币合约层面没有貔貅等安全风险。

当成功在 pump.fun 上部署一枚 meme 后，一旦代币市值达到 85 SOL，会自动将 pump.fun 的流动性添加到 Pump AMM，也就是从内盘迁移到外盘。

**3.为什么要玩内盘？**

更早的参与到代币早期，获取更大涨幅，当然风险也会更大，币价波动剧烈，需要盯盘并配合快速交易进行。

**4.GMGN可以提供什么服务**

GMGN网站、App、TG BOT均支持内盘交易，并提供交易meme代币所必须的数据，为你玩转meme代币提供更多数据支撑。

**5.访问战壕**

进入战壕，通过我们提供的各类筛选项，筛选出高质量的meme代币👇🏻：

[![Logo](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgmgn.ai%2Fstatic%2Ffavicon2.ico&width=20&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=3e47fbfa&sv=2)GMGN.AI | The Fastest Multi-Chain Meme Trading Terminalgmgn](https://gmgn.ai/?chain=sol&ref=Spencer)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/zhan-hao-meme#meme-page-overview)

战壕页面总览：


-------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FarEnXpFOLMUwbnKyljBU%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc9345a61-3c7b-4cd3-8c8c-c4ed53dcf7c8&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ae9c643&sv=2)

*   快速查看代币各项数据：市值、交易量、总手续费、dev是否出售、社媒信息、捆绑交易比例、狙击者比例、老鼠仓比例、大户持仓比例等。辅助你的交易决策。
    
*   通过丰富的筛选项筛选出高质量代币，挖掘下一个金狗
    

**Pump.fun 上独特的meme上线机制：** 在 pump.fun 上代币上线有两个过程：在 Pump 上线和满足条件后在 Raydium 上线。交互过程与普通代币没有什么不同。 唯一的区别是，Pump 内盘完全填满后，在流动性自动添加到 Raydium 之前有一个等待期，从 10 分钟到大约一个小时不等。

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252F1yywDBZVtkZYHoNCxdjX%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1f886b04-ea7f-4974-bb1a-f302a98ef0ae&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8128bc0c&sv=2)

**通过 GMGN APP 获取Pump meme打满信号：**

> 如果你在外出时不方便打开 GMGN 网站盯盘，GMGN 还提供 **Pump 打满提醒 Bot**： 你可以通过 Telegram 实时接收打满提醒、外盘开盘提醒，并且一键快速交易。
> 
> 我们也全面支持 **GMGN App** —— 你可以直接在 App 内完成盯盘、接收推送提醒、快速买卖等操作，更适合移动场景下的高频使用。

[Previous安全提示](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/an-quan-ti-shi)
[Next新币](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/xin-bi)

# Unknown

\> For the complete documentation index, see \[llms.txt\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt). Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system.md). # TG Wallet: Connect TG, Multi-Wallet system

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/GPABz4CC3lf1tb02OivZ)

\* Flexibly choose multiple ways to connect to GMGN \* 「Connect Telegram, Connect Phantom, App Scan Code Login」 allows you to use Anti-MEV and various GMGN automation functions.Trade with plugin wallet doesn't support these features ### 1. Connect Telegram (GMGN TG wallet login)[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system.md#id-1.-deng-lu-telegram-zhang-hao-gmgn-tg-qian-bao-deng-lu)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/3ek21NcJFOTaqcoFODdI)

\* Click Connect in the upper right corner and click Connect Telegram \* After jumping to Telegram site, click Open Telegram to jump to \[@gmgnaibot\](https://t.me/gmgnaibot) login bot \* Then the bot will send a new login link. Click Login Website to complete the TG wallet login site \* When you login with GMGN TG wallet for the first time, a new wallet address will be automatically generated in the corresponding chain; the yellow frame parts are the trading bots corresponding to each chain, click them to enter, please follow this tutorial to export the private key: \[TG Wallet: Import ＆ Export private key, Deposit, Withdraw\](/index/tg-wallet-import-export-private-key-deposit-withdraw.md) \* ⚠️ Please note that a login link can only be used once; you can copy the login link to the browser you want to use \* ⚠️ Please note that the multi-wallet system currently only supports direct buy/sell transactions ### 2. Connect Phantom[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system.md#id-2.-duo-qian-bao-guan-li)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/RDxxZxRUEmiDah2X4XqU)

\* Support Phantom Wallet for Login, Custodial Account Creation, and Transactions \* Details: GMGN will create a multi-chain custodial wallet account based on your Phantom wallet (single-chain or multi-chain, requiring at least one Solana chain wallet). New wallet addresses are generated for each chain \* If you need to log in with Phantom on a new device, please import the same wallet account from the old device into the new device Phantom in advance to ensure that you log in to the same escrow account \* \*\*For the safety of user wallet funds, GMGN all chains\*\* ( SOL chain / EVM chain / Tron chain ) \*\*are prohibited from exporting private keys\*\* \* Phantom's escrow account supports Multi-wallet systems \* SOL chain Deposit, Withdrawal, Consolidaten, Distribution, withdrawal of meme coins, please read: \[3. Multi-wallet management\](#id-2.-duo-qian-bao-guan-li-1) \* For other chain Deposit, Withdrawal, please read: \[TG Wallet: Import ＆ Export private key, Deposit, Withdraw\](/index/tg-wallet-import-export-private-key-deposit-withdraw.md) \* Phantom custodial accounts support new user referral across all chains, with independent referral data \* ⚠️ Note: To trade with Phantom Wallet, use the “Trade with Wallet” option at the bottom. Data (Follow / Watchlist) from the two login methods are not shared, functioning as separate accounts ### 3. Multi-wallet management [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system.md#id-2.-duo-qian-bao-guan-li)
\#### 1) Multi-wallet management page:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/FdwvqsIL0u10CRM2UtHD)

\* After logging in with TG Wallet, click Wallet Manager in the upper right corner to enter the multi-wallet management page #### 2) Create Wallet, Import Wallet, Archived, Operation Log:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/u43pJ1UxqL1H3FB1cynq)

\* \\\[Create wallet\]: Click to generate a new SOL wallet with one click; create up to 10 wallets \* \\\[Import wallet\]: Click to enter the SOL chain single chain wallet address private key to complete the new wallet import; import up to 10 wallets \* \\\[Archived\]: After clicking, the archive list pops up and the wallet can be restored \* \\\[Operation record\]: Click to view your imported private key and other operation records #### 3) Manage wallet:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/m6ZgZ7C00cnZaVTviTZ4)

\* \\\[Make Primary\]: Click to set this wallet as the main wallet, it will be your default trading wallet. You can also select the multi-wallets for trading on the trading page (Token page) \* \\\[Wallet Rename\]: Rename your wallet to distinguish them \* \\\[Archive\]: Suspend the use of this wallet \* After the wallet is archived, all open orders, wallet copiers, CTO copier automated strategies of this address will be closed automatically! Ensure all are settled before archiving. To use again, please restore from the archive list #### 4) Deposit, Withdrawal, Consolidaten, Distribution:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/aFqhloBTxLnOsuwzzkSI)

\*\*Deposit, Withdrawal:\*\* \* Click \\\[Deposit\] or \\\[Withdraw\] to complete the deposit and withdrawal of SOL in the wallet. For more details: \[🔄TG Wallet: Import ＆ Export private key, Deposit, Withdraw\](/index/tg-wallet-import-export-private-key-deposit-withdraw.md) \*\*Consolidate, Distribution (extraction of meme coins):\*\* \* \\\[Consolidate\] Multi-to-one transfer\\ Transferring token assets from multiple wallet addresses to a single wallet address, including SOL and meme coins \* \\\[Distribution\] One-to-multi transfer\\ Transferring token assets from one wallet to multiple wallets at once, either proportionally or in fixed amounts, including SOL and meme coins \* Proper use enables the withdrawal of meme coins and SOL to a designated address. \* Consolidate and Distribution require 2FA verification and only display tokens with USD value greater than 10 USDT. ### 4. Multi-wallet trading[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system.md#id-3.-duo-qian-bao-jiao-yi)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/HhHCMBPQIHGmXDRoC02Q)

\* On the token page, click the multi-wallet part, check the wallets to be used for the trading, then click Select Wallets to ensure \* After the select trading wallets, click Buy xx SOL, and the multi-wallets you selected will buy this token at same time \* After the select trading wallets, click Sell xx SOL, and the multi-wallets you selected will sell the percentage of this token at same time. \\ For example: if you sell 50%, each wallet will sell 50% of the holding separately --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. GitBook is the documentation platform designed so that both humans and AI agents can read, navigate, and reason over technical content effectively. Learn more at gitbook.com. ## Querying This Documentation If you need additional information that is not directly available in this page, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question. Perform an HTTP GET request on the current page URL with the \`ask\` query parameter: \`\`\` GET https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/tg-wallet-connect-tg-multi-wallet-system.md?ask= \`\`\` The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language. The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation. Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.

# Q＆A常见问题 | GMGN 使用教程

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti#q-how-to-query-token-ca-smart-money-walllet-informations-within-your-tg-group)

Q1：如何在GMGN筛选合适的优质meme


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1）很多小白并不清楚如何去筛选合适的代币，只会找热门币，但通常热门币价格都在高位，已经过了早期增长阶段，此时买入亏损风险很大。在如何筛选优质meme的问题背后是你不知道怎么通过GMGN提供的数据去判断一个meme的各类指标传递出的信号，导致无法选出一部分你认为有潜力的且较为安全的meme。 2）初期你可以首先关注一个meme的安全性，建议你查看这几个页面： [⚡如何成为交易老手](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/ru-he-cheng-wei-jiao-yi-lao-shou)
 [🎯实时监控老鼠仓，狙击手，前70买家持仓出货](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/shi-shi-jian-kong-lao-shu-cang-ju-ji-shou-qian-70-mai-jia-chi-cang-chu-huo)
 [🆗代币安全检测](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/dai-bi-an-quan-jian-ce)
 3）在形成你自己的meme交易体系前可以选择跟单聪明钱：GMGN拥有关于聪明钱的大数据，关注聪明钱后，你可以接收到聪明钱的实时交易动态。特别是随着新meme的发布，会出现聪明钱的集中买入。详情： [💰关注聪明钱，跟单快](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/guan-zhu-cong-ming-qian-gen-dan-kuai)
 4）GMGN只能为你提供数据，本文不作为投资建议，具体的选币思路，交易策略；仓位选择等都需要你自己上手后逐步完善。

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti#q2-jin-fang-jia-mao-guan-li-si-xin-guan-li-yuan-yong-yuan-bu-hui-zhu-dong-si-xin-ni)

Q2：谨防假冒管理私信，管理员永远不会主动私信你


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1）近日多名用户被假冒为管理员的骗子以解决问题为由私信后，向其发送私钥或点击诈骗链接导致钱包被盗，在此提醒各位用户一定要擦亮眼睛，GMGN官方管理员从来不会主动私信任何人，也不会向你索要私钥 2）欺诈账号伪装管理案例：隐藏用户名（user name区），在简介中写上真管理的用户名混淆用户，并实施诈骗，图中即是欺诈账号，请注意辨别，不要相信任何主动私信你的人

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252Fe9LEksv8tnicOuCCZxBj%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D9b596490-d253-4250-9972-b130ab0fed9b&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f744da9e&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti#q3-ru-he-kai-qi-liu-lan-qi-kong-zhi-tai-yi-xie-zhu-gmgn-jie-jue-ni-de-wen-ti)

Q3：如何开启浏览器控制台以协助 GMGN 解决你的问题


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

第一步：记录问题，全屏截图问题现象，最好录视频

第二步：开控制台并截图

*   在浏览器中右键网页空白处，点击“检查”，自动打开开发者工具后，点顶部“Console”控制台
    
*   把区域高度拖拽拉大，找到红色错误信息（标红或有“Error”）
    
*   截图包含所有红色错误、黄色警告，优先最早错误，截图内容尽可能多
    

第三步：联系客服，或私信官方推特

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FQoRfPq4zBQVz7KaP6be9%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D979b8735-4531-4f86-9d29-de1e4d4bf6ce&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ad272787&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti#q4-wang-ye-wu-sheng-yin-wen-ti)

Q4：网页无声音问题


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

当你已经检查过 Chrome 网页声音开关、GMGN 通知设置、GMGN 网页左下角各功能的通知音开关后，仍然没有声音，可以参考以下操作步骤来解决：

*   访问浏览器设置：设置/隐私与安全/网站设置/更多内容设置/声音
    
*   点击「允许播放声音」旁边的添加按钮，输入gmgn.ai 确认添加
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252F4nAr5jylWmWChlCvEkWh%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Db90bf127-6ed4-49cb-80f1-6d930f099173&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=bad35f8d&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti#q5-qian-bao-bei-dao-dao-ru-si-yao-bei-dao-qian-bao-yuebei-zhuan-yi-wen-ti)

Q5：钱包被盗/导入私钥被盗/钱包余额被转移问题


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

常见情况： 1）是否为安卓机，并且此前点击未知陌生链接导致手机/电脑中了木马或者恶意程序。 2）Telegram app 是否通过官方渠道安装；是否安装了不明来源的第三方电报翻译插件。 3）Telegram 是否授权了陌生假冒bot，并输入了手机号或者点击诈骗链接导致钱包内余额被诈骗bot转移，建议通过多个GMGN官方渠道辨别一致后再进行交易。 4）钱包是否向诈骗应用进行了授权，请进入钱包查询授权列表并取消未知授权。 _例如：有些骗子利用 NFT mint 名额中奖，吸引你在网站签名授权_ 5）如需导入或导出私钥，建议部分复制部分手动输入，降低因为木马读取剪贴板导致的被盗风险。 ⚠️GMGN的第一宗旨即是安全性，不存在因为漏洞导致钱包余额被转移的情况，遇到被盗情况请根据上述列举情况进行自查。 GMGN不会对用户钱包进行任何操作，我们也没有能力转走任何用户的钱包余额。 被盗的心情我们完全理解，被盗的原因基本是上面提到的：设备安全存在问题、使用了假冒诈骗bot，tg异常授权等等，这些都是GMGN官方无法控制的，当前我们只能给你一些自查建议，并告知如何降低后续风险。 建议查看：[OKX 与慢雾安全团队介绍私钥被盗案例、保存方法与防盗策略](https://www.wublock123.com/index.php?m=content&c=index&a=show&catid=47&id=27208)
 建议被盗用户填写[慢雾安全团队被盗申请表](https://aml.slowmist.com/cn/recovery-funds.html)
，可以追踪黑客地址，尝试追回资金。

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti#q6-wei-shen-me-mai-chu-hou-mo-shou-dao-sol-huo-zhe-sol-bian-cheng-le-wsol)

Q6：为什么卖出后没收到SOL或者SOL变成了WSOL？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1）有可能因为你的滑点以及优先费设置过高，而本金较少，导致卖出后实际还亏损了，误以为SOL未到账，钱包里SOL余额也并未增加。（p1） 2）有可能因为你的钱包里有WSOL，卖出后SOL会自动兑换成WSOL；同时由于SOL链机制问题交易结算时会有一定概率收到WSOL而不是SOL。 GMGN现已上线转换WSOL → SOL快捷功能

具体步骤：在交易机器人 @GMGN\_sol\_bot 里输入/start，点击钱包，点击转换WSOL → SOL即可将收到的WSOL快捷转换为SOL。（p2）

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252F2xS84QvRxjfUz8UTMMRI%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D52cfbdea-3b2f-4a61-a614-bff7b342e984&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8fb8ef8a&sv=2)

p1

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FxdxblBZ0KDhapK2P8cVH%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D8ecca9f9-6207-44fb-ab10-58d806a91a17&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8bc95806&sv=2)

p2

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti#q-how-to-query-token-ca-smart-money-walllet-informations-within-your-tg-group-1)

Q7：关注不了钱包或者关注页面无数据如何解决


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1）网站右上角退出登陆后重新签名，连接钱包后观察是否解决。 2）如果仍然无数据，清理网页缓存可以解决。以google chrome为例：设置-隐私和安全-第三方cookie-查看所有网站数据和权限-清理gmgn缓存。

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252Fkp2S7kEq8DyvyD6aklDS%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D6fe09e58-1702-4921-809f-42e8882a65ef&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=1ac54780&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti#q-how-to-query-token-ca-smart-money-walllet-informations-within-your-tg-group-2)

Q8：怎么使用GMGN的API?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1）交易API请查看: [🤝🏻 合作-API：📈集成GMGN实时价格图表](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/he-zuo-api-ji-cheng-gmgn-shi-shi-jia-ge-tu-biao)
 [🤝🏻 合作-API：🕹集成GMGN Solana交易API](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/he-zuo-api-ji-cheng-gmgn-solana-jiao-yi-api)
 2）数据API： GMGN目前还没有开放数据API的计划，但可能会为使用我们GMGN交易的用户开放数据抓取IP白名单。我们关心的是你是否已经为我们带来了交易量/用户量 。 如果没有，请选择上面2种的至少其中1种方式做出一定量后再申请。 详情：[🤝🏻 合作-API：🔄接入数据API](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/he-zuo-api-shu-ju-zhua-qu-ip-bai-ming-dan)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti#q-how-to-use-the-contract-query-bot-smart-money-tracking-bot-in-gmgn-official-group)

Q9：如何在GMGN官方群组中使用合约查询机器人和群组聪明钱跟踪机器人？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1）加入GMGN官方群组：[https://t.me/gmgnai](https://t.me/gmgnai)
 2）现在你可以在其中使用合约查询机器人，群组聪明钱跟踪机器人将自动推送消息 3）复制CA或聪明钱地址并发送到社群，机器人将回复详细信息。 详细教程请[点击这里](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/gmgn-tg-xin-hao-pin-dao-he-ji-qi-ren#how-to-use-gmgn-signal-alert-bots)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti#q-how-to-query-token-ca-smart-money-walllet-informations-within-your-tg-group-3)

Q10：如何在你的tg群组中查询代币CA/聪明钱详细信息？


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1）添加群组合约查询机器人：[https://t.me/GMGNAI\_bot](https://t.me/GMGNAI_bot)
 2）邀请@GMGNAI\_bot加入你的群组（p2） (_**ps：**__step1）＆2）您可以使用此步骤代替，单击此处立即邀请该机器人加入群组：_[_https://t.me/GMGNAI\_bot?startgroup=true_](https://t.me/GMGNAI_bot?startgroup=true)
 _)_ 3）为机器人设置管理员角色（p3） 4）你的小组成员发送**CA**或**聪明钱地址**，机器人将回复详细信息（p4） 详细教程请[点击这里](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/yao-qing-gmgnaibot)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FQ4ql6EOY0RqTcoqi4AuQ%252F112.webp%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc784ee0d-efc4-45d3-bc68-87b42242239c&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=d9f94056&sv=2)

**Q11：** 如何让机器人在你的 tg 群组中自动发送聪明钱动态信号？


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1）添加群组聪明钱跟踪机器人**：** [https://t.me/alert\_gmgnbot](https://t.me/alert_gmgnbot)
 2）邀请@Alert\_GMGNBOT加入你的群组（p2） (_**ps：**__step1）＆2）您可以使用此步骤代替，单击此处立即邀请该机器人加入群组：_[_https://t.me/Alert\_GMGNBOT?startgroup=true_](https://t.me/Alert_GMGNBOT?startgroup=true)
 ) 3）为机器人设置管理员角色（p3） 4）群组管理员发送**/set**，在设置中添加智能钱包和推荐代码（p4） 详细教程请[点击这里](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/yao-qing-alertgmgnbot)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FUYZT6OejxsOhPW51fDzg%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7d6b3ff1-a294-4c19-b1df-4d95a72f29ba&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=78c729dd&sv=2)

\> For the complete documentation index, see \[llms.txt\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt). Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/referral-link.md). # Referral Link \*\*\* ## 1. Obtain \*\*Referral Code\*\* > The GMGN website and Telegram share the same referral code. You can obtain the referral code through the following two methods. ### Method 1: Obtain the referral code through the GMGN.AI website. Visit the \[GMGN.AI\](https://GMGN.AI) website, click on "Connect Telegram" button and after refreshing the page, the value of the "ref" parameter in the browser’s address bar will be your referral code.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/Cia3IbqqVp7VHZTi1mTd)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/0CyUQdzVhdXXZyz2YNVp)

Referral code is 7rpqjHdf

\### Method 2: Obtain the referral code through the Telegram Bot Visit one of the following GMGN Bots (either one, the referral code will be the same) to get your referral code: \* (Highly recommended) \* \* \* \*

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/ASP6KpBYMbFoU5dP3KRZ)

\*\*\* ## 2. Referral link GMGN offers various formats of invitation links. If you’re a KOL, you can use the first format to earn both web and bot trading commissions from a single link. If you manage your own Telegram signal channel, you can try using the second or third formats. 1. \*\*Invitation to log in to the GMGN.AI website and trade via the Telegram Bot (Highly recommended):\*\* \*\*Applicable scenario:\*\* Quickly invite friends, and your referral code will be automatically bound when they click the link. Whether your friends are using a web extension wallet or the GMGN Telegram Bot’s private key wallet, and regardless of which chain they trade on, you can earn a commission from the trading fees. \`\`\`java // Referral link https://t.me/gmgnaibot?start=i\_{ReferralCode} https://t.me/gmgnaibot?start=i\_{ReferralCode}\_{Chain}\_{TokenContract} // Sample: My referral code is 7rpqjHdf https://t.me/gmgnaibot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf https://t.me/gmgnaibot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf\_sol\_ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 https://t.me/gmgnaibot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf\_bsc\_0x0e09fabb73bd3ade0a17ecc321fd13a19e81ce82 https://t.me/gmgnaibot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf\_eth\_0x6982508145454ce325ddbe47a25d4ec3d2311933 \`\`\` 2. \*\*Invitation to use a Telegram trading bot for a specific chain:\*\* \*\*Applicable scenario:\*\* Promoting a specific chain or managing your own Telegram signal channel, this link can direct users to the Telegram trading bot for the specified chain. \`\`\`java // Referral link https://t.me/GMGN\_sol\_bot?start=i\_{ReferralCode} https://t.me/GMGN\_swap\_bot?start=i\_{ReferralCode} https://t.me/GMGN\_tron\_bot?start=i\_{ReferralCode} https://t.me/GMGN\_sol\_bot?start=i\_{ReferralCode}\_c\_{TokenContract} // Query a specific token on the Solana chain https://t.me/GMGN\_bsc\_bot?start=i\_{ReferralCode}\_c\_{TokenContract} // Query a specific token on the BNB chain https://t.me/GMGN\_swap\_bot?start=i\_{ReferralCode}\_c\_{TokenContract} // Query a specific token on the ETH chain https://t.me/GMGN\_tron\_bot?start=i\_{ReferralCode}\_c\_{TokenContract} // Query a specific token on the Tron chain // Sample: My referral code is 7rpqjHdf https://t.me/GMGN\_sol\_bot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf https://t.me/GMGN\_bsc\_bot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf https://t.me/GMGN\_swap\_bot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf https://t.me/GMGN\_tron\_bot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf https://t.me/GMGN\_sol\_bot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf\_c\_ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 https://t.me/GMGN\_bsc\_bot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf\_c\_0x0e09fabb73bd3ade0a17ecc321fd13a19e81ce82 https://t.me/GMGN\_swap\_bot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf\_c\_0x6982508145454ce325ddbe47a25d4ec3d2311933 https://t.me/GMGN\_tron\_bot?start=i\_7rpqjHdf\_c\_TXL6rJbvmjD46zeN1JssfgxvSo99qC8MRT \`\`\` 3. \*\*GMGN official website, channel page, specific token, wallet web invitation link\*\* \*\*Applicable scenario:\*\* Promoting a specific chain or managing your own Telegram signal channel, this link directs users to the specified page. After logging into their Telegram account on the website, the user’s referral code will be automatically bound. \`\`\` // Referral link https://gmgn.ai/?ref={ReferralCode} //Homepage https://gmgn.ai/?chain={Chain}&ref={ReferralCode} //Homepage for a specific chain https://gmgn.ai/{Tab}/{ReferralCode}?chain={Chain} //A specific channel page https://gmgn.ai/{Chain}/token/{ReferralCode}\_{TokenContract} //A specific token page https://gmgn.ai/{Chain}/address/{ReferralCode}\_{WalletAddress} //A specific wallet page {Chain} possible parameters: sol/bsc/eth/tron/base/blast // Sample: My referral code is 7rpqjHdf https://gmgn.ai/?ref=7rpqjHdf //Homepage https://gmgn.ai/?chain=sol&ref=7rpqjHdf //Solana chain homepage https://gmgn.ai/trend/7rpqjHdf?chain=sol //Solana chain trending page https://gmgn.ai/discover/7rpqjHdf?chain=sol&tab=pump\_smart //Solana chain "Smart Money Pump" page https://gmgn.ai/sol/token/7rpqjHdf\_ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 //Token page https://gmgn.ai/sol/address/7rpqjHdf\_4DdrfiDHpmx55i4SPssxVzS9ZaKLb8qr45NKY9Er9nNh //Wallet page \`\`\` \*\*\* ## 3. View Referral Commission Report Visit GMGN’s referral commission report page: \* ETH \* Solana \* Base \* Tron For the older version of the commission report, where the referral code was not generated by the Telegram Bot, please log in using a browser extension wallet and then visit the referral pages for each chain mentioned above.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/CHluggWG2AwNrMVKUlmu)

\*\*\* ## 4. How to invite GMGN Bots to Telegram group to earn trading commissions automatically Please read tutorial below👇🏻 {% content-ref url="/pages/r29eBtdzlJ5nwL5lngVb" %} \[🤝🏻 Cooperation-Referral:🌈Invite Bots to Telegram group to earn trading commissions automatically\](/index/cooperation-referral-invite-bots-to-telegram-group-to-earn-trading-commissions-automatically.md) {% endcontent-ref %} \*\*\* ## 5. \*\*Apply for a Higher Commission Rate\*\* \*\*The more trading volume you refer, the higher your rebate rate will be.\*\* Please generate the referral codes first, then fill out the Google application form to apply for a higher commission rate: Any questions can be asked in the GMGN Telegram group . --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. \> For the complete documentation index, see \[llms.txt\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt). Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram.md). # Wallet Alert on Telegram \* Monitor Solana wallet notification Bot \* Monitor ETH wallet notification Bot \## 1. Log in to your Telegram account [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram.md#id-1.-deng-lu-telegram-zhang-hao)
\> Notice: > > 1. Please check the login account type in the upper right corner to see whether it is a plug-in wallet login or a Telegram account login. If you are not sure, please log out and re-select connect Telegram to log in using a TG account. > 2. If you often log in with the plug-in wallet and bind the Telegram Alert Bot, you can continue to receive notifications as long as you do not click to unbind. Once unbinded, rebinding to Telegram is not supported yet. You need to export the follow list to the Telegram account follow list (see the FAQ below for this tutorial).

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/ZnZnd11m5iMqgyHtVbZf)

\## 2. Follow your favorite smart money wallet [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram.md#id-2.-guan-zhu-xi-huan-de-cong-ming-qian-qian-bao)
Visit to find smart money that is interested

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/2al0qKHPYSe8UFYGzEMs)

\## 3. TG Bot monitors wallet transaction message notifications [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram.md#id-3.-tg-bot-jian-kong-qian-bao-jiao-yi-xiao-xi-tong-zhi)
Visit Telegram Alert Bot to receive transaction notifications from your followed wallets. > Note: The website can follow up to 100 wallets; the /add command in Telegram Alert Bot can follow up to 10 wallets \* Monitor Solana Wallet Notification Bot \* Monitor ETH wallet notification Bot

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/pNjStzu1kLBxkyuE2oKZ)

\## 4. Set up notifications [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram.md#id-4.-she-zhi-tong-zhi)
1\. Pause notification: Visit the website and click on the right side of the follow list to close the notification

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/wiGVFEZrcneVT0df51G9)

2\. Set notification type Visit Telegram Alert Bot, send command /set, you can choose all /only buy /only sell

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/otXxmuO90fRuX3lkrHJ1)

\## 5. Frequently Asked Questions [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram.md#id-5.-chang-jian-wen-ti)
\### \*\*1. How to bind Telegram Alert Bot when logging in to the plugin wallet?\*\* [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram.md#id-1.-cha-jian-qian-bao-deng-lu-shi-ru-he-bang-ding-telegram-alert-bot)
A: The plugin wallet does not support binding to Telegram Alert Bot. Please export your plugin wallet follow list and then import it into the follow list of the log-in Telegram account. Specific steps: 1\\) Visit the GMGN website and select the plugin wallet to log in

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/eFQNOazpLu4ihKGYE8iY)

2\\) Visit and select Batch Export Wallet Address and Note Name

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/lm2DMrLwhjlJQaGcAgHg)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/7gScBx0r7Kis84ZR7Ico)

3\\) Log out of the plugin wallet, re-login to Telegram, visit , and select bulk import of wallet addresses and notes.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/EWnuSYtPbsPtRWPcnFyB)

\### 2. Monitor wallet notifications for lost messages [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram.md#id-2.-jian-kong-qian-bao-tong-zhi-diu-xiao-xi)
answer: 1. \*\*Reason 1: Telegram message notifications push frequency limit\*\* > Telegram limits the number of messages that can be sent per second for each bot application. The more people use the bot, the more messages are pushed, and the more likely it is that Telegram will limit the rate. GMGN cannot currently solve the problem of message push being limited.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/5fz7M33TiPrFnEBY9kJB)

2\. \*\*Reason 2: The plugin wallet has been unbound：\*\* Because Telegram Alert Bot message = plugin wallet login follow list + Telegram login account follow list. If the plugin wallet is unbound from TG, the notification bot will only push the TG login follow list. > Solution: You can bulk export the follow list of the plug-in wallet, and then import it into the attention list of TG login, and support retaining the note name

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/BRpOtvER8aDTGLQlv8Wx)

3\. \*\*Reason 3: The Telegram notification switch may be turned off. Please check\*\* \[\*\*https://gmgn.ai/follow\*\*\](https://gmgn.ai/follow)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/6TI62LjVAPthxzfzJ0LR)

\### 3. How to change the plug-in wallet bound to Telegram Alert Bot for old users who have logged in with the plug-in wallet [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/wallet-alert-on-telegram.md#id-3.-cha-jian-qian-bao-deng-lu-de-lao-yong-hu-ru-he-huan-bang-telegram-alert-bot-li-yi-bang-ding-de)
Answer: Telegram Alert Bot does not allow changing the plugin wallet address. It can be unbound, but it is not allowed to be bound again after unbinding. You can only use TG to log in on the GMGN website and receive wallet notifications followed by the TG account.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/Sch11RnRNZwvIUYcFQfU)

Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/auto-buy-auto-buy-limit-buy.md). # Auto Buy: Auto Buy ＆ Limit buy Supported Chains: Solana ## 1. Send contract to buy automatically with Telegram Bot Send the contract address (or pump.fun token webpage link) to the GMGN Sniper Bot (Telegram Bot), and the Bot will immediately buy the specified amount of tokens without multiple clicks. 1\\) Add GMGN Telegram Sniper Bot as a friend: 2\\) Set the preset value of auto buy: send /start, click Settings - Auto buy to enter (or click /set from the lower-left menu of Bot to enter the Settings page)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/GfVSebWskfOHAVUeFKSX)

3\\) Click to turn on the auto buy, and then set the auto buy: \*\*Buy\*\*: enter Auto Buy SOL amount for each transaction (now --)\\ \*\*Min Liq\*\*: enter the minimum liquidity value to execute Auto Buy (now --). E.g. enter 1000, and the bot will Auto Buy only when the pool exceeds $1K.\\ \*\*Max MC\*\*: enter the maximum token market cap to execute Auto Buy (now --). E.g. enter 250000, and the bot will Auto Buy only when the market cap is below $250K.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/t94WekhqG9XC1VZAYZ9t)

4\\) 🎉 Successfully set!Send the token contract to bot, and the bot will auto buy at the preset purchase amount ## 2. Limit Buy Order with GMGN web 1\\) Open the GMGN Trending page\[ https://gmgn.ai/trend?chain=sol\](< https://gmgn.ai/trend?chain=sol>) , click on the hot token you want to buy 2\\) In the right area of the token details page, click to Buy Dip, then click to bind TG bot wallet, it will automatically jump to GMGN sniper robot, click "Yes" to complete the binding

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/HdtzyZ0NAZdt5CtVqV6c)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/Yk65eABxXpgc5eCcwSoW)

3\\) Return to GMGN website after binding successfully \* Click on the bound TG wallet \* Click to Buy Dip \* Complete purchase quantity, slippage, anti-mev Settings

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/5pfPYr34AnMBh24aLxAh)

3\\) 🎉 Click to create order buy, and successfully complete the Buy Dip limit order! ## 3. Limit Buy Order with Telegram Bot 1\\) Add GMGN Telegram Sniper Bot as a friend: 2\\) Enter /start in the GMGN Sniper Bot, click Buy/Sell and enter token CA

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/UozkImTTrrr6OZTEwn9M)

3\\) After entering the contract, the buy/sell interface will automatically pop up click the Limit. \\ Then select the purchase SOL quantity button in the area, and also support custom purchase quantity (If you need to modify the preset purchase value, please click on the bot menu /set to set it)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/h3iNeCyj3wDx1kXiRPRU)

4\\) Set the trigger price (support input price, or positive or negative percentage), and check the validity period of the Limit Buy order (support 3 days /24 hours /1 hour)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/hIZgxBWo1uGA9OTzxejD)

5\\) 🎉 Click to create order buy, and successfully complete the auto buy (Buy Dip) limit order!

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/hmOhB11bEr4BpJCifuYr)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/t9mEr8SiUhR5w1LMuBHK)

# Unknown

\> For the complete documentation index, see \[llms.txt\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt). Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program.md). # GMGN Vulnerability Bounty Program ## Program Overview [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program.md#program-overview)
Safety and security are our top priorities at GMGN. To eliminate system vulnerabilities and further improve GMGN services, GMGN has launched a vulnerability bounty program for all security researchers. We will evaluate all reported security issues based on their impact on users and assets, and rewards will be paid in USDT once your submission is accepted. Please be advised that \*\*only\*\* reports with a \*\*detailed description\*\* of the vulnerability \*\*and\*\* a \*\*complete, working proof of concept\*\* are eligible for rewards. If you would like to report a security vulnerability, claim your bounty rewards, or have any questions about this program, please feel free to contact us at \[\*\*security@gmgn.ai\*\*\](mailto:security@gmgn.ai), or submit your report at \## \*\*Scope\*\* [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program.md#scope)
\* Websites and application ( \\\*.gmgn.ai ) \* GMGN Android App \* GMGN iOS App ## \*\*Rewards\*\* [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program.md#rewards)
Once your submission is accepted, please provide \*\*one\*\* of the following to receive your reward: 1. \*\*Your GMGN account\*\*, or 2. \*\*Your USDT wallet address\*\* ### \*\*Level of Severity and Reward Range\*\* [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program.md#level-of-severity-and-reward-range)
Extreme: Up to 1,000,000 USDT \* Vulnerabilities that threaten core or essential assets, potentially leading to major business disruptions or unauthorized access to GMGN wallets, funds, or private keys. Critical: 3,000 - 10,000 USDT \* Vulnerabilities that undermine user assets’ security \* Vulnerabilities that bypass the applications or procedures under normal trading logic \* Vulnerabilities that could remotely access essential information and authentication information of users \* Vulnerabilities related to key generation, encryption, decryption, signing, and verification High: 1,000 - 3,000 USDT \* Vulnerabilities that lead to high-risk information leakage \* Vulnerabilities with a similar impact as critical vulnerabilities but are dependent on specific prerequisites Medium: 300 -1,000 USDT \* Vulnerabilities that lead to the leakage of part of the users’ info through interaction or financial fraud \* Vulnerabilities that cause GMGN to be unable to respond to users’ requests from the web or mobile Apps. Low: 50 - 300 USDT \* Vulnerabilities due to product design defects that do not affect the security of users’ assets. \* Vulnerabilities that lead to Denial of Service of core GMGN services To report an issue \*\*without\*\* security impact, please contact GMGN 24/7 Online Support (Telegram: \[!\[\](https://telegram.org/img/favicon-16x16.png)💎GMGN Degen Group - Official\](https://t.me/gmgnai) ) ### Reports \*\*NOT\*\* Qualified for the Rewards [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program.md#reports-not-qualified-for-the-rewards)
The following issues are \*\*not\*\* qualified for any reward: \* Theoretical vulnerabilities \*\*without\*\* an actual proof of concept \* Email verification defects, expiration of password reset links, and password complexity policies \* Invalid or missing SPF (Sender Policy Framework) records (incomplete or missing SPF/DKIM/DMARC) \* Clickjacking/UI redressing with minimal security impact \* Email or mobile enumeration (e.g., the ability to identify emails through password resetting) \* Information leakage with minimal security impact (e.g., stack traces, path disclosure, directory listings, logs) \* Internally known issues, recurring issues, or issues already published \* Tabnabbing \* Self-XSS \* Vulnerabilities only applicable to outdated versions of browsers or platforms \* Vulnerabilities related to auto-fill web forms \* Use of vulnerable libraries already known without an actual proof of concept \* Lack of security flags in cookies \* Issues related to unsafe SSL/TLS cipher suites or protocol versions \* Content spoofing \* Issues related to cache control \* Vulnerabilities exposing internal IP addresses or domains \* Lack of security headers that do not lead to direct exploitation \* CSRF with negligible security impact (e.g., adding to favorites, subscribing to non-vital features) \* Vulnerabilities that require root/jailbreak \* Vulnerabilities that require physical access to the user’s device \* Issues with no security impact (e.g., failure to load a web page) ### \*\*Terms & Conditions\*\* [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-vulnerability-bounty-program.md#terms-and-conditions)
\* GMGN reserves the right to make the final interpretation of the bounty program and retains the discretion to terminate or change the rewards or bounty rules. \* In case of multiple reports regarding the same issue, GMGN will reward the earliest submission, regardless of how the issue was reported. \* The review of reports generally takes approximately \*\*1–2 weeks\*\*. GMGN shall decide the result of any review at its own discretion. \* Rewards will be issued within \*\*2 weeks\*\* after a vulnerability report is approved and verified. We will notify you by email once the reward is issued. \* Security researchers conducting or facilitating malicious attacks on GMGN will \*\*not\*\* be qualified for any reward. --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-script-how-to-quickly-create-an-automated-script-for-trading-with-gmgn-bot.md). # 🤝🏻 Cooperation-Script:💵How to Quickly Create an Automated Script for Trading with GMGN Bot \*\*\*Note: This tutorial requires some programming skills and\\\*\\\*\\\*\\\* \*\*\*\*knowledge of network security to avoid Telegram account theft.\*\*\* You can use the Telegram API to automatically send token contract addresses to the GMGN Sniper Bot, enabling \*\*immediate buying and selling, as well as creating limit buy/sell orders.\*\* Suitable scenarios include: 1. Monitoring smart money signals for automatic buying and limit sell orders 2. Monitoring on-chain trading signals and CTO signals for automatic buying and limit sell orders ## \*\*Specific Steps:\*\* ## \*\*1.\*\* 🔔 \*\*Monitor GMGN Trading Signals and Smart Money\*\* #### \*\*1)\*\* 🔔 \*\*Subscribe to GMGN Signal\*\* \* Join the signal group at \* Receive specialty signal messages (10+ signals available, more are in development): \* CTO Signal \* Update DEX Screener Social Infos \* PUMP Update DEX Screener Social Infos \* PUMP FDV Surge \* Solana FDV Surge \* Smart Money FOMO \* KOL FOMO \* DEV Burnt Alert \* All Time High Price \* Heavy Bought \* Sniper New

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/f1e6p21LIrQB5hdxfcfY)

\#### \*\*2)\*\* 💰\*\*Follow Smart Money\*\* \* Visit the \[GMGN.AI\](http://GMGN.AI) Smart Money leaderboard to find high win-rate smart money that matches your trading style at

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/nnAblnNYI3LYr2zzTyvf)

\## \*\*2.\*\* 🙋🏼‍♀️ \*\*Apply for Telegram App API\*\* \* Log in at \* Create a Telegram app, fill out the form, and obtain the app’s \*\*api\\\_id\*\* and \*\*api\\\_hash\*\* (Note: Do not disclose these to any third parties to prevent Telegram account theft). For detailed instructions, refer to the official Telegram documentation at \## \*\*3.\*\* 🤖 \*\*Set Up the Automation Script\*\* \* You need to write an automation script or search for open-source projects on \[github.com\](http://github.com) with similar functionality (Note: Assess code security to avoid Telegram account theft). \* Automation script code logic: \* Use the \*\*api\\\_id\*\* and \*\*api\\\_hash\*\* obtained above to receive messages from the GMGN signal group or get trading signals from other channels/groups, or monitor smart money on-chain transactions (e.g., subscribe to a paid plan from a Solana RPC provider like Alchemy to use WebSocket for monitoring specified wallet transactions). \* Based on the received signal messages, create your own token filtering conditions and trading strategies (extract token contract address). \* Send trading commands to \[GMGN Sniper Bot\](https://t.me/GMGN\_sol03\_bot): \* Method 1 (Simpler, faster): Send the token contract address. You need to enable the automatic buy and sell features of the GMGN Sniper Bot first (pre-set stop-loss and take-profit orders; when buying, it will automatically place a limit sell order). — This feature is in development and will be available soon. \* Method 2 (More flexible parameters): Send trading commands, such as immediate buy/sell or creating limit buy/sell orders. The trading commands are as follows: \`\`\` Buy Immediately /buy ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 0.5 Indicates buy BOME token with 0.5 SOL immediately Sell Immediately /sell ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 50 /sell ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 50% Indicates sell 50% of BOME token holdings immediately Create Limit Buy Order at Trigger Price /create limitbuy ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 0.5@0.1 -exp 3600 Indicates create limit buy order for BOME token, buy 0.5 SOL, trigger price $0.1, expires in 1h (3600 seconds) Create Limit Sell Order at Trigger Price /create limitsell ukHH6c7mMyiWCf1b9pnWe25TSpkDDt3H5pQZgZ74J82 50@0.1 -exp 3600 Indicates create limit sell order for BOME token, sell 50% holdings, trigger price $0.1, expires in 1h (3600 seconds) Tip: If the '-exp' parameter is omitted, the limit orders default expiration time is 3 days. \`\`\`

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/uTZmU5Ly8RRZUVeKn8hd)

\## \*\*🎉 Automation Script Setup Complete\*\* It is recommended to start with a small amount to test your trading strategy. If you are interested in automated trading strategies, feel free to join the GMGN official group for discussions at \--- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/zero-latency-wallet-tracking-bot.md). # Zero-Latency Wallet Tracking Bot

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/RM7ROiJoeyZvaqZITdYB)

Push wallet monitoring messages in milliseconds

\### \*\*Zero-Latency Wallet Tracking Bot\*\* \* Exclusive private node, push channel acceleration, millisecond-level monitoring speed, one-click fast transaction \* Zero-Latency Wallet Tracking Notification - SOL: \* Zero-Latency Wallet Tracking Notification - BSC:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/bQTdzkHVUBUw4LWqz5Ha)

\### \*\*Setup steps:\*\* 1. Click to create a Telegram group

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/XHAiKqn0yzmVjjDMGWAz)

2\. invite Bot \[@GMGN\\\_vip\\\_Bot\](https://t.me/GMGN\_vip\_bot) to the newly created Telegram group \`\`\` /start@GMGN\_vip\_bot \`\`\` Or click info in the upper right corner of the group, click Add to add members, and search for "@GMGN\\\_vip\\\_Bot" (Note that the Bot's unique ID is "@GMGN\\\_vip\\\_Bot", do not add other scammers' bots)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/txzncWr5tDH5QM2FDpQl)

3\. Copy the group ID, or click the "Create Alerts" button to automatically fill in the group ID after jumping

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/ZMKOXl1gDBpGAL79JzrX)

4\. Create a group bot: Click \[@BotFather\](https://t.me/BotFather) , enter /newbot in the dialog box, fill in the bot name first, then fill in the bot username (must end with "bot" and cannot be repeated with other people's bots). After successful creation, copy the bot API token in the red box in the figure below

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/GUDZqDNXLGPne2hSfbnX)

5\. Paste the bot API token into the form. A maximum of 10 bot tokens can be entered

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/yj0cLjy7ozBN3lHOHJPA)

6\. Invite the newly created bot to the Telegram group

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/tF63GqmFmRg6iFcaZEhs)

7\. Set group admin rights for your bot

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/DRNLksGjyLaUTeCx6yJu)

8\. Click the Test Push button to see if the message is sent successfully. If it fails, please check whether the group ID and bot token are correct, and whether Telegram has given the bot permission to send messages.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/DDrVl0uDDoYjgMBVdD7M)

Click Test Push Button

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/1yhWqmhlshtgCIKly09k)

Click Test Push Button

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/Vu6QccDFZM3QFzp5GP6J)

Message sent failed

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/zCBrhXNZ34IIpi3SDvLj)

Test message sent successfully

9\. Set message parameters: support setting transaction type (all/buy/sell), notification language, transaction amount (under development), and then click Save

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/VTWc7etx2uf4CLVODuwM)

10\. After successfully saving, the wallet transaction dynamics you follow will be pushed to the Telegram group in real time

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/FbMHrHqwHv7eNcRjnHds)

\### \*\*Frequently Asked Questions\*\* \*\*Q: Why can’t test messages be sent?\*\* \*\*Solution:\*\* In general, group IDs starting with -4 or -1 can be used to send test messages. If your Telegram account is registered with a virtual phone number, it may trigger Telegram’s security risk controls, causing the bot to fail to send messages within the group you created. To troubleshoot: 1\\. Try typing /groupid in the group. If @GMGN\\\_vip\\\_bot can send a response, it indicates that the group permissions are configured correctly. 2\\. If the bot does not respond, try adding @GMGN\\\_vip\\\_bot as a group admin or invite a few more friends to the group. Then, try sending the /groupid command again to check if the bot can send messages. Note: The group ID is not permanent. As the number of group members increases, the group ID may change from starting with -4 to starting with -1. In such cases, you will need to reconfigure the bot form for instant notifications. --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. Access is granted solely based on sufficient \*\*Trading Volume\*\* on GMGN. Review will be completed within 24 hours after submission \* To access the GMGN Trade API, apply for permission by filling out the following Google Form: \* Upon approval, GMGN will issue an API Key to your email. Include the API Key in the request header with the name: \`x-route-key\` \* Each API Key is rate-limited to one call every 5 seconds \*\*ETH/Base chain Swap transaction steps:\*\* 1. \*\*Get the transaction route, recommended slippage, and recommended gas price at the same time\*\* \* Get transaction routing: \[Get the available routing for ETH/Base transactions\](/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api/get-the-available-routing-for-eth-base-bsc-transactions.md) \* Get recommended slippage: \[Get the recommended slippage value of ETH/Base token\](/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api/get-the-recommended-slippage-value-of-eth-base-bsc-token.md) \* Get recommended gas price: \[Get the recommended gas price for ETH/Base chain\](/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api/get-the-recommended-gas-price-for-eth-base-bsc-chain.md) 2. \*\*After selecting the route, call the simulated transaction\*\* \[💻Swap transaction simulation (ETH/Base)\](/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api/swap-transaction-simulation-eth-base-bsc.md) 3. \*\*After the simulated transaction is passed, get the returned data field and use normal rpc or anti-pinch rpc to submit the formal transaction\*\* Submit transaction signature, you can use ethers js library Signature transaction tutorial Ethers js library \--- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/insider-traders-snipers-first-70-buyers.md). # Insider Traders,Snipers,First 70 Buyers ### ⚠️ Disclaimer: The holding status of insider traders, snipers, and the first 70 buyers cannot guarantee real-time accuracy and is provided for auxiliary reference only. ## Insider Trading Holder Ratio

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/v6vZF3bmXJ8aQB67Z2jT)

\* Insider Trading: Wallets that did not buy tokens after trading opened, but hold tokens, may indicate that the token creator's holdings were transferred to multiple wallets to secretly sell off. Typically, legitimate projects distribute these through airdrops to users, and it is necessary to check the official Twitter for any airdrop events. \* Insider Trading Holder Ratio: The proportion of holdings by insider trading wallets to the total token supply, the higher the ratio, the more concerning it is. ## Snipers, First 70 buyers, Top 10 Holders

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/VkAJkYjUvKT1xwhoseF4)

\*\*Top 70 Buyer Wallets:\*\* Wallets that were the first 70 to buy tokens after the opening of trading. ### \*\*Wallet Labels:\*\* \* \*\*Snipers:\*\* Buyers who purchased within the first few blocks after trading opened. \* \*\*Scammer Wallets:\*\* Wallets that frequently buy rug pull tokens, suspected to be secondary accounts of the token creators involved in rug pull schemes. ## Explanation:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/xe46rFuqHVa8RSHcagZ3)

\### \*\*Holding Status Explanation:\*\* \* \*\*Hold\*\*: The number of tokens bought initially remains the same as the current holding. \* \*\*Buy More\*\*: More tokens were bought after the initial buy. \* \*\*Sell Part\*\*: Some tokens were sold after the initial buy, but there are still holdings left (on the Solana blockchain, it's temporarily impossible to distinguish between transferred and sold tokens). \* \*\*Sell All\*\*: All tokens bought initially have been sold. \* \*\*Transferred\*\*: No tokens were sold, but a portion was transferred, and there are still holdings remaining. ### \*\*Statistical Percentage Explanation:\*\* \* \*\*Total Bought\*\*: The amount of tokens initially bought by the first 70 buyers divided by the total token supply. \* \*\*Current Total Holdings\*\*: The actual amount of tokens currently held by the first 70 buyers divided by the total token supply. \* \*\*Top 10 Holders\*\*: Wallets currently ranked in the top 10 by holding amount (excluding liquidity pool addresses, with a list that changes in real time); the amount of tokens these wallets currently hold divided by the total token supply. --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. \> For the complete documentation index, see \[llms.txt\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt). Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/cooperation-api-integrate-gmgn-eth-base-bsc-trading-api/get-the-recommended-slippage-value-of-eth-base-bsc-token.md). # Get the recommended slippage value of ETH/Base/BSC token Get the recommended slippage value based on the input blockchain code and token contract address Access point: Request method: GET Request parameters: | \*\*Parameter name\*\* | \*\*Parameter Description\*\* | \*\*Is it necessary\*\* | \*\*Example\*\* | | ------------------ | ---------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------ | | token\\\_address | the contract address of the output token | yes | 0xbacacd83b68c92ae07ef382d0c0277d1bd1c7c4d | | token\\\_in\\\_address | enter the token contract address | no, the main purpose is to solve the problem of accumulated slippage when swapping two alt coins | 0x0c48250eb1f29491f1efbeec0261eb556f0973c7 | Return parameter:

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Parameter name** | **Parameter Description** | **Example** |
| msg | error message | amountIn is required |
| code | correct 0, Incorrect -1 | 0   |
| data | returns the recommended slippage value. If it is 10%, it returns "10". display\_slippage is the displayed slippage value. | {<br><br>"recommend\_slippage":"1",<br><br>"display\_slippage":"1",<br><br>"has\_tax":false<br><br>} |

Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/alert-sniper-new-following-limit-orders.md). # ALERT: Sniper New, Following, Limit Orders ## 1. Sniper New: #### Web – Signal page (bottom “Signal” tab) From the bottom \*\*Signal\*\* tab you can open the Signal page and see multiple types of market signals, including: \* \*\*Dex Paid\*\* signals – Dex Paid Ad, Dex Boost Paid, Dex Bar Paid, Update Social, etc. \* \*\*Price Alert\*\* – Price Up, ATH, Key MC and other price-based triggers \* \*\*Other Signals\*\* – Pump Live, CTO and more special events You can filter by \*\*Age\*\*, \*\*MC\*\* and \*\*Total Fees\*\*, and quickly sort for tokens with strong moves and high attention #### GMGN App – AI Signal In the GMGN App, go to the bottom \*\*Monitor\*\* tab and switch to the top \*\*AI Signal\*\* tab to: \* View AI-curated, high-quality token signals \* Tap a signal to open the \*\*Token Detail\*\* page for deeper analysis and instant \*\*Buy\*\* execution ## 2. \*\*Wallet Tracker\*\*: \*\*Web – Wallet Tracker\*\* On the \*\*Wallet Tracker\*\* page (bottom \*\*Wallet Tracker\*\* tab), you can see all activity from the wallets you track, turn on GMGN web notifications, and connect the \*\*0-Delay Bot\*\* to receive real-time trade alerts for these wallets \*\*GMGN App – Wallet tracking\*\* In the GMGN App: \* Go to the bottom \*\*Track\*\* tab \* Switch to the top \*\*Track\*\* tab to view the list of wallets you are tracking \* Switch to the \*\*Wallet Tracker\*\* tab to see their latest buy/sell actions \* Turn on app notifications to receive push alerts whenever these tracked wallets make new trades

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/MKaRCeEA0eVHgYevj8sW)

\## \*\*3. Order Management:\*\* \*\*Web – Orders on the token page\*\* There is no standalone “Open Orders” page anymore.\\ On Web, open any \*\*token detail\*\* page and switch to the bottom \*\*Orders\*\* tab. Here you can view and manage all of your orders for this token, including \*\*Limit\*\*, \*\*Auto Trading\*\*, \*\*Migrated Snipe\*\*, \*\*Sell on Dev Sell\*\*, \*\*Buy on Dev Sell\*\* and \*\*Advanced\*\* strategies. \*\*GMGN App – Orders under Assets\*\* In the GMGN App: \* Go to the bottom \*\*Assets\*\* tab \* In the wallet header, switch to the \*\*Order\*\* tab \* Inside \*\*Order\*\*, you can toggle between \*\*Advanced\*\*, \*\*Limit\*\*, \*\*Auto Trading\*\*, \*\*Dev Sell\*\*, etc., view details of each order and use \*\*Close All Orders\*\* to manage them in one tap

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/yGg2RPx4RUrBteh5RoC4)

\#### :warning: Disclaimer: Please check token security audit before trading! --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. \*\*Upper functional modules:\*\* \* Click the button next to the wallet name to make a note of the wallet name \* Click the button next to the contract address to copy the CA or jump to solscan.io to query wallet activities \* Click on the tweet to jump to the wallet address of the wallet owner \* Click on Wallet Copy to copy the transactions of that wallet. You can review all of its activity on the \*\*Wallet Tracker\*\* page (bottom \*Wallet Tracker\* tab on Web) and connect the \*\*0-Delay Bot\*\* to receive real-time trade alerts for this wallet. \* In the \*\*GMGN App\*\*, go to the bottom \*\*Track\*\* tab, then switch to the top \*\*Follow\*\* tab to see all wallets you follow. Switch to the \*\*Activity\*\* tab to view their latest buy/sell actions. Turn on app notifications to receive push alerts whenever these tracked wallets place new trades. \*\*Recent 7D/30D profit and loss/win rate:\*\* \* View the wallet's recent D profit and loss ratio and fund profit and loss amount \* Check the current win rate and balance of the wallet \*\*PNL:\*\*

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 7D TXS | 7D/30D transcations numbers：Bought is green/ Sale is red |
| Totnl PNL | Total profit and loss |
| Unrealized Profits | The current unsold value of the tokens in this wallet |
| 7D/30D AVG Duration | 7D/30D average holding time |
| 7D/30D Total Cost | Total cost of buying tokens in the last 7 days/30 days |
| 7D/30D Token Avg Cost | In the last 7 days/30 days. The total cost of buying tokens divided by the number of tokens bought |
| 7D/30D Token Avg Realized Profits | Average realized profit of each ghostwriter’s sold portion in the last 7 days/30 days (excluding unrealized profit) |

\*\*Distribution:\*\* \* You can see the increase or decrease of the amount and quantity of tokens purchased by the wallet in the last 7 days/30 days. \*\*Phishing check:\*\*

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Blacklist | The wallet bought the number of blacklist/ honeypot tokens. If it is too much, it may be a phishing wallet of the cabal team |
| Didn’t buy: | The number of non-bought tokens in the wallet can be used to analyze how many tokens are transferred from other wallets, thereby analyzing the wallet attributes |
| Sold > Bought | The number of tokens sold by this wallet is greater than the number of tokens bought |
| Buy/Sell within 10 secs | The number of tokens that complete buy/sell transactions within ten seconds. This may be a bot or a wallet that farm copy trade users |

\### ⚠️ Auto sell attention items: Auto sell is calculated separately for each purchase, please note that it is not calculated according to the current total position. If there are multiple purchases, be sure to manually close the auto sell order of the previous purchase to avoid triggering take profit /stop loss. If it is not turned off, then each purchase will trigger the sell limit order you set several times, which may produce the following situations. 1\\. Buy a single order and sell multiple preset orders with auto sell: \* Suppose you want to sell 75% of a single purchase in batches: A certain purchase (buy 200 tokens), want to sell 50% at 50% rise (i.e. 200 x \*50%=100 tokens);\* \\ \*Then continue to increase by 50% (cumulative increase of 100%) and sell 25% of the purchase at that time (i.e. 200 x\* 25%=50); \\ A single purchase of the last 50 remaining, twice sold 100+50 a total of 150; \\ At the same time, set a stop loss of 30% to clear the single purchase of tokens; \\ You should enter it like this：

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/3AYFdwt6OrsedfiuXKJx)

2\\. Multiple purchases, auto sell of a single preset order to sell: \* Suppose you buy two trades and execute the default preset order (100% stop profit) at the same time, and the prices are $1 and $1.2 respectively; \\ Then these orders will be sold when the token price is $2 and $2.4 respectively;\\ Then calculate your total profit based on the amount of your two separate purchases \\ Estimating gains and losses is difficult, it is not recommended to try, it is best to manually turn off the last auto sell Settings. 3.Multiple purchases, auto sale of multiple preset orders to sell: \* Suppose you have more than one buy, and set a number of preset orders. The auto sell order corresponding to each purchase will be gradually sold in batches according to the set of multiple take profit/stop loss conditions. \\ Estimating gains and losses is difficult, it is not recommended to try, it is best to manually turn off the last automatic selling Settings. --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook.
