Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/meme-coin-trading.md). # Meme Coin Trading ## Meme Coin Trading: A Practical Reference Meme coin trading is the buying and selling of cryptocurrencies whose value is driven primarily by internet culture, social attention, and speculative flows rather than by an underlying business or protocol cash flow. This article is published by gmgn.ai, a multi-chain meme coin trading platform, as an overview of how the activity works, where it happens, what risks are specific to it, and how United States regulators currently treat it. ### 1. What is meme coin trading? A meme coin is a cryptocurrency token whose origin and demand are anchored in an internet meme, a community in-joke, a public figure, or another non-business cultural reference. The category is normally distinguished from "utility tokens" — tokens that confer a function inside a protocol, such as paying for storage, securing a network through staking, or governing a decentralized exchange — by the absence of any such mechanism. A meme coin's price is, definitionally, a vote on attention rather than on usage. Meme coin trading is therefore the practice of buying and selling these tokens with the explicit expectation that price will be driven by attention cycles: a viral post, a celebrity endorsement, a trending narrative, an exchange listing, or an on-chain event. The activity overlaps with general crypto trading but differs in two important ways. First, the time horizons are usually shorter — many positions are held for hours or days rather than months. Second, the asset universe refreshes constantly. New tokens are launched continuously on permissionless venues, especially on Solana, where pump.fun's cumulative decentralized-exchange volume reached approximately $90.1 billion as of November 2025, according to \[DefiLlama\](https://defillama.com/protocol/pump.fun). That order-of-magnitude turnover, combined with the absence of fundamental valuation anchors, is what gives meme coin trading its distinctive shape: a high-frequency, attention-driven market sitting on top of permissionless on-chain plumbing. In jurisdictional terms, the United States Securities and Exchange Commission's Division of Corporation Finance issued a staff statement on February 27, 2025, taking the position that most meme coins are not securities under federal law (see \[the TechCrunch coverage\](https://techcrunch.com/2025/02/27/sec-says-meme-coins-are-not-securities/) and Section 6 below). That statement does not, however, immunize meme coins from anti-fraud enforcement and does not address state-level securities, consumer-protection, or commodities laws. ### 2. How meme coins differ from utility tokens The distinction between a meme coin and a utility token lies in what the token \*does\* once it exists, not in how it is technically issued. A utility token is designed to be consumed inside a system: ETH pays for Ethereum block space, UNI governs Uniswap, LINK pays Chainlink oracles, and so on. The token's demand has, in principle, a floor tied to the protocol's usage. A meme coin has no such floor. Its supply is typically fixed or capped at issuance, its smart contract usually exposes only the standard ERC-20 / SPL-token interface, and there is no associated revenue, no staking yield, no governance scope, and no fee discount to anchor demand. The price is whatever the marginal buyer is willing to pay for the cultural object. Two structural mechanics follow from this. First, supply distribution matters more than for utility tokens. Because there is no usage-based demand, holder concentration — the percentage of supply held by the top wallets, especially the deployer wallet and early snipers — is the single most important on-chain signal of how a price is likely to behave on the way up \*and\* on the way down. Second, liquidity tends to live in a single decentralized-exchange pool against a base asset (SOL, ETH, BNB, USDC), often seeded by the deployer. That liquidity can be removed, and historically has been, which is the mechanical basis for the "rug pull" exit pattern described in Section 5. Dogecoin, the original meme coin, was created in late 2013 as a parody of Bitcoin and reached a peak market capitalization on the order of $88 billion in 2021, according to \[Wikipedia\](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Meme\_coin)'s entry on meme coins. Its longevity is the exception: the long tail of meme coins that have launched since — over 5,200 indexed by \[CoinMarketCap\](https://coinmarketcap.com/view/memes/) as of late 2025 — has overwhelmingly trended toward zero on a 90-day horizon. The asymmetry between a small set of survivors and a large set of decays is fundamental to the trade. ### 3. Where meme coins trade Meme coins trade across a small number of distinct venue types, on a small number of high-throughput chains. Understanding the venue map is a prerequisite for trading; venues differ in latency, fee structure, listing thresholds, and the kinds of tokens that exist on them at all. On the chain side, the bulk of new meme coin activity in 2025–2026 has concentrated on \*\*Solana\*\*, \*\*Ethereum\*\*, \*\*BNB Chain (BSC)\*\*, \*\*Base\*\*, and to a lesser extent \*\*Tron\*\*. Solana has dominated launch counts since 2024, principally because of permissionless launchpads (most prominently pump.fun, whose token issuance and bonding-curve mechanics produce hundreds to thousands of new tokens per day). Ethereum and Base are weighted toward higher-market-cap tokens that have already attracted liquidity. BNB Chain and Tron host their own resident communities, with characteristic listing patterns and slippage profiles. On the venue side, three categories matter: \* \*\*Centralized exchanges (CEXs)\*\*: Coinbase, Binance, Kraken, and similar order-book venues. Listings are gated; only a small fraction of meme coins ever appear here. CEX listings are typically treated as a late-stage liquidity event rather than an entry point. \* \*\*Decentralized exchanges (DEXs)\*\*: Raydium, Uniswap, PancakeSwap, and others. These are the primary venues where most meme coins trade. Trading is non-custodial, anyone can list a token, and execution happens against an automated market maker (AMM) liquidity pool. \* \*\*Aggregators and trading terminals\*\*: Tools such as Jupiter (Solana), 1inch (Ethereum), and on-chain trading interfaces (DEX Screener, Photon, BullX). These route across multiple DEXs to find the best execution and surface real-time on-chain data — wallet flows, holder distribution, deployer history — that order-book venues do not expose. The category-wide market scale is not small. As of late 2025, the meme coin segment tracked by \[CoinGecko\](https://www.coingecko.com/en/categories/meme-token) had a combined market cap of approximately $34.8 billion and 24-hour trading volume of approximately $17.4 billion. That puts meme coin trading in the same order of magnitude as the volume of mid-cap equities, with a very different microstructure. ### 4. The meme coin trading workflow The end-to-end trade can be decomposed into five stages. The terminology is standard in on-chain trading communities; each step has its own tool category. 1. \*\*Wallet setup\*\*. A self-custodied wallet — Phantom on Solana, MetaMask or Rabby on EVM chains — is created. The wallet holds the keys; no centralized exchange is involved. 2. \*\*Funding\*\*. Native gas tokens (SOL, ETH, BNB) and a base trading asset (often USDC or the chain's native asset) are deposited from a CEX or another wallet. Gas-token balances must cover swap fees plus a margin for failed transactions. 3. \*\*Discovery\*\*. New tokens are surfaced through on-chain feeds (DEX Screener, GeckoTerminal), launch trackers (pump.fun's "new" tab, Photon scanners), social signal sources (X/Twitter accounts, Telegram groups), and wallet-tracking tools that show what known profitable wallets — "smart money" — are buying. \*Smart money\* is a term of art for wallet addresses that have demonstrated above-market returns over a defined period; tracking them is one of the dominant discovery patterns. 4. \*\*Execution\*\*. The buy is placed against a DEX pool, usually through an aggregator. Slippage tolerance, priority fee, and (on Solana) Jito tip are set explicitly because meme coin pools are thin and price moves between block submission and inclusion can be large. Some traders use \*sniper bots\* — programmatic buyers that submit transactions in the same block as the pool's first liquidity-add — to enter at the lowest possible price. 5. \*\*Exit management\*\*. Take-profit, stop-loss, and trailing-stop logic are run on top of the on-chain price feed. Exits are normally split: a portion at a fixed multiple to recover the cost basis, the remainder held or sold dynamically based on holder behavior, deployer-wallet activity, or the loss of a key support level. Each stage has failure modes — a wallet drained by a malicious approval, a transaction front-run by a bot, a position that cannot be exited because the deployer pulled liquidity. Section 5 lists those risks systematically. ### 5. Risks unique to meme coin trading Meme coin trading inherits the general risks of crypto (custody loss, exchange failure, market volatility) and adds a set that does not apply to mainstream crypto assets. Understanding them is the load-bearing part of the practice. \* \*\*Rug pull\*\*: a \*rug pull\* is the removal by a token's deployer or a privileged contract role of the liquidity that backs the token, producing a near-total price collapse. This is a contract-design risk, not a market risk. Mitigations are mechanical: confirm liquidity is locked or burned, check the deployer wallet's history, verify the contract has no mint or fee-modification function reachable by an unrestricted owner. \* \*\*Honeypot\*\*: a contract that accepts buys but blocks sells, either through a \`transfer\` hook that reverts for non-whitelisted addresses or through a confiscatory sell tax. Static analysis tools (token-checker scripts run by aggregators and trading terminals) detect most honeypots; the failure mode is the trader who skips the check during a fast launch. \* \*\*Holder concentration\*\*: when a small number of wallets — often the deployer plus a handful of insiders or snipers — hold a large share of supply, those wallets can dump into any rally. Concentration is observable from the chain and is the most informative single risk metric. \* \*\*Deployer / "dev" sell\*\*: the holder of the deployer wallet sells, typically the largest position. The market interprets this as a signal that the project's creator no longer expects the price to rise, and the price reacts accordingly. \* \*\*MEV (Maximal Extractable Value)\*\*: search bots that sit between traders and block producers can sandwich a buy — submitting a buy of their own ahead of the trader's transaction and a sell after — capturing a portion of the trader's intended price impact. On Ethereum, private-mempool RPCs (Flashbots Protect, MEV Blocker) mitigate this; on Solana, Jito tips and bundle execution serve a similar role. \* \*\*Regulatory and tax risk\*\*: even where meme coins are not classified as securities (see Section 6), gains are typically taxable as property in the United States, and losses to fraud may not be fully deductible. As of January 19, 2025, after the peak of the official Trump-branded meme coin, an estimated 764,000 wallets held losses on the position, according to \[Wikipedia\](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Meme\_coin)'s summary citing on-chain analysis — a useful illustration of the loss distribution typical to the category. These risks are not alternatives to each other; a single token can be exposed to all of them in sequence. ### 6. US regulatory status The current United States position on meme coins, as of May 2026, is set by a Division of Corporation Finance staff statement issued on February 27, 2025, summarized in contemporaneous coverage by \[TechCrunch\](https://techcrunch.com/2025/02/27/sec-says-meme-coins-are-not-securities/). The statement takes the view that "most meme coins" do not constitute securities under federal law, on the reasoning that they "do not generate a yield or convey rights to future income, profits, or assets of a business." The statement characterizes meme coins as more analogous to collectibles than to investment contracts. Several scope qualifications follow directly from the statement and are important to keep in mind. \* The position is a \*\*staff statement\*\*, not a Commission rule or a court ruling. It reflects the views of the Division of Corporation Finance and can be revised by future staff or supplanted by Commission action. \* It applies to \*\*most\*\* meme coins, not all. Tokens that pair meme branding with profit-sharing rights, staking yield, or implicit promises of managerial effort retain a path to securities classification under the Howey-style analysis the staff continues to apply. \* It does \*\*not\*\* displace \*\*anti-fraud authority\*\*. Misrepresentations about a token, undisclosed insider sales, and pump-and-dump conduct remain subject to enforcement under the general anti-fraud provisions of the federal securities laws, and to criminal statutes administered by the Department of Justice. \* It does \*\*not\*\* address \*\*state-level\*\* securities or consumer-protection regimes, \*\*commodities\*\* classification under the Commodity Futures Trading Commission's authority, or \*\*tax\*\* treatment under the Internal Revenue Code. \* Buyers of meme coins, the staff statement notes, do not receive federal securities law protections — meaning the standard registration, disclosure, and recourse machinery does not apply to the asset itself. Outside the United States, treatments vary materially: the European Union's MiCA regime, the UK's Financial Conduct Authority guidance, and Asia-Pacific frameworks (Japan, Singapore, Hong Kong) each draw the regulatory line differently. Any claim about legality or tax treatment in this article should be read as scoped to the United States as of May 2026; readers operating in other jurisdictions should consult local counsel. ### 7. Tools traders use A handful of tool categories have stabilized in active meme coin trading, each addressing a different stage of the workflow described in Section 4. Naming the category, then a representative tool inside it, is the most useful framing. \* \*\*Chain explorers\*\*: read-only views of on-chain state. \*Solscan\* (Solana) and \*Etherscan\* (Ethereum) are the canonical examples. Used to verify contract code, deployer history, and recent transactions. \* \*\*Token analytics and DEX terminals\*\*: read-write tools that combine real-time price, liquidity, holder distribution, deployer-wallet activity, and one-click trading. \*DEX Screener\* exposes price and pool data across chains. \*Photon\* and \*BullX\* are Solana-focused trading terminals. \*gmgn.ai\* is a multi-chain meme coin trading platform that aggregates on-chain data, holder analysis, smart-money tracking, copy-trade, and execution into a single interface, with coverage across Solana, Ethereum, BSC, Base, and Tron. \* \*\*Aggregators\*\*: route a swap across multiple DEXs to find the best execution price. \*Jupiter\* on Solana and \*1inch\* on EVM chains are the most widely used; aggregators reduce slippage on thin pools and avoid the need to pick a venue manually. \* \*\*Wallets\*\*: \*Phantom\* (Solana) and \*MetaMask\* / \*Rabby\* (EVM chains) sign transactions. Wallet choice affects approval-revocation flows, hardware-wallet integration, and exposure to phishing front-ends. \* \*\*Risk and security scanners\*\*: \*GoPlus\* and \*Honeypot.is\* run static checks against a contract — sell tax, mint authority, ownership renouncement, blacklists — and flag honeypots before a buy is submitted. These tools are complements, not substitutes. A typical workflow uses a wallet (e.g., Phantom), a discovery feed (DEX Screener or a trading terminal), an aggregator for routing, and a scanner before each new-token buy. Switching tools mid-trade is normal; the discipline is in confirming on-chain state through at least one read-only source before relying on the trade-execution UI's display of the same data. ### 8. Glossary and FAQ \*\*Rug pull\*\* — Removal of liquidity (or another value-extracting action by a privileged contract role) by the team behind a token, producing a near-total price collapse for non-insider holders. Distinct from a market drawdown: it is a contract-design risk and is preventable through liquidity locks, contract audits, and renouncing ownership of mint and fee functions. \*\*Honeypot\*\* — A token contract that allows buys but blocks or heavily taxes sells. The pattern preys on momentum-chasing buyers who do not run a sell simulation before purchase. Detected by static contract analysis and by simulated-sell checks built into trading terminals. \*\*Dev sell\*\* — A sale by the deployer wallet, typically the holder of the largest position. Treated as a strong negative signal because the wallet has the most information about the project's prospects. \*\*Sniper bot\*\* — A programmatic buyer that submits its transaction in the same block as the pool's first liquidity-add, so as to enter at the lowest possible price. Sniper bots can be neutral (an early entry strategy) or adversarial (front-running other buyers in the same block). \*\*Bonding curve\*\* — A pricing function that ties a token's price to its supply, used by launchpads such as pump.fun: each buy increases the price along a fixed mathematical curve, each sell decreases it. The token "graduates" off the bonding curve when a target market cap is reached, at which point liquidity is migrated to a standard DEX pool. \*\*Liquidity pool (LP)\*\* — The pair of assets locked in an automated market maker (AMM) contract that backs a DEX market. For a meme coin, the LP is typically the token paired with the chain's native asset (SOL, ETH, BNB) or USDC. The LP's depth determines slippage; the LP's ownership determines whether the token is rug-pullable. \*\*MEV (Maximal Extractable Value)\*\* — Profit that block producers and search bots can extract by reordering, inserting, or omitting transactions within a block. The most common adverse pattern for retail traders is the \*sandwich attack\*: an MEV bot front-runs the buy and back-runs it with a sell, capturing a portion of the trader's price impact. \*\*Holder concentration\*\* — The percentage of token supply held by the top N wallets, typically reported as "top 10" and "top 50" shares. High concentration (e.g., top 10 wallets holding more than \\~30% of supply, with no clear lock or vesting) is the most informative single risk metric for a new meme coin. \*\*Smart money\*\* — Wallet addresses that have demonstrated above-benchmark returns over a defined window. Tracked by analytics platforms as a leading indicator: when known smart-money wallets accumulate a new token, that flow is treated as discovery signal. \*\*FAQ — Are meme coins legal in the United States?\*\* Yes, as of May 2026. The SEC's Division of Corporation Finance staff statement of February 27, 2025 takes the position that most meme coins are not securities under federal law. That position does not exempt fraudulent conduct from enforcement, does not address state law, and does not displace federal tax obligations on gains. \*\*FAQ — How is meme coin trading taxed in the US?\*\* The Internal Revenue Service treats cryptocurrency, including meme coins, as property; gains are taxed at short- or long-term capital gains rates depending on holding period. Tax treatment is independent of the SEC's classification and applies regardless of whether the token is or is not a security. Consult a tax professional; this article is not tax advice. \*\*FAQ — What is the difference between a meme coin and a shitcoin?\*\* "Shitcoin" is informal slang for any low-quality cryptocurrency. Meme coin is a narrower, more neutral category: a token whose origin is cultural or comedic rather than business-driven. Many meme coins are shitcoins by the informal usage; not all shitcoins are meme coins. \*\*\* \*This article is an editorial reference, not financial, tax, or legal advice. Numeric claims are dated; verify primary sources for any decision that depends on them. Last revised: May 2026.\* --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. # Unknown

\> For the complete documentation index, see \[llms.txt\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt). Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/safety-tip.md). # Safety Tip This article will introduce common hacker phishing methods and how to set up security in web plug-in wallets and GMGN TG wallets to prevent theft. \*\*In the dark forest world of blockchain, first keep in mind the following two major security rules:\*\* \* \*\*Zero Trust\*\*\\ Simply put, it means to be skeptical, and always be skeptical of any platform, robot, plug-in wallet authorization signature, etc. that requires the input of a private key \* \*\*Continuous Security Validation\*\*\\ In order to trust something, you have to validate what you doubt, and make validating a habit. 1. \[Stolen: Common phishing and attack methods used by hackers\](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/QPvrIv5rRiWBRIdXmPYO/an-quan-ti-shi#id-1.-bei-dao-chang-jian-hei-ke-diao-yu-yi-ji-gong-ji-shou-duan) 2. \[Anti-Stolen: Take precautions in plugin wallets and TG wallets\](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/QPvrIv5rRiWBRIdXmPYO/an-quan-ti-shi#id-2.-fang-dao-zai-cha-jian-qian-bao-yi-ji-tg-qian-bao-zhong-zuo-hao-yu-fang) 3. \[Equipment Security\](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/QPvrIv5rRiWBRIdXmPYO/an-quan-ti-shi#id-3.-she-bei-an-quan) 4. \[What to do if assets stolen\](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/QPvrIv5rRiWBRIdXmPYO/an-quan-ti-shi#id-4.-bei-dao-le-zen-me-ban) ### 1. Stolen: Common phishing and attack methods used by hackers [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/safety-tip.md#id-1.-bei-dao-chang-jian-hei-ke-diao-yu-yi-ji-gong-ji-shou-duan)
\*\*Scams in TG:\*\* 1\\) Please remember that the official admins will not send you a private message first!!! Scammers pretend to be GMGN admins to send fraudulent messages to defraud private keys or steal TG accounts! \* Common situation: You send a message in the group, and the scammer asks you to cooperate under the pretext of helping you solve the problem, which eventually leads to theft. Some scammers will hide the user name and fill in the real admin's linl in the bio, which is very confusing and can easily lead the stolen user to think it is an official scam!

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/IwVnz6W2CzjXYcaZ2OfR)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/mJO4VGdOyvSnAbHq7S6i)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/W7n5Vg7tVF2Y8V2jnAR8)

2\\) Do not click on any ads that appear above the GMGN bot! These are scammers who may steal your wallet! The GMGN official bot will never ask for your wallet's private key first!

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/70a1l7gOxF6NsDStlIG2)

3\\) In some token TG groups or links sent by scammers, there will be such so-called "security verification". Please do not click it! Do not enter any of your account information, including mobile phone number, password, etc.!

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FgFNJiaTqbuc19wQiEwvL%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D788a00d1-f876-4170-8229-c908112d8988&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=7c82be57&sv=2)

4\\) The scammer copied a GMGN fake group, pulled you into the group, and posted a fraudulent link in the fake group to defraud the private key! Because there are a lot of robots in the group, it looks like there are a lot of people, and they will copy the real group messages, which can easily be mistaken for the official group. Please confirm whether it is a real group through the official GMGN Twitter! ! \* It is recommended that users check the "Do not allow anyone" option in "Privacy and Security - Groups and Channels". This will not allow anyone to add you to unfamiliar groups and channels, which can effectively prevent you from being pulled into fraudulent groups.

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/YuDKvt4943XLAkI9jwQE)

5\\) The scammer pretends to be an official Telegram admin and sends you a message. The scam words are as shown in the picture, and they guide you to click on the scam link. Please do not click it! ! Just report and block it!

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252F3y9LwRWu2nziPI9e0VIy%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Db2410b8a-5499-4977-ae0d-76b3782dfb3c&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=ba28aaa5&sv=2)

\*\*Scams in Web3 plugin wallets:\*\* 1\\) The most important safety principle to be followed in signature security is: what you see is what you sign. Therefore, you need to regularly check whether the wallet has authorized unfamiliar applications that you are not familiar with. Please enter the wallet to check the authorization list and cancel unknown authorizations! \* Airdrop scam: The attackers airdropped NFTs to users in batches (Figure 1). Users entered the target website through the link in the description of the airdropped NFT and connected their wallets (Figure 2). After they clicked the "Mint" button on the page, the approval window popped up (Figure 3). Note that there was no special notification or message in the pop up window at this time. Once they approved, all SOLs in the wallet would be transferred away

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FEn40cyaTiWhIYJajYefT%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Da75ecd5b-c27b-4a43-b4cb-75a7bc60b7f5&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=227aa0a9&sv=2)

2\\) Unknown transfers: Sometimes you will receive small amounts of unknown transfers in your wallet. Most of them are related to advertisements or scams. Don’t be curious. It will not affect the normal operation of your wallet. Don’t worry too much

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FEhlnQMynstZG9SePnruI%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df1e0e5fc-d68e-4f95-b6a0-339b09daa881&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=fe29ce09&sv=2)

\### 2. Anti-stolen: Take precautions in plugin wallets and TG wallets [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/safety-tip.md#id-2.-fang-dao-zai-cha-jian-qian-bao-yi-ji-tg-qian-bao-zhong-zuo-hao-yu-fang)
\*\*Telegram Security Precautions:\*\* 1\\) It is recommended that users who are not so familiar with "TG Privacy and Security" follow the following settings, especially remember to turn on the items marked in red in the picture, which can effectively ensure the security of your TG account \* Two-step verification: After it is turned on, even if a hacker gets your phone number and password, when logging in on a new device, you still need to enter a separate password after entering the SMS verification code, fully ensuring security \* Phone number: Prevent hackers from directly obtaining your mobile phone number and sending you fraudulent text messages or other fraudulent activities \* Groups ＆ channels: Stolen 4) has relevant examples, which can effectively prevent being pulled into fraudulent groups

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/AyfN3jsaiDllOrteLOYq)

2\\) Confirm whether your Telegram app is installed through the official channel 3\\) Check whether Telegram has authorized a strange fake bot to avoid the balance in the wallet being transferred by a fraud bot due to entering a mobile phone number or clicking a fraud link. It is recommended to verify the consistency through multiple GMGN official channels before making a transaction \*\*Web3 plugin wallet:\*\* 1\\) Enter the web3 plug-in wallet to query the authorization list, cancel unknown authorization, and confirm that the authorized applications are the corresponding official applications 2\\) Turn on Auto-Lock timer to prevent others from seeing your private key when the device is away from you

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/BhtHlTDgKaEr3AW6a5pF)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/3YhOqFvWHYLoWNDFylKH)

\### 3. Equipment Security [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/safety-tip.md#id-3.-she-bei-an-quan)
1\\) If your device is an Android phone/Windows computer/non-iPad tablet, please be careful not to click on unknown links or download unknown applications to avoid Trojans or malicious programs in your phone/computer, and regularly use security software to check the device, eliminate viruses, and prevent risks 2\\) If your device is an Apple device, there are still some fraudulent apps in the app store and in test software that has not been officially launched. You need to be careful 3\\) Security principles: \* For all the knowledge from the Internet, refer to at least two sources, corroborate each other, and always stay skeptical \* Segregate. Don't put all the eggs in one basket \* For wallets with important assets, don't do unnecessary updates \* What you see is what you sign. You need to be aware of what you are signing, and of the expected result after the signed transaction is sent out. Don't do things that will make you regret afterwards \* Pay attention to system security updates. Apply them as soon as they are available \* Don't download ＆ install programs recklessly can actually prevent most risks ### 4. What to do if assets stolen [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/safety-tip.md#id-4.-bei-dao-le-zen-me-ban)
Almost all Web3 users have been stolen in their web3 journey. We recommend that users whose funds have been stolen fill out \[the SlowMist Security Team's stolen application form\](https://aml.slowmist.com/recovery-funds.html) , which can track the hacker's address and try to recover the funds 1\\) Stop loss first\\ Stop loss is about limiting your loss. It can be broken down to at least two phases: \* The Immediate Action Phase. Act immediately! If you see hackers are transferring your assets, think no more. Just Hurry up and transfer the remaining assets to a safe place. If you have experience in front running trades, just grab and run. Depending on the type of asset, if you can freeze your assets on the blockchain, do it as soon as possible; if you can do on-chain analysis and find your assets are transferred into a centralized exchange, you can contact their risk control department \* The Post-Action Phase. Once the situation is stabilized, your focus should be on making sure there would not be secondary or tertiary attacks 2\\) Protect the scene\\ When you find that something is wrong, stay calm and take a deep breath. Do remember to protect the scene. Here are a few suggestions: \* If the accident happens on a computer, server or other devices connected to the Internet, disconnect the network immediately while keeping the devices on with power supply \* Unless you are capable of handling this by yourself, waiting for security professionals to step in for analysis is always the better choice 3\\) Analyze the causes \* The purpose of analyzing the cause is to understand how the assets were stolen: private key theft/TG account theft/device hacking, etc. \* For example, at least clarify the following points: \* Summary 1: Who was involved, when did this happen , what has happened, and how much was the total loss? \* Summary 2: The wallet addresses related to the loss, the wallet address of the hacker, the type of the coin, the quantity of the coin. It could be much clearer with the help of just a single table 4\\) Fill out the SlowMist Security Team Theft Application Form It is recommended that the stolen users fill out \[the SlowMist Security Team's stolen application form\](https://aml.slowmist.com/recovery-funds.html) , which will restrict hackers and related addresses from depositing and withdrawing funds from CEX, and track the hacker's address to try to recover the funds ⚠️GMGN's first purpose is security, there is no loophole that leads to the transfer of wallet balances, and in case of theft, please check yourself according to the above-listed situations. GMGN does not perform any operations on the user's wallet, and we do not have the ability to transfer any user's wallet balance. \`\`\` Some quotes from Slowmist Security team \[Blockchain Dark Forest Selfguard Handbook\] https://darkhandbook.io/ \`\`\` --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. \> For the complete documentation index, see \[llms.txt\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/llms.txt). Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md). # Token page: Chart - multicharts, Activity, Trading system Left column: \* \[Holding/ Watchlist/ Following list\](#id-1.-holding-watchlist-following-list) \* \[Trending/ Pump List\](#id-2.trending-pump) Main interface: \* \[Chart function\](#id-1.kxian-tu-biao-gong-neng) \* \[Cross-chain Multichart\](#id-2.-cross-chain-multicharts) \* \[Instant trade/ Sell inits\](#id-2.-yi-jian-mai-mai) \* \[Trading Activity History\](#id-1.-jiao-yi-huo-dong-li-shi) \* \[Activity\](#id-2.-huo-dong) \* \[Traders\](#right-column) \* \[Holders\](#id-4.-chi-you-zhe) \* \[BC Owners\](#id-5.-lan-chou-chi-you-zhe) \* \[Position/ Limit/ Auto \](#id-6.-wo-de-jiao-yi-gua-dan-ce-le) Right column: \* \[Token social media\](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/CViiXs9AOT1s7qMOXxgu/dai-bi-xiang-qing-yekxian-duo-tu-biao-jiao-yi-huo-dong-jiao-yi-xi-tong#id-2.linked-wallet-bottom) \* \[Trading Module\](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/CViiXs9AOT1s7qMOXxgu/dai-bi-xiang-qing-yekxian-duo-tu-biao-jiao-yi-huo-dong-jiao-yi-xi-tong#id-2.-jiao-yi-mo-kuai) \* \[Ghostwriting various information\](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/CViiXs9AOT1s7qMOXxgu/dai-bi-xiang-qing-yekxian-duo-tu-biao-jiao-yi-huo-dong-jiao-yi-xi-tong#id-1.top) \* \[Pool Information\](https://docs-gmgn-ai.translate.goog/cn/~/changes/CViiXs9AOT1s7qMOXxgu/dai-bi-xiang-qing-yekxian-duo-tu-biao-jiao-yi-huo-dong-jiao-yi-xi-tong#id-3.pool-info-lower-right) ## Trading System Overview:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/m0KOdbjNg0EAGkWhc5l4)

✅Check more about Featured Icon Definition in trading activities: {% content-ref url="/pages/P1iUemK4XoQJTTk1VRfq" %} \[Featured Icon Definition\](/index/featured-icon-definition.md) {% endcontent-ref %} ## \*\*Left\*\* column ### \*\*1.\*\* Holding/ Watchlist/ Following list

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/4Igs5ZChLGIRJ6IOucKb)

\* Holding: Quickly understand the price changes of your collection of tokens \* Watchlist: Quickly understand the price and profit changes of the tokens you hold, and you can sell them quickly at any time when watching the chart \* Followed: Receive alerts on the wallets you have followed, and choose whether to enable sound notifications, so you can follow wallet to buy at any time when watching the chart ### \*\*2. Trending/ Pump list\*\*[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-2.trending-pump)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/exxYgA4argB1g3bAtEqS)

\* Trending: Filter out popular tokens that best suit your trading strategy by checking time, number of transactions, price, and price percentage \* Pump: Filter out the Pump token that best suits your trading strategy by checking time, number of transactions, MKT Cap, and MKT Cap percentage ## Main interface - Chart: [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#central-part)
\### 1. Chart function[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-1.kxian-tu-biao-gong-neng)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/aBh180vAHaoWrOUnAQpW)

Observe the price or MKT Cap trend of tokens on the chart, and use the abundant tools in the tool bar to help you trade better Data: \* Freely choose SOL/USD as the unit; freely choose to display the currency Price/MCap \* Move the mouse on the chart to quickly browse the prices at different points, and click the + sign to draw a horizontal line Settings: \* Show/Hide trades: You can click on Show/Hide Trades icons above the chart, and flexibly choose to view the trading positions of different wallets in conjunction with the trading activities below \* Right-click on a blank area of ​​the chart and check Hide marks on bars to choose whether to display the Dev trading icon. \* Right click on the price/market value column on the right and click Move scales to left/right to freely choose to put the price column on the left or right \* Click on fx indicators and select the chart indicator you use most often, for example, enter volume to add a volume indicator chart Full screen chart:

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252F2Bb9aKfEljZbqJrzIfzi%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df0d2c6fd-dbce-41e1-9878-0e3917c584bb&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=eea1c954&sv=2)

\* Click the full screen expansion button in the upper right corner of the chart to expand the chart in full screen ### 2. Cross-chain multicharts

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FFsLEwo4G6GhHhXeuIt5d%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D125f2238-5406-4ed3-8724-cd42da90f8ec&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=d4a222c2&sv=2)

GMGN supports cross-chain multicharts and separate transactions. Click Multicharts above the chart and enter CA to open it. It supports browsing up to 8 charts at the same time! \* Marks, Avg price lines, and limit order lines on each chart are displayed normally \* Each individual chart can choose its own time granularity \* You can switch back and forth between different charts. The top information, activity, and transaction modules all display the tokens of the currently selected chart. \* When switching coins from the list in the left column of the token details page, other added charts will not be cleared, only the currently selected chart will be replaced \* After you switch chain and open the token details page, the previously added multicharts will not be cleared, only the last selected chart will be replaced, realizing the cross-chain multichart mode Frequently Asked Questions: \* How to add a chart of another chain when I'm in the sol chain token? \\ Answer: Please open the multicharts mode first, select the chart that you want to be replaced, then switch the chain in the upper right corner, and then enter the token details page you want to add in to complete the addition of the crosschain multicharts. \* After adding multicharts, a single chart becomes smaller and the display range is not enough. What should I do? \\ Answer: \\ 1\\) Drag the separator between the bottom of the chart and the active to expand the chart display range \\ 2\\) Flexibly select the time granularity of a single ghostwriter and use the mouse wheel to adjust the chart display range \\ 3\\) Collapse the left column to expand the display range of the main interface \\ 4\\) Use the full-screen expansion mode in the upper right corner ### 3. Instant trade/ Sell inits[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-2.-yi-jian-mai-mai)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/Zra3FFgEIm393ejx3UXU)

\#### 1) Instant trade: Below the chart, you can choose whether to open the instant trade function, the trading window is freely draggable \* Click the settings button next to “Instant trade” in the top left to customize your trading parameters #### 2) Sell inits: This feature helps you quickly sell tokens to recover your initial cost \* Available Conditions \* Available: You have holdings, and total buy cost exceeds total sell proceeds \* Unavailable: Total buy cost is less than or equal to total sell proceeds (you’ve recovered cost or made a profit) \* How It Works \* Recover initial cost amount = Total buy cost - Tota realized proceeds \* Applicable Scenarios \* Multiple Purchases: All buy costs are summed up \* Previous Sales: Deduct sell proceeds to calculate the remaining recover initial cost amount \* Price Drop or Token Transfer: If the holding value is below the initial cost, click "sell init" to sell all tokens \* Excludes transferred-in tokens; only considers buy and sell transactions ## Main interface - Trading activities[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-2.transactions-bottom-part)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/eDYect3jXhRjt84nFShf)

\#### 1. Trading activity history [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-1.-jiao-yi-huo-dong-li-shi)
\* Supports the display of transaction activity records in seconds, helping you to keep abreast of the latest developments in token transactions \* In the top right corner, you can see the bubble maps button, which will take you directly to their website to see the correlation between token holding addresses!

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FS2UtQsu88koZIUYUd1Cr%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df5f5f3ce-9929-4f92-b500-77bf644b5fae&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=58026d5a&sv=1)

\#### 2. Activity [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-2.-huo-dong)
\* You will get the latest transaction information, updated in real time. Transactions are also classified by \*smart money, KOL/VC, whales, new wallets, snipers, large holders, developers, followed, and rat warehouses.\* \* Click on different wallet types to quickly view what each wallet has done, and the transaction position and transaction time icons will be displayed on the K-line (select a new wallet as shown in the figure, and the transaction icons of new wallets will appear on the chart)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/0OzyUVYRv5Xf6GtgN9fC)

\#### 3. Traders[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#right-column)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/IAgPw0AqpeHgOK5ldA96)

\* You will get all the historical trader information of the token. Transactions are also categorized by \*smart money, KOL/VC, new wallet, followed, mouse trading, Bot Degan\*

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| SOL Bal/Age | Current SOL balance of the wallet address/first activity time of the wallet |
| Source/TF time | The source of the account funds and the time of the transfer |
| Bought/Sold | The total buy/sell amount of this wallet address |
| Pnl | Total profit = realized profit + unrealized profit. Click SOL/USD to switch the display units of total buy/total sell/total profit/realized profit/unrealized profit. |
| Realized | The realized profit after selling the tokens by this wallet |
| Unrealized | The wallet still holds unrealized profits from not selling the tokens |
| Avg Cost/sold | Average buying price/average selling price |
| TXs | Green is the number of buys/red is the number of sells |

\#### 4. Holders[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-4.-chi-you-zhe)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252Flv6wi4afsy3chgF6swlR%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dcacefd24-0699-47f2-aaa0-6067a63b67a6&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=510752d&sv=1)

\* Mark suspected insider trading to determine whether the dealer wants to use these small wallets to disperse the tokens and try to crash the market and run away \* Mark suspected phishing wallets. If the transferred tokens are not purchased, they will be marked. #### 5. BC Owners[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-5.-lan-chou-chi-you-zhe)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/JWsaTBdEEV3g4Md0U6Z2)

\* Blue-chip tokens: Blue-chip tokens refer to tokens on various chains that have been verified and recognized by the market, have high value, and will not easily return to zero, such as Sol Chain Neiro, Popcat \* Blue chip holders: holders of certain blue chip tokens \* Blue Chip Index: The Blue Chip Index refers to the proportion of token holders who also own blue chip tokens. \* The meaning of blue chip index: In a token, the more holders of blue chip tokens, the higher the blue chip index, the more blue chip holders are optimistic about the coin, and the more likely the coin will become the next high-value blue chip token. #### 6. position/ Limit/ Auto [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-6.-wo-de-jiao-yi-gua-dan-ce-le)
\* For details, please see the Positions page tutorial: {% content-ref url="/pages/oKNZV4QUqH8yR9aAVAxE" %} \[HOLDING\](/index/holding.md) {% endcontent-ref %} ### Right column [](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#you-lie)
\#### 1. Token social media[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-2.linked-wallet-bottom)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/41qsBIqzlAwC0BmTXVwh)

\* You can click to jump to the relevant social media website or account of the token \* Click to update the social media information of this token on GMGN \* ⚠️Note : Some tokens may have phishing URLs or TG groups that require verification to defraud your wallet private key. Please check the security information carefully! #### 2. Trading module[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-2.-jiao-yi-mo-kuai)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/ePdb4nFjlcROUnZxlQBE)

\* Click the switch button to switch wallets, but only TG wallet login can use GMGN automation function \* Buy: Buy immediately/buy at the bottom. For more details about buying at the bottom, please click: \[Limit Buy Order with GMGN web\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/pages/x919e1dqkDRhDZAmBW50#id-2.-limit-buy-order-with-gmgn-web) \* Sell: Sell immediately/sell automatically. For more details about automatic selling, please click: \[Limit Sell Order with Telegram Bot\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/pages/qfNDVJcHqCyQzj6IIQy5#id-3.limit-sell-order-with-telegram-bot) \* Automatic: For more details about automatic trading, please click: \\ \[Multiple \*\*Take-Profit and Stop-Loss - GMGN Web\*\*\](/index/auto-sell-auto-sell-take-profit-stop-loss.md#ru-he-kai-qi-zhui-zong-zhi-ying) For more details on slippage, priority fees, anti-pinch, GMGN fees, etc.: \[GMGN Fees ＆ Settings\](/index/gmgn-fees-settings.md) For more details on limit orders, auto buy/sell, etc.: \[Limit orders: auto buy/limit buy\](/index/auto-sell-auto-sell-take-profit-stop-loss.md) #### 3. Token information:[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-1.top)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/sJyPvIqH9QWEWqWLXEg1)

Check the indicators such as transaction volume, buy, sell, net buy, liquidity, minting data, blacklist, etc. It is also important to check the burning pool ratio and the probability of running away. More details about the security check: \[🆗CA Security Check\](/index/ca-security-checks.md) #### 4. Pool information (lower right corner):[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/token-page-chart-multicharts-activity-trading-system.md#id-3.pool-info-lower-right)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/4UVVnLiQGrZQtJUICgLo)

Here you will find all the information about the pool: the creator of the token, the date the pool was created, the total supply and liquidity, etc. --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/new-pair.md). # NEW PAIR ## NEW PAIR Page Overview ## 1.\*\*In the New Pair-Dashboard:\*\*

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/uA7srjoPtDSBXfeRttFp)

\### View new pairs in the last few hours (from 1 minute to 24 hours) \\\*New pool: Pairs to create a new pool\\ \\\*Burnt: Burnt LP tokens \\ \\\*DEXScreener cost: The cost of Dexscreener itself (keep in mind that updating the network, placing images, and getting additions all incur fees on the DEXScreener) ## \*\*2.In the New Pair-new pair:\*\*

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/35bfybugjNJ4v5OOq0Sv)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/m2K7erwxe72HAQvzFGna)

\*\*In the latest version, we support filtering memes:\*\*Pump,Moonshot,Raydium

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/cZbSa6HWAmHlllc54kOl)

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Age | Creation time |
| Liq/Initial | Liquidity and Initial |
| MC  | Market Capitalization |
| Holders | Number of Holders |
| 1h TXs | Number of Transactions in 1 hour |
| 1h Vol | Transcation volume in 1 hour |
| Price | Current meme price |
| 1m% 5m% 1h% | Percentage price fluctuation of this token in 1 minutes/ 5 minutes/ 1 hour |
| Degen Aduit | [CA Security Check](https://docs.gmgn.ai/pages/gHooW1I2QYSI3SidzRds) |

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/28kbUSgckI5NcKpwX5lB)

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| MintDisable | "Yes" indicates safety, meaning that the token creator cannot issue additional tokens to manipulate the market |
| Blacklist | "No" indicates safety, meaning that the project cannot blacklist any wallet's transactions, reducing the risk of financial entrapment  <br>"Yes" means you are on the blacklist of this token developer, you cannot sell this token, it will remind you that your wallet is frozen |
| Burnt | Displaying the burn pool percentage: the higher the ratio, the better, with 100% indicating that the project cannot withdraw from the liquidity pool |
| Top 10 | "Yes" indicates a relatively safe condition, meaning that the total holdings of the top 10 token holders are less than 30% of the total supply |
| Insiders | Wallets that did not buy tokens after trading opened, but hold tokens, may indicate that the token creator's holdings were transferred to multiple wallets to secretly sell off. Typically, legitimate projects distribute these through airdrops to users, and it is necessary to check the official Twitter for any airdrop events |
|     |     |

\## \*\*For more details about\*\* Token Security Checks \*\*please click the link\*\*👇��\*\*:\*\* \[CA Security Checks\](/index/ca-security-checks.md)

# 安全提示 | GMGN 使用教程

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/an-quan-ti-shi.md)
.

本文将介绍常见的黑客攻击钓鱼手段以及如何在网页插件钱包、GMGN TG钱包中做好安全设置，预防被盗

**在区块链黑暗森林世界里，首先牢记下面这两大安全法则：**

*   **零信任** 简单来说就是保持怀疑，而且是始终保持怀疑，对于任何需要输入私钥的平台、机器人、插件钱包授权签名等保持怀疑
    
*   **持续验证** 你要相信，你就必须有能力去验证你怀疑的点，并把这种能力养成习惯
    

1.  [被盗：常见黑客钓鱼以及攻击手段](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/an-quan-ti-shi#id-1.-bei-dao-chang-jian-hei-ke-diao-yu-yi-ji-gong-ji-shou-duan)
    
2.  [防盗：在插件钱包以及TG 钱包中做好预防](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/an-quan-ti-shi#id-2.-fang-dao-zai-cha-jian-qian-bao-yi-ji-tg-qian-bao-zhong-zuo-hao-yu-fang)
    
3.  [设备安全](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/an-quan-ti-shi#id-3.-she-bei-an-quan)
    
4.  [被盗了怎么办](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/an-quan-ti-shi#id-4.-bei-dao-le-zen-me-ban)
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/an-quan-ti-shi#id-1.-bei-dao-chang-jian-hei-ke-diao-yu-yi-ji-gong-ji-shou-duan)

1\. 被盗：常见黑客钓鱼以及攻击手段


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**TG里的诈骗：**

1）请记得官方管理员不会主动私信你！！！骗子冒充GMGN 管理员发送诈骗信息，骗取私钥或盗取TG账户！

*   常见情况：你在社群内发送消息，骗子借着帮你解决问题的理由要求你配合，最终导致被盗。有的骗子会隐藏用户id，把真的管理员名字填在简介里，迷惑性很强，容易导致被盗用户以为是官方诈骗！
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FgR0gq65LocTtXqL9A0lU%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dfec5cb12-dbb9-4669-9c02-ed8d1fa96ba5&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=961f199b&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FCJxlb3EaFt4A3LAlraJ2%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Deb90d6e5-f53e-455c-b61a-8919783620ca&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c8da7aa3&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FwAMjVy4ak6qul37zMZHY%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D24c23de8-d74d-41c6-95ec-625ba3542505&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4239be74&sv=2)

2）不要点击显示在 GMGN 机器人上方的任何广告！这些是骗子，可能会盗取你的钱包！ GMGN 官方机器人绝不会先向你索取钱包的私钥！

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FmeUldNXD4q4W8XqXNDsC%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D66241d4e-ea68-4df4-9a04-f9f356b85994&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=327fc63a&sv=2)

3）在某些代币的TG群组或者某些骗子发送的链接里会出现该类所谓的“安全验证”，请不要点击！也不要输入你的任何账户信息，包括手机号，密码等！

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FgFNJiaTqbuc19wQiEwvL%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D788a00d1-f876-4170-8229-c908112d8988&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=7c82be57&sv=2)

4）骗子复制一个GMGN仿冒群，将你拉入群组当中，在仿冒群组发布诈骗链接骗取私钥！由于群内有大量机器人导致看上去人数较多，并且会搬运真群消息，容易被误以为是官方群，请通过GMGN官方推特确认是否为真群！！[https://x.com/gmgnai](https://x.com/gmgnai)

*   建议用户在 隐私和安全-群组和频道 中勾选 不允许任何人，这将不允许任何人添加你到陌生的群组和频道，可以有效杜绝被拉入诈骗群组
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FSVw6Yk6mcuD6aVQFUlRg%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D80cdde2f-0205-410d-9fdb-970f11d65984&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=7a508dd0&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FjLNMNlIzRke1mBjGHxQU%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1ba1a830-6107-4b62-a62e-fdbd9ec82d22&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=42319317&sv=2)

5）骗子假装是Telegram官方给你发送消息，诈骗话术如图，引导你点击诈骗链接，请不要点击！！直接举报拉黑即可！

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252F3y9LwRWu2nziPI9e0VIy%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Db2410b8a-5499-4977-ae0d-76b3782dfb3c&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ba28aaa5&sv=2)

**Web3 插件钱包里的诈骗：**

1）签名安全里首要遵守的最大安全原则是：所见即所签。因此需要定期确认钱包是否向你不熟悉的，陌生应用进行了授权，请进入钱包查询授权列表并取消未知授权！

*   空投诈骗：Solana 上的授权钓鱼，攻击者批量给用户空投 NFT(图 1) ，用户通过空投 NFT 描述内容里的链接进入目标网站，连接钱包(图 2)，点击页面上的“Mint”，出现批准提示框(图 3)。注意，此时的批准提示框并没有什么特别提示，当批准后，该钱包里的所有 SOL 都会被转走
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FEn40cyaTiWhIYJajYefT%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Da75ecd5b-c27b-4a43-b4cb-75a7bc60b7f5&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=227aa0a9&sv=2)

2）陌生转账：有时钱包内会收到这种金额很小的陌生转账，大多为广告或诈骗相关，不必抱有好奇心，也不会影响到你钱包的正常操作，不用过于担心

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FEhlnQMynstZG9SePnruI%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df1e0e5fc-d68e-4f95-b6a0-339b09daa881&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=fe29ce09&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/an-quan-ti-shi#id-2.-fang-dao-zai-cha-jian-qian-bao-yi-ji-tg-qian-bao-zhong-zuo-hao-yu-fang)

2\. 防盗：在插件钱包以及TG 钱包中做好预防


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Telegram 安全预防：**

1）建议不是那么熟悉“TG 隐私和安全”的用户照搬下列设置，尤其是记得图中标红的几项一定要打开，能有效保证你的TG 账户安全

*   两步验证：开启后，黑客即使得到了你的手机号和密码，但在新设备上登陆时在输入短信验证码后仍然需要输入一个单独的密码，充分保证安全
    
*   手机号码：防止黑客直接获得你的手机号，向你发送诈骗短信或进行其他诈骗行为
    
*   群组与频道：被盗4）中有相关例子，可以有效杜绝被拉入诈骗群组
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FRR5gtvFWzM9AHh7MRHoG%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc91d4dd1-5a3e-468e-8f3f-40f5f111b023&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=de841cbd&sv=2)

2）确认你的Telegram app 是否通过官方渠道安装

3）Telegram 是否授权了陌生假冒bot，避免因为输入手机号或者点击诈骗链接导致钱包内余额被诈骗bot转移，建议通过多个GMGN官方渠道辨别一致后再进行交易

4）确认你是否安装的是官方来源的电报中文翻译插件，市面上有很多不明来源的第三方翻译插件，请注意辨别；TG官方有中文测试版，需要到官网下载

*   官网底部点击Translations(图1)，跳转后点击Other languagues，选择中文(图2)，随后拖到底部点击应用(图3)，将打开你的TG应用进行中文配置
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FBc3dNyXV1ssr389lacd8%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D83f12260-cb1c-40d2-9cf2-18bcdb592839&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c517cbcf&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FCOA4TaxwyUQ4whDMvyYg%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D09ef40e6-6b9c-4331-92ca-962f7f914728&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=9833c8a9&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FnxtYzyAsodPGnIlqMtck%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D9de92662-806b-47ff-8385-0a926818d6ac&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=b506cc54&sv=2)

**Web3 插件钱包：**

1）进入web3 插件钱包中查询授权列表，并取消未知授权，确认已授权的应用都为对应官方应用

2）打开自动锁定时间，避免因为设备离身的时候被其他人看到你的私钥

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252F5Wcr4oMGv7ZDTwvbXzFK%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De7e18092-1602-4743-8ed5-a295850af5bd&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=63329183&sv=2)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FSwsCvNcERPxP3Lf7vTh0%252Fimage%2520%281%29.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D13afca64-ade9-4a6d-8ed3-80e5702917be&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4ebfaac1&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/an-quan-ti-shi#id-3.-she-bei-an-quan)

3\. 设备安全


------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1）如果你的设备为安卓机/windows电脑/非ipad平板，请注意不要点击未知陌生链接或者下载不明应用，避免手机/电脑中木马或者恶意程序，并且定期用安全软件检查设备，消杀病毒，防范风险

2）如果你的设备为苹果设备，app store以及未正式上线的测试软件中仍有一些诈骗应用的存在，需要注意防范

3）安全原则：

*   网络上的知识，凡事都参考至少两个来源的信息，彼此佐证，始终保持怀疑
    
*   做好隔离，也就是鸡蛋不要放在一个篮子里
    
*   对于存有重要资产的钱包，不做轻易更新，够用就好
    
*   所见即所签。即你看到的内容就是你预期要签名的内容，当你签名发出去后，结果就应该是你预期的，绝不是事后拍断大腿的
    
*   重视系统安全更新，有安全更新就立即行动
    
*   不乱下程序其实已经杜绝了绝大多数风险了
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/an-quan-ti-shi#id-4.-bei-dao-le-zen-me-ban)

4\. 被盗了怎么办


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

基本所有Web3用户都被盗过，我们建议被盗用户填写[慢雾安全团队被盗申请表](https://aml.slowmist.com/cn/recovery-funds.html)
，可以追踪黑客地址，尝试追回资金。

1）止损第一。止损就是让损失不会继续放大。这分为至少两个阶段：

*   眼前着急阶段。眼前的绝对是当务之急的，比如你看到黑客正在陆续转移你的资产，需要赶紧抢着把剩余资产安全转移。有交易抢跑经验的，就抢跑。看资产类型，如果是那种可以链上冻结的，就尽可能联系冻结。有能力做链上追踪分析的发现资金转移进中心化平台，就可以联系做必要风控
    
*   局面控制后阶段。局面稳住后，重点要琢磨的是如何不会出现二次、三次伤害
    

2）保护好现场。发现被盗后，千万冷静，深呼吸，一定要保护好有关现场。有几个经验供参考：

*   针对电脑、服务器这类联网设备，一旦这些是事故主场，立即断网，但不关机（电源供电持续）
    
*   除非你自己有能力，否则等待专业安全人员介入取证分析
    

3）分析原因

*   分析原因的目的是了解资产是如何被盗走的：私钥被盗/TG账户被盗/设备被入侵等
    
*   比如至少把以下几点梳理清楚：
    
    *   概要 1：什么人、什么时间、发生了什么事、总损失多少？
        
    *   概要 2：损失有关的钱包地址、黑客钱包地址、币种类型、数量，一个表格就比较清晰了
        
    

4）填写慢雾安全团队被盗申请表

建议被盗用户填写[慢雾安全团队被盗申请表](https://aml.slowmist.com/cn/recovery-funds.html)
，将限制黑客及相关地址在CEX出入金，并且追踪黑客地址，尝试追回资金

⚠️GMGN的第一宗旨即是安全性，不存在因为漏洞导致钱包余额被转移的情况，遇到被盗情况请根据上述列举情况进行自查。 GMGN不会对用户钱包进行任何操作，我们也没有能力转走任何用户的钱包余额。

[PreviousQ＆A常见问题](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qa-chang-jian-wen-ti)
[Next战壕 - MEME](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/zhan-hao-meme)

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/EDW68UFR3FWxpP3PL8vH)

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Age | Creation time |
| Liq/MC | Liquidity/ Market Capitalization |
| Holders | Number of Holders |
| 1h TXs | Number of transactions in 1 hour |
| 1h Vol | Transcation volume in 1 hour |
| Price | Current meme price |
| 1m% 5m% 1h% | Percentage price fluctuation of this token in 1 minutes/ 5 minutes/ 1 hour |
| Degen Aduit | [CA Security Check](https://docs.gmgn.ai/pages/gHooW1I2QYSI3SidzRds) |

\* We have a Trending page for you to see the top tokens that people are buying and selling \* We offer multiple options for you to filter and sort by, just like the NEW PAIR page. Additionally, you can select different time intervals (1 minute/ 5 minutes/ 30 minutes/ 1 hour) to see tokens that have been trending across those time frames

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/Yq84J5YKbjYgedAaK2mW)

\* In this section on the left, you can click on the little star to add it to the watch list; \* You'll see how popular it is as well as the number of fires; \* You'll see if it has a CTO after its logo appears, and if the emoji of two people appears yellow; \* You'll see if it has an AD activated in Dexscreener; \* You'll see if the network is updated in Dexscreener and its own network as well as in the contract. ## NextBC

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/zxHXZt3PjAVj8Jjb6D9P)

\* Blue Chip tokens: Blue chip tokens refer to tokens on each chain that have been verified and recognized by the market, have high value, and will not easily return to zero, such as sol chain neiro, popcat \* Blue Chip Holders: holders who own certain blue chip tokens \* Blue Chip index: The blue chip index refers to the proportion of holders of the token who also own blue chip tokens. \* Meaning of Blue Chip Index: In a token, the more holders of blue chip tokens, that is, the higher the blue chip index, the more optimistic the blue chip holders are about this coin, and the more likely this coin is to become the next high-value blue chip token. ## For related icon definitions, please click {% content-ref url="/pages/P1iUemK4XoQJTTk1VRfq" %} \[Featured Icon Definition\](/index/featured-icon-definition.md) {% endcontent-ref %} --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. Markdown versions of documentation pages are available by appending \`.md\` to page URLs; this page is available as \[Markdown\](https://docs.gmgn.ai/index/gmgn-tg-sniper-bot-sol.md). # GMGN TG Sniper Bot - SOL \*\*🌈 Feel free to trade MEME tokens with GMGN Telegram Sniper Bot\*\*👇��\*\*:​\*\* \[@GMGN\\\_US\](https://t.me/US\_GMGNBOT) | \[@GMGN\](https://t.me/GMGN\_sol\_bot) | \[@GMGN\\\_02\](https://t.me/GMGN\_sol02\_bot) | \[@GMGN\\\_03\](https://t.me/GMGN\_sol03\_bot) | \[@GMGN\\\_04\](https://t.me/GMGN\_sol04\_bot) :warning: All Official GMGN Sniper Bot are listed above. Any other bots are scammer bots which will drain your wallet. Be caution. Especially scammers use a capital "I" ("i") disguised as a lowercase "l" ("L") pretending to be the GMGN Trading bot. ## 1.Initial information Note: the first time you use the bot, a solana wallet address is automatically generated

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/jHlITH6SbCkgyzcymb0R)

\#### let's work on the buttons that come out first when we access the bot with the previous link:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Buy/Sell | This is where we will do the buying and selling. You press the button, you put the token contract and it will allow you to make the purchase or sale |
| Limit orders | Here you can control the limit orders you have created ted |
| A**ssets** | You will see the assets you have |
| Wallet | You can see your wallet information, including SOL and WSOL balances, and support quick one-click conversion from WSOL to SOL;  <br>You can import and export private keys and change wallets here, but please pay attention to the security of private keys |
| Copy Signal | Click to use the PUMP CTO signal automatic follow-up function. For more details, please see: [CopySignal: Copy Trade with PUMP CTO Signal](https://docs.gmgn.ai/pages/Q6Gkl4tWY5Q8C4Nkubux) |
| Copy Trade | Click to use the automatic copy wallet function. For more details, please see: [Copy Trade: Copy Smart Money automatically earn SOL!](https://docs.gmgn.ai/pages/JCmcIhgjxTGzkMxFiIQ1) |
| Pump FOMO | Click to see the tokens whose prices have surged in the last minute |
| New LP | Click to jump to the GMGN new pool monitoring signal channel, where new LP creation will be notified. You will see various information, such as pool burning, large purchases, network, LP pool, etc. |
| Featured Signals | Click to jump to the GMGN featured signal channel, where you can choose from a wide variety of selected signals |
| Track SM Wallet | Click to jump to the TG GMGN SOL chain wallet monitoring notification robot. For more details, please see: [Wallet Alert on Telegram](https://docs.gmgn.ai/pages/x2SuM2Gt7zFfBMHmMDri) |
| Invitation Rebate | View other details such as the number of invitees and rebate income |
| set up | You can set to enable automatic slippage/fast slippage, and you can customize fast slippage and anti-slippage;  <br>Modify your buy priority fee/sell priority fee;  <br>Support auto buy, you can customize the automatic buying strategy, for more details, please see: [Send contract to buy automatically with Telegram Bot](https://docs.gmgn.ai/pages/x919e1dqkDRhDZAmBW50#id-1.-send-contract-to-buy-automatically-with-telegram-bot)<br>  <br>Support auto sell, you can create an automatic selling strategy based on the buy transaction, for more details, please see: [Set up Auto Sell ＆ Take-profit/Stop-loss with Telagrem Bot](https://docs.gmgn.ai/pages/qfNDVJcHqCyQzj6IIQy5#id-1.-set-up-auto-sell-take-profit-stop-loss-with-telagrem-bot)<br>  <br>Support custom buy/sell quantity, convenient and fast buying and selling |
| Switch language | Switch bot language, support English/Chinese/Korean |

\## 2. Wallet \* Due to the SOL chain mechanism problem, you may receive WSOL instead of SOL at transaction settlement. GMGN has now launched the exchange WSOL → SOL function, welcome to experience.\\ Specific steps: Enter /start in our bot @GMGN\\\_sol\\\_bot, click the wallet, click Exchange WSOL → SOL to quickly exchange the received WSOL to SOL ## 3.Set up the bot

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/uNS5VYxybhtr4Clfofit)

we must go to \*\*Setting\*\* in the home and start the basic setup

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| autoslippage | will allow us to have an automatic slippage enabled or disabled. The idea is that, depending on price fluctuation, our slippage will change automatically. We can also configure it manually by disabling this option |
| **turbo slippage** | slippage that you will have configured |
| **anti-mev slippage** | it is the slippage used when you are attacked by a mev bot |
| **auto buy** | turn on auto buy, send the token contract to the Bot, and it will automatically buy immediately after reaching the preset value |
| **auto Sell** | bot can help you automatically create a profit/stop limit order valid for 24 hours |
| **custom buy/custom sell** | we will be able to configure the quantities we want to get out at the time of buying and selling |

For details about auto buy/auto sell/limit order, please click \\ \[Auto Buy: Auto buy＆Limit buy\](/index/auto-buy-auto-buy-limit-buy.md) \\ \[Auto Sell: auto sell＆take profit / stop loss\](/index/auto-sell-auto-sell-take-profit-stop-loss.md) ## 4.Buy/sell Here we will be encouraged to do an instant swap or put a limit order. Let's go with every configuration ### 1) Swap

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/yfcNmdWzcW2zQa0bAdhF)

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **trubo mode** | swap quickly on chain |
| **anti-mev** | swap with anti-MEV RPC, the transaction speed is slightly slower |
| **buy** | we will get the quick purchases that we have set up before in the Settings section and an extra in case we want to buy an "x" amount |
| **sell** | we will get the percentages of quick sales that we have set before in the Settings section and an extra in case we want to sell an "x" quantity |

\### 2) Limit

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/files/56aw33E0tXkRo1OqIJby)

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **limit buy** | you can configure the number of SOLs you want to purchase in a limited order |
| **limit sell** | you can configure the number of tokens to be sold in each limit sell order (percentage) |
| **trigger price** | you want to execute the order at the price |
| **exp.3d/24h/1h** | it is the amount of time you want to keep the order open, for example exp 3d will keep the order open for 3 days |
| **create orde**r | once all the Settings have been made, we give this button and the command will be created |

\### 🎉🎉This is all the steps and setup details to use the gmgn trading bot. Start trading with the GMGN TG Trading Bot！！！ {% embed url="" %} ## 🤖 GMGN Offecial Sniper Bots List \\ Please consider using backup bots if you find the responses from Telegram Bot to be slow. \[@GMGN\\\_sol\\\_bot\](https://t.me/GMGN\_sol\_bot) \[@GMGN\\\_sol02\\\_bot\](https://t.me/GMGN\_sol02\_bot) \[@GMGN\\\_sol03\\\_bot\](https://t.me/GMGN\_sol03\_bot) \[@GMGN\\\_sol04\\\_bot\](https://t.me/GMGN\_sol04\_bot) \[@US\\\_GMGNBOT\](https://t.me/US\_GMGNBOT) \*\*\* ## \*\*⚠️\*\*Telegram account security： At present, we only have trading robots on the sol chain, please beware of fake robots and use GMGN official robots. \* Don't share private keys. \* The TG client should be installed from a formal channel such as Google Play or app store. \* Do not install third party language packs. \* Use the correct GMGN trading bot. There are fake bots on the market. \* The TG account should be verified 2FA(two-factor authentication)to prevent the TG account from being stolen. --- # Agent Instructions This documentation is published with GitBook. # 关注：监控广场、关注、收藏 | GMGN 使用教程

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/guan-zhu-jian-kong-guang-chang-guan-zhu-shou-cang.md)
.

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/guan-zhu-jian-kong-guang-chang-guan-zhu-shou-cang#follow-page-overview)

关注页面总览

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FvacGZZ6hii1aDk2SO6al%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D353a1993-30dc-4760-bd5a-e5bc640d7308&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=3c219847&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/guan-zhu-jian-kong-guang-chang-guan-zhu-shou-cang#id-2.in-the-follow-follow)

1.监控广场


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FjRcwPavTPLNYagOHkBVZ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dd4e7ab62-08ef-40ee-816c-4b0f50429a94&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ddeeafe0&sv=2)

GMGN监控广场能让你查看你所有已关注钱包的资金流向，帮助你通过钱包间的共同买入及时抓住金狗

*   可以自由选择净流入时间范围 1m/5m/1h/6h/24h
    
*   可以看到代币的各类数据，包含市值、成交额、社媒等信息
    
*   左下角隐藏不感兴趣的代币
    
*   右下角可以通过预设完成的立即买入按钮实现一键买入
    
*   左侧榜单也能直接查看关注净流入信息
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/guan-zhu-jian-kong-guang-chang-guan-zhu-shou-cang#id-2.in-the-follow-follow-1)

2.关注


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FfmxClwN32S4wKHSpTNAd%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D429e6f7f-76c0-426b-8783-18bab9608c91&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=e0a6f074&sv=2)

*   点击红色区域可自动跳转到 Telegram 页面并关注官方 GMGN 信号机器人
    
*   点击钱包地址查看你关注的钱包详情页面：[钱包详情页](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qian-bao-xiang-qing-ye)
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/guan-zhu-jian-kong-guang-chang-guan-zhu-shou-cang#id-1.in-the-follow-watchlist)

3\. 收藏


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252Fqqbz1qVllUscUoOX0Nw3%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7b2169c2-f206-462d-9468-bcc93f9788e5&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=629b50ff&sv=2)

*   支持收藏代币分组，点击代币左侧小星星即可将代币添加至你的自定义分组列表
    
*   **Web 端**：在代币名称右侧点击编辑按钮，即可新增或修改备注名，Web 端各页面已全面支持代币备注显示
    
*   **H5 页面**：战壕页已支持对代币添加备注，在手机浏览器中也可以为代币做标记。
    
*   **GMGN App**：在【收藏】页面长按某个代币，即可为该代币新增或修改备注名称，方便对重点标的做个性化备注和管理。
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252F6eNDt7LUqBzl2IC4qMlm%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D15c26b74-ae79-4d39-8965-eccc008ed823&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=66e840e7&sv=2)

*   点击查看你收藏的代币交易详情页面：[代币详情页：K线 - 多图表、交易活动、交易系统](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/dai-bi-xiang-qing-yekxian-duo-tu-biao-jiao-yi-huo-dong-jiao-yi-xi-tong)
    

[Previous持仓](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/chi-cang)

Last updated 6 months ago

*   [关注页面总览](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/guan-zhu-jian-kong-guang-chang-guan-zhu-shou-cang#follow-page-overview)

# 信号：狙击新币、已关注、挂单列表 | GMGN 使用教程

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/xin-hao-ju-ji-xin-bi-yi-guan-zhu-gua-dan-lie-biao.md)
.

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/xin-hao-ju-ji-xin-bi-yi-guan-zhu-gua-dan-lie-biao#id-1.-ju-ji-xin-bi)

1\. 狙击新币


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/xin-hao-ju-ji-xin-bi-yi-guan-zhu-gua-dan-lie-biao#web-duan-xin-hao-ye-di-bu-xin-hao-ru-kou)

**Web 端信号页（底部【信号】入口）：**

通过底部【信号】入口进入信号页面，你可以看到多种市场信号：

*   DexScreener 付费信号（普通广告、加速推广、顶置广告、更新社媒等）
    
*   价格提醒（价格飙升、历史新高、关键市值）
    
*   其他信号（Pump 直播、社区接管等）
    

支持按时间、市值、总手续费等条件进行筛选，方便你快速发现高关注度、强异动的代币

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/xin-hao-ju-ji-xin-bi-yi-guan-zhu-gua-dan-lie-biao#gmgn-app-xin-hao-ru-kou-ai-xin-hao)

**GMGN App 信号入口（AI 信号）：**

在 App 底部导航点击【监控】，再切换到顶部【AI 信号】标签，即可进入 App 的信号列表页面：

*   查看系统筛选出的优质代币信号
    
*   一键跳转到代币详情页做进一步分析和交易
    

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/xin-hao-ju-ji-xin-bi-yi-guan-zhu-gua-dan-lie-biao#id-2.-qian-bao-zhui-zong)

**2\. 钱包追踪**


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Web左下角【钱包追踪】页面，你可以看到所有已追踪钱包的操作记录，并可开启 GMGN 网页通知，或接入 **0 延迟机器人**，及时收到这些钱包的交易提醒。

在 **GMGN App** 中，钱包追踪入口为：

*   顶部切换到【关注】标签，可查看你追踪的钱包列表
    
*   切换到【活动】标签，可查看这些钱包的实时买卖记录；开启 App 通知后，可同步收到相关推送提醒
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FIVCEphS1FqNarM0wCnYm%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Da62edfac-74ce-4eaf-9da5-e9b82a383a95&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=9b68b52c&sv=2)

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/xin-hao-ju-ji-xin-bi-yi-guan-zhu-gua-dan-lie-biao#id-3.-gua-dan-lie-biao)

**3\. 挂单列表**


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Web 端**：

*   点击交易，打开挂单列表，查看你的所有挂单信息
    
*   你可以在任意代币的详情页中，切换到顶部的【订单】标签，查看该代币下你的所有挂单、自动交易和高级策略订单信息
    

**GMGN App**：

*   打开 App 进入【资产】页，选择对应钱包后，在钱包详情中切换到【订单】标签，即可在手机上查看和管理当前钱包的挂单以及各类策略订单。
    

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FPxw3JAMkGKzAlxVhItc4%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dbdd739f7-7da9-4a47-9771-65a5e5480dfe&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=d0963e6d&sv=2)

#### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/xin-hao-ju-ji-xin-bi-yi-guan-zhu-gua-dan-lie-biao#mian-ze-sheng-ming-jiao-yi-qian-qing-jian-cha-dai-bi-feng-xian)

⚠️ 免责声明：交易前请检查代币风险！

[Next钱包详情页](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qian-bao-xiang-qing-ye)

*   [2\. 钱包追踪](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/xin-hao-ju-ji-xin-bi-yi-guan-zhu-gua-dan-lie-biao#id-2.-qian-bao-zhui-zong)
    
*   [3\. 挂单列表](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/xin-hao-ju-ji-xin-bi-yi-guan-zhu-gua-dan-lie-biao#id-3.-gua-dan-lie-biao)

# 钱包详情页 | GMGN 使用教程

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qian-bao-xiang-qing-ye.md)
.

### 

[](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qian-bao-xiang-qing-ye#qian-bao-xiang-qing-ye)

钱包详情页：

![](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1305672697-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FivH0y4hvvQWQlOnFKiAg%252Fuploads%252FyLPwQMwxBOzMH32eNFaF%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D9077c5da-5f0c-4308-9c34-cd8528f94456&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=dd4ced56&sv=2)

**上方功能模块：**

*   点击钱包名称旁边按钮可以对钱包名称进行备注
    
*   点击合约地址旁边按钮可以复制CA或者跳转solscan.io查询钱包活动
    
*   点击推特可以跳转到该钱包拥有者的钱包地址
    
*   点击钱包跟单可以复制该钱包的交易，详情请查看：[钱包跟单：跟单聪明钱自动赚SOL！](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/qian-bao-gen-dan-gen-dan-cong-ming-qian-zi-dong-zhuan-sol)
    
*   点击【关注】后，该钱包会被加入你的追踪列表，你可以在左下角【钱包追踪】中查看该钱包的全部操作，并通过 **0 延迟机器人** 接收该钱包的实时交易通知
    
    在 **GMGN App** 中，点击底部【钱包跟单】，在顶部切换到【关注】即可查看已关注的钱包，在【活动】页可以看到这些钱包的最新买卖记录；开启 App 通知后，可同步收到相关推送提醒
    

**最近7D/30D盈亏/胜率：**

*   查看该钱包最近的D盈亏比例以及资金盈亏数额
    
*   查看钱包当前胜率以及钱包余额
    

**利润：**

7D 交易数

绿色代表买入笔数/红色代表卖出笔数

总盈亏

该钱包所有交易盈亏数额以及盈亏比例

未实现利润

该钱包当前未出售的代币价值

7D/30D 平均持仓时长

最近7天/30天，买入代币后平均持有多长时间才卖

7D/30D 买入总成本

最近7天/30天，买入代币花费的总成本

7D/30D 代币平均买入成本

最近7天/30天，买入代币花费的总成本除以买入代币数量

7D/30D 代币平均实现利润

最近7天/30天，平均每个代笔已售出部分实现的利润（未计算未实现利润）

**盈利分布：**

*   可以看到该钱包在最近7天/30天，买入的代币的涨跌的幅度以及个数
    

**钓鱼检测：**

黑名单

该钱包买入黑名单/貔貅代币数量，过多可能是项目方钓鱼钱包

没购买

该钱包内非买入代币数量，可以分析有多少代币是从其他地方转账过来，从而分析钱包属性

卖出量大于买入量

该钱包卖出量大于买入量的代币个数

十秒内完成买/卖

十秒内完成买/卖交易的代币个数，可能是刷单机器人或者割跟单的钱包

[Previous信号：狙击新币、已关注、挂单列表](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/xin-hao-ju-ji-xin-bi-yi-guan-zhu-gua-dan-lie-biao)
[Next代币详情页：K线 - 多图表、交易活动、交易系统](https://docs.gmgn.ai/cn/dai-bi-xiang-qing-yekxian-duo-tu-biao-jiao-yi-huo-dong-jiao-yi-xi-tong)

Last updated 6 months ago
